To declare concerning my covenant, LORD JEHOVAH said to me, 'You are my Son, and today I have begotten you’.
Ask of me and I shall give you the nations for your inheritance, and the ends of the Earth as your Empire.
You shall shepherd them with a scepter of iron and like a potter's vessels you will shatter them.
Now, kings, be wise, and be instructed, Judges of Earth.
Serve LORD JEHOVAH in awe, and hold to him with trembling.
Kiss The Son, lest LORD JEHOVAH be angry, and you be destroyed from his way because his wrath burns even a little; blessed are all who trust upon him.
LORD JEHOVAH, how my oppressors have increased! Many have risen up against me!
There are many who say to my soul, "You have no salvation in your God.”
You, LORD JEHOVAH, are my helper and my honor, and the lifter of my head.
I cried to LORD JEHOVAH with my voice and he answered me from his holy mountain.
I laid down and I slept and I was awakened because LORD JEHOVAH kept me.
I will not be afraid of ten thousands of people who surrounded me and stood against me.
Arise, LORD JEHOVAH, my God; save me, because you have stricken all my enemies on their cheeks and you have broken the teeth of the wicked.
For LORD JEHOVAH is salvation, and your blessing is upon your people for eternity.
When I called you, you answered me, my God, and the Savior of my righteousness; in my sufferings you inspired me; show mercy upon me and hear my prayer.
Sons of men, how long will you obscure my honor, love emptiness and seek lies: forever?
Know that LORD JEHOVAH has set apart The Chosen One for himself with wonders; LORD JEHOVAH will hear when I call him.
Tremble in awe and you will not sin; speak in your hearts and meditate upon your beds.
Offer the sacrifices of righteousness and hope in LORD JEHOVAH.
There are many who say, "Who will show us good and will shed upon us the light of his face?"
LORD JEHOVAH, you have given your joy into my heart more than the time that their grain and their wine and their oil increased in peace together.
And I shall lie down and sleep, because you, LORD JEHOVAH, make me dwell alone in stillness.
Give ear to my words, LORD JEHOVAH, and consider my meditation.
Give ear to the voice of my cry, my King and my God, because it is to you that I pray.
LORD JEHOVAH, at dawn you will hear my voice and at dawn I shall be ready and shall appear before you.
Because you are God, and desire no evil, and no evil one will dwell with you.
Neither will the proud stand before your eyes; you have hated all workers of falsehood.
And you will destroy those who speak lies; and the man who sheds blood and the deceiver, LORD JEHOVAH will reject.
And I shall enter your house in the multitude of your kindness and I shall worship in the temple of your Holiness.
In your awe, lead me, LORD JEHOVAH, and in your righteousness straighten your road in front of me, because of my enemies
Because there is no righteousness in their mouths, but evil is within them, and their throats are like opened tombs and their tongues subvert.
God will condemn them; they will fall from their counsels, and in the multitude of their evils cast them out, because they have provoked you.
All who hope in you will rejoice, and to eternity they will praise you, and you will dwell in them, and all who love your name will be strengthened in you.
Because you will bless the righteous ones, LORD JEHOVAH; like an acceptable shield you will cover me.
LORD JEHOVAH, do not rebuke me in your wrath, neither discipline me in your anger.
Have mercy upon me LORD JEHOVAH because I am sick; heal me, LORD JEHOVAH, because my bones are troubled.
My soul is very troubled, and you, LORD JEHOVAH, how long?
Return, LORD JEHOVAH, and deliver my soul, and save me because of your kindness
Because your memorial is not in death, and in Sheol, who gives you thanks?
I am weary with my groanings, and I have watered my bed every night and I wash my mattress with my tears.
My eye is weak with grief and I am troubled by all my enemies.
Depart from me, all workers of lies, because LORD JEHOVAH has heard the voice of my weeping!
LORD JEHOVAH has heard my request; LORD JEHOVAH has accepted my prayer.
All my enemies shall be ashamed and thoroughly defeated; they shall be turned back and destroyed suddenly.
LORD JEHOVAH, my God, in you I have hoped; redeem me and save me from all my persecutors.
Lest they tear my soul apart like a lion and there is none who saves and delivers.
LORD JEHOVAH, my God, if I have done this and if there is evil in my hands,
And if I paid him who did evil to me and if I have afflicted my enemies for nothing,
May the enemy persecute my soul, and let him seize it and tread my life into the ground, and destroy my honor into the dust.
Arise, LORD JEHOVAH, in your wrath, and I shall be lifted up above the neck of my enemies; awaken for me the judgment that you have commanded.
And the congregation of the peoples will surround you, and for its sake you shall return on high.
LORD JEHOVAH shall judge the nations. Judge me, LORD JEHOVAH, according to my righteousness and according to my integrity.
Let evil be spent upon the wicked and establish the righteous; God, the Righteous One proves the heart and the kidneys.
God is my helper, who saves the upright in heart.
God, the Judge of truth, is not angry every day.
If he does not turn, he sharpens his sword, he bends his bow; he is ready.
And he prepares for himself the instruments of wrath; he makes his arrows burn.
Because the evil one is corrupt and has conceived lies and has given birth to evil,
He has dug a pit and has dug it and has fallen into the ditch that he made.
His evil will return upon his head, and upon his desire his evil will descend.
I shall confess LORD JEHOVAH according to my righteousness, and I shall sing praise to The Name of LORD JEHOVAH The Most High.
LORD JEHOVAH, our Lord, how glorious is your Name in all the Earth, for you have set your glory above Heaven!
From the mouth of young men and boys you prepared your song, because of your enemies, to destroy the enemy who avenges,
Because they have seen your Heavens, the work of your fingers, the moon and the stars you have prepared,
What is man, that you remember him, and a son of man that you visit him?
You made him a little lower than the Angels; you have clothed him in honor and in glory.
You have authorized him over the work of your hand and you have set all under his feet,
All sheep and oxen, also the animals of the wilderness
And the fowl in the sky, and the fish of the sea that pass through the paths of the seas.
LORD JEHOVAH, our Lord, how glorious is your Name in all the Earth!
I will praise LORD JEHOVAH from my whole heart and I shall tell all your wonders, oh, Most High!
I shall rejoice and be glad in you, and I shall praise your Name, oh, Most High!
When my enemies turn back their behind, they will stumble and be destroyed from before you.
Because you have kept my reward and my judgment and you sat on the throne, Righteous Judge.
You rebuked the nations and you destroyed the wicked and their names you have blotted out for an eternity of eternities.
My enemies are finished by the sword; you have ripped out cities for eternity and you have destroyed their memorial.
And LORD JEHOVAH endures to eternity and prepares his throne for judgment.
For he shall judge the world in truth and the nations in integrity.
LORD JEHOVAH shall be a place of refuge for the poor and their helper in times of suffering.
And all who know your Name will hope in you, because you do not forsake those who seek you, LORD JEHOVAH.
Sing to LORD JEHOVAH who dwells in Zion, and show his skills among the nations.
Because he has remembered to require their blood and he does not forget the cry of the poor.
Show mercy upon me, LORD JEHOVAH, and see my oppression by him who hates me, my Exalter from the gates of death.
Because I shall tell all your wonders in the gates of the daughter of Zion, I shall exult in your salvation.
The Gentiles have sunk into the ditch they have made, and their feet are caught in the net they have hidden.
LORD JEHOVAH makes known the judgment that he does, and the wicked is caught by the work of his hands.
The wicked shall turn back to Sheol, and all the peoples that forget God
Because he never forgets the poor and you will never destroy the hope of the poor.
Arise, LORD JEHOVAH, and let not a son of man be strengthened; the nations shall be judged before your face.
Establish a lawgiver for them, who shall instruct the nations that they are children of men.
Why, LORD JEHOVAH, do you stand at a distance, and have withdrawn your gaze in times of trouble?
In the wicked man's pride he consumes the poor; they will be caught in the mind set which they have contrived.
Because the wicked boasts in the lusts of his soul, the evil one is blessed and LORD JEHOVAH is angry.
And the wicked in his pride does not make inquiry and there is no God in all his thoughts.
And his ways are dissolute always, and your judgment enters against him, and he despises all his enemies.
He has said in his heart, "I shall not move for a generation of generations"; he thinks upon evil.
And a curse fills his mouth, fraud and deceit are under his tongue, evil and depravity.
He sits in ambush in a dwelling and in a secret place he murders the righteous; his eyes gaze upon the afflicted one.
And he lies in wait to plunder the poor in the snare of his net.
He will be humbled and fall and in his bones is sickness and pain.
He said in his heart, "God forgets and turns his face and will never see.”
Arise, LORD JEHOVAH, my God, and lift your hand and do not forget the afflicted one.
Why does the sinner anger God and say his heart, "You will not require it"?
You see that there is evil and wrath and behold, he will be given over into your hands; the afflicted one will be left to you, and you are the helper of the orphan.
Shatter the arm of the sinner and of the evil; you shall seek his sin and it shall not be found.
LORD JEHOVAH is King to the eternity of eternities; the Gentiles are destroyed from his land.
You have heard the hope of the poor, LORD JEHOVAH, and your ear has heard the preparation of their heart,
To judge the orphan and The Evil One, that he may not add again to destroy the children of men from the Earth.
In LORD JEHOVAH I have hoped; how do you say to my soul, "Escape and dwell on the mountains like a bird"?
Because, behold, sinners have drawn the bow and readied their arrows upon the string to shoot in thick darkness at the upright hearts
Because they have overthrown that which you have prepared, but what is the righteous doing?
LORD JEHOVAH is in the temple of the Holiness of LORD JEHOVAH; his throne is in Heaven; his eyes see; his eyelids examine the children of men.
LORD JEHOVAH examines the righteous ones; the evil and those who love evil his soul has hated.
Snares have come down upon the wicked like rain; fire and brimstone and a wind of disease is the portion of their cup,
Because LORD JEHOVAH is righteous and he loves righteousness, and his face has seen integrity.
Save, LORD JEHOVAH, because the good man is finished and faith has ceased from the Earth!
The children of men speak emptiness, and a man with his neighbor with duplicitous lips; they speak with a double heart.
LORD JEHOVAH will destroy all duplicitous lips and tongues that speak proud things.
Who have said, "Our tongue will prevail; our lips are our Lord.”
Because of the robbery of the poor and the groans of the ill, therefore I shall arise, says LORD JEHOVAH, "And I shall work salvation openly."
The words of LORD JEHOVAH are pure words, choice silver in a furnace in the Earth, and purified each by seven.
And you, LORD JEHOVAH, will keep them; redeem me and save me, from this generation to eternity.
The wicked go around and walk according to the contemptible pride of the sons of Edom.
How long will you ignore me, LORD JEHOVAH? Forever? How long will you turn your face from me?
How long will you put sorrow in my soul and misery in my heart every day? How long will my enemies be exalted against me?
Look and answer me, LORD JEHOVAH, my God, and enlighten my eyes, lest I sleep unto death.
And let not my enemies say, "I have beaten him”, neither let them rejoice against me in my afflictions when I am shaken.
I have trusted upon your kindness; my heart will exult in your salvation and I shall glorify LORD JEHOVAH who has delivered me.
— Ps
The evil one has said in his heart, "There is no God.” They are corrupted and they are defiled in their schemes and there is none who does good.
LORD JEHOVAH looked out from Heaven upon the children of men to see if there is any of understanding and seeking God.
All have gone astray together and they have been rejected; there is none who does good; not even one.
No workers of evil have awareness; they consume my people as eating bread, and they have not called upon LORD JEHOVAH.
There they were filled with awe, because God is in the generation of the righteous ones.
They shamed the counsel of the poor because LORD JEHOVAH is his trust.
Who will give salvation to Israel from Zion? When LORD JEHOVAH turns back the captivity of his people, Jacob will leap for joy and Israel will rejoice.
LORD JEHOVAH, who will inhabit your tent, and who is going to dwell in your holy mountain?
One who walks without blemish and does righteousness, and speaks the truth in his heart.
And he is not deceitful with his tongue, neither does evil to his neighbor and does not accept a bribe against his neighbor.
And the quarrelsome are despised in his eyes and he honors the worshipers of LORD JEHOVAH; he swears to his neighbor and does not lie.
He does not give his money for interest neither takes a bribe against the innocent; the one who does these things is just and is never moved.
Keep me, God, because I have trusted upon you.
I have said to LORD JEHOVAH, "You are my Lord and my goodness is from your presence.”
Also for The Holy Ones who are in the Earth, and the glorious in whom is all my pleasure.
The sorrows of the rest will be multiplied quickly and I shall not pour their oblation of blood neither shall I remember their names on my lips.
LORD JEHOVAH, the portion of my inheritance and of my cup, you are returning my inheritance to me.
The cords have fallen to me with the best, also my inheritance pleases me.
I shall bless LORD JEHOVAH who counsels me and my kidneys teach me in the nights.
I have set LORD JEHOVAH in front of me at all times, and he has been at my right hand that I shall not move.
Because of this my heart rejoiced, and my glory exulted; also my flesh will dwell in tranquility
Because you have not left my soul in Sheol, neither have you given your Pure One to see destruction.
You will show me your path of life and I shall be full of the joy of your face and of the sweetness of the victory of your right hand.
Hear, LORD JEHOVAH, Holy One, and look at my request and give ear to my prayer which is not from deceitful lips.
My judgment will come forth from before you and your eyes will see integrity.
You have proven my heart and you visited me in the night and you have tested me and have not found evil in me and the works of the children of men have not passed my lips.
But in speech of the lips you have kept me from the ways of evil.
You have supported my goings in your paths that my steps would not slip.
I called you because you have answered me, God; incline your ear to me and hear my words.
And make your Pure One a wonder and The Savior of those who hope in you, from those who stand against your right hand.
Keep me like the pupil of the eye and in the shadow of your wings, hide me
From before these sinners who plunder and the enemies of my soul who are set against me.
Shut their mouths, for they have spoken boasting.
They praised me and now they have surrounded me; they have set their eyes to cast me down to the ground.
They are like a lion which seeks to tear apart and like a lion's whelp which sits in a secret place.
Arise, LORD JEHOVAH, in front of their faces, and bow them down; save my soul from the wicked and from the sword

And from the dead that die by your hands, LORD JEHOVAH, and from the dead of the pit, you will divide them among the living, and your treasure fills their belly; the children will be satisfied and they will leave the remainder to their children.
But I shall see your face in righteousness and I shall be satisfied when your faith is awakened.
I shall love you, LORD JEHOVAH, my power
And my trust, the house of my refuge, my Mighty Deliverer, God, The Mighty One, upon whom I trust, my helper and the horn of my salvation, the house of my glorious refuge.
I shall cry to LORD JEHOVAH and I shall be saved from my enemies.
Because the destructions of death surrounded me and the torrents of evil ones troubled me.
The destructions of Sheol surrounded me and the snares of death were before me.
In my suffering I cried to LORD JEHOVAH, and I cried to my God, and he heard my voice from his temple, and my shout came before him and entered his ears.
The Earth trembled and shook and the foundations of the mountains shook and were split, because he was furious against them.
Smoke went up in his wrath and fire from his face. He was inflamed and coals were kindled by him.
He bent Heaven and came down, and thick darkness was under his feet.
He rode upon Cherubim and flew; he flew upon the wings of the wind.
He set darkness for his refuge and his tabernacle around him, and darkness of waters in clouds of the air.
From the brightness of the tabernacle of his clouds he made hailstones and coals of fire.
And LORD JEHOVAH thundered in Heaven and The Highest gave his voice: hailstones and coals of fire.
He sent his arrows and scattered them; he increased his lightnings and he troubled them.
And the springs of water appeared, and the foundations of the world were revealed from your rebuke, LORD JEHOVAH, and from the breath of the Spirit of your wrath.
He sent from on high and he pulled me out; he took me out from many waters.
And he delivered me from my mighty enemies, and from those hating me who were stronger than I.
He went before me in the day of my adversity and has been to me, LORD JEHOVAH, The Savior.
And he brought me out to an expanse and delivered me, because he was pleased with me.
And LORD JEHOVAH rewarded me according to my righteousness, and according to the purity of my hands he repaid me.
Because I have kept the ways of LORD JEHOVAH, and I have not rebelled from my God.
Because all his judgments are before me and I have not put away his laws from me.
And I have been without blemish with him, and I have been on guard against my sins.
LORD JEHOVAH rewarded me according to my righteousness, according to the purity of my hands before his eyes.
With the pure one, you will be pure, and with the perfect one, you will be perfect.
With the Elect One you will be elect, and with the crooked you will be perverse.
Because you will save the poor people and you will humble the lofty eyes.
You will light my lamp, LORD JEHOVAH; my God will enlighten my darkness.
Because by you I shall run against a band of robbers, and by my God I shall leap over a wall
God, whose way is perfect; the word of LORD JEHOVAH is proven, and he is a helper to all who trust upon him.
Because there is no God outside of LORD JEHOVAH, and there is none strong like my God.
God who girds me in power and gives my perfect way.
He makes my feet like the hart and he sets me upon high places.
He teaches my hands to war and strengthens my arms like a brass bow.
You have given me a shield of salvation; your right hand will comfort me and your discipline will make me great.
You have made room for my steps under me that my ankles would not be moved.
I shall pursue my enemies and overtake them and I shall not return until I finish them off.
I shall assault them and they will not be able to stand and they will fall under my feet.
You have girded me with power in war, and you will make those who stand against me to bow under me.
And you will break my enemies in front of me and I shall silence those who hate me.
They will wail and there will be no savior for them; they will beg of LORD JEHOVAH and he will not answer them.
I shall pulverize them like the dust upon the face of the wind; like mud of the street I shall tread upon them.
You will deliver me from the judgments of the people and you will make me Leader to the nations; a people that I have not known will serve me.
When they hear they will listen to me; children of foreigners will submit themselves to me.
Children of foreigners will trust and will be impeded from their paths.
LORD JEHOVAH is living, and blessed is he who strengthens me; my God and my Savior is exalted!
God gives me vengeance and he subdued the peoples under me.
And he delivered me from my enemies, and from those who stand against me, he lifted me up, and you will deliver me from evil men.
Because of this, I shall confess you among the Gentiles, my Lord, and to your Name I shall sing praise.
The salvation of his King is magnificent; he performs grace to his Anointed, to David, and to his seed for eternity.
Heaven makes heard the glory of God and the firmament shows the work of his hands.
Day unto day pours forth speech; night unto night shows knowledge.
There is no speech nor words whose voice will not be heard.
Their Gospel went forth into all the Earth, and their words into the end of the world; in them he pitched his tabernacle for the sun.
And he is like a bridegroom who goes forth from the place of the bridal bed; he will leap for joy like a mighty man to run his course.
And from the ends of the Heavens he brings him out and makes him recline upon the ends of the Heavens, and nothing is hidden from his heat.
The law of LORD JEHOVAH is without blemish and converts the soul; the testimony of LORD JEHOVAH is trustworthy and makes infants wise.
The commandments of LORD JEHOVAH are right and give joy to the heart; the commandment of LORD JEHOVAH is precious and makes the eyes shine.
The awe of LORD JEHOVAH is pure and stands to eternity; the judgments of LORD JEHOVAH are in truth and are just in everything.
They are more desirable than gold and precious stones, and are sweeter than honey and the honeycomb.
Also your Servant will be warned by them; if he keeps them, he will be greatly rewarded.
Who understands offenses? Acquit me from secret sins.
Also spare your Servant from evil, lest the evil ones have dominion over me; then I shall be purged from my sins.
Let the words of my mouth be for your pleasure, and the meditation of my heart before you, LORD JEHOVAH, my helper and my Savior.
LORD JEHOVAH will answer you in a day of trouble, and The Name of the God of Jacob will help you.
He will send you help from his holy place and from Zion he will strengthen you.
LORD JEHOVAH will remember for you all your offerings and he will accept your burnt sacrifices.
LORD JEHOVAH will give you according to your heart and he will fulfill according to all your counsel.
And we will glory in your salvation, and in The Name of our God we will be lifted up. LORD JEHOVAH will perform all your pleasure.
Therefore it is known that God has saved his Anointed and answered him from the Heaven of his Holiness in the power of the salvation of his right hand.
These are in chariots and those on horses, and we will prevail in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH our God.
They bowed and they fell, and we stood and we are ready.
LORD JEHOVAH will save us and our King will answer us in the day that we call him.
LORD JEHOVAH, the King will rejoice in your power, and in your salvation he will greatly leap for joy.
You have given him the desire of his heart and you have not denied him the preparation of his lips.
Because the blessing of goodness went before him and you have set a precious crown upon his head.
He asked you for life and you have given him the length of days to an eternity of eternities.
His glory is great in your salvation; you have set glory and brightness upon him.
Because you have made him a blessing to an eternity of eternities and you have made him glad with the joy of your face.
Because the King hopes in LORD JEHOVAH, by the grace of The Highest he will not be moved.
Your hand will find all your enemies and your right hand will find those who hate you.
You will make them like a furnace of fire for the time of wrath.
You will destroy their fruit from the Earth and their seed from the children of men. LORD JEHOVAH will burn them in his wrath and fire will devour them.
Because they prayed evil against you and they have conceived a scheme and they were not able to do it.
Put a scar within them and establish your preparation against their faces.
Be lifted up, LORD JEHOVAH, in your might; we will sing and praise your heroism!
My God, my God, why have you left me and have removed from me my salvation in the words of my folly?
My God, I call you in the daytime, and you do not answer me, and in the night, and you will not stay with me.
You are holy and Israel sits in your glory.
My fathers hoped in you; they hoped in you and you delivered them.
They cried to you and they were saved; they hoped in you and they were not disappointed.
I am a worm and not a man; a reproach of the children of men and despised of the people.
All who saw me mocked at me; they shot out with her lips; they shook their heads:
He was confident in LORD JEHOVAH to save him, and let him set him free, if he delights in him.
Because you are my trust from birth and my hope from my mother's breasts.
I was cast upon you from birth and you are my God from my mother's womb.
Do not be far from me, because trouble is near, and there is no helper.
Many bulls have surrounded me and young bulls of Bayshan encircled me.
They opened their mouths against me like a lion that roars and plunders.
And I am poured out like waters and all my bones are pulled out of joint; my heart has been like wax and my bowels are rotted within me.
My power has dried up like the clay vessel of a Potter; my tongue is stuck to the roof of my palate, and you have cast me into the dust of death.
Because dogs surround me and the assembly of the evil have surrounded me; they have pierced my hands and my feet!
All of my bones wail & wail; they stare and look at me!
And they have divided my garments between them and they cast lots upon my clothes.
And you, LORD JEHOVAH, do not be far from me! God, my God, abide to help me!
And save my soul from the sword, and also my Only One from the hand of dogs!
Save me from the mouth of the lion and my humility from the horn of pride
That I may proclaim your Name to my brothers and praise you within the assembly!
Worshipers of LORD JEHOVAH, praise him, and all the seed of Jacob, honor him; worship him all the seed of Israel!
Because he did not mock nor despise the cry of the poor, neither did he turn his face from him; when he cried unto him, he heard him.
My praise is from before you in the great congregation; I shall fulfill my vows in front of his worshipers.
The poor will eat and will be satisfied, and those who seek him will praise LORD JEHOVAH, and their heart will live for eternity.
All the ends of the Earth will remember and will turn to LORD JEHOVAH, and all the generations of the nations will worship before him.
Because the kingdom is LORD JEHOVAH's and he is the Ruler over the nations.
All the hungry of the Earth will eat and will worship before LORD JEHOVAH, and all who go down to the dust will kneel before him; my soul lives for him.
The seed that will serve him will proclaim the generation of LORD JEHOVAH.
They will come and show his righteousness which LORD JEHOVAH has done to the people who are born.
LORD JEHOVAH will shepherd me and I shall lack nothing.
He will make me lie upon lush pastures and he will lead me by restful waters.
He brings back my soul, and leads me in the paths of truth because of your Name.
Even if I shall walk in the valleys of the shadows of death, I will not be afraid of evil, because you are with me; your rod and your staff, they comfort me,
You have prepared tables in front of me opposite my enemies; you have anointed my head with oil and my cup overflows as if it were alive.
Your kindness and your mercies pursue me all the days of my life, that I may dwell in the house of LORD JEHOVAH to the length of days.
The Earth is LORD JEHOVAH's in its fullness, the world and all its inhabitants.
For he set its foundations in the sea and it was prepared in the rivers.
Who shall ascend the mountain of LORD JEHOVAH and who will stand in his holy mountain?
He who purifies his hands and is chosen in his heart, and does not swear in his soul with lies nor swears with deceit.
This one shall receive blessing from LORD JEHOVAH and righteousness from God our Savior.
This is the generation which seeks and hopes for The Persona of your faces, God of Jacob!
Lift up your heads, oh gates! Be lifted up, oh Gates of eternity! The King of glory shall enter!
Who is this King of glory? LORD JEHOVAH, the powerful and the mighty man; LORD JEHOVAH, the mighty man and the warrior!
Lift up your heads, oh, Gates! Be lifted up, oh gates of eternity, that the King of glory may enter!
Who is this King of glory? LORD JEHOVAH of hosts, he is the venerable King to eternity!
To you, LORD JEHOVAH, I have lifted up my soul. The evil shall be ashamed of their nothingness.
My God, in you I have hoped; I shall not be ashamed, lest my enemies boast against me.
Neither shall any who hope in you be ashamed, the evil shall be ashamed of their nothingness.
Show me your way, LORD JEHOVAH, and teach me your paths.
Lead me in your truth and teach me, because you are my God, my Savior; I have waited for you every day.
Remember, LORD JEHOVAH, your mercies which are from eternity, and your favors.
And do not remember against me the foolishness of my youth, but according to the multitude of your mercies, let me be remembered because of your kindness, oh God!
Good and upright is LORD JEHOVAH, therefore he corrects sinners in the way.
And he leads the meek in judgment and teaches the poor his way.
All the ways of LORD JEHOVAH are grace and truth to those who keep his covenant and his testimony.
Pardon me from my evil, because of your Name, LORD JEHOVAH, for it is great!
Who is the man that is in awe of LORD JEHOVAH? He will teach him the way that he chooses.
His soul will lodge in grace and his seed will inherit the Earth.
The counsel of LORD JEHOVAH is upon his worshipers and he will teach them his covenant.
My eyes are always unto LORD JEHOVAH because he removes my feet from the net.
Return to me and show me mercy because I am alone and afflicted.
The griefs of my heart multiply; take me from my griefs!
See my oppression and my labor and forgive me all my sin!
See that my enemies have increased and the hatred of the evil ones who hate me.
Keep my soul and save me because I have hoped in you.
The perfect and the upright have joined me because I have waited for you.
Oh God, save Israel from all his oppressors!
Judge me, LORD JEHOVAH, because I have walked in my integrity. I have hoped in LORD JEHOVAH; I shall not move.
Prove me, LORD JEHOVAH, and test me, and examine my kidneys and my heart.
Because your compassions are before my eyes, I have walked in sweetness.
I have not sat with the evil, neither have I entered with fools.
I have hated the assembly of the evil, neither have I sat with the wicked.
I have washed my hands purely, and I have gone around your altar, LORD JEHOVAH.
For I have heard the voice of your glory and I shall tell all your wonders.
LORD JEHOVAH, I have loved the service of your house and the dwelling place of your glory.
Do not destroy me with the sinners, or my life with bloody men.
In whose hands is deceit and their right hand is full of bribes.
I have walked in my perfection; save me and have compassion upon me.
And my foot has stood in integrity and in the congregation I shall bless LORD JEHOVAH.
LORD JEHOVAH, my light and my salvation, of whom shall I be afraid? LORD JEHOVAH is the strength of my life; by whom am I shaken?
When the evil approached me to consume my flesh, my enemies and my haters stumbled together and fell.
If an army encamps against me, my heart is not afraid; if war shall rise against me, in this I am confident.

For one thing I have requested from LORD JEHOVAH and to him I pray, that I may dwell in the House of LORD JEHOVAH all the days of my life, to see the sweetness of LORD JEHOVAH and to order his temple.
Because he will hide me in his shelter in the day of evil; he will hide me in the shadow of his tabernacle and he shall lift me up upon a rock.
Now shall my head be lifted up over my enemies who are around me, and I shall offer in his tabernacle sacrifices of praise; I shall glorify and sing to LORD JEHOVAH.
Hear my voice, LORD JEHOVAH, when I call you; show mercy upon me and answer me.
My heart said to you: "My face seeks your face; be my helper LORD JEHOVAH!”
LORD JEHOVAH, do not turn your face from me and do not afflict your Servant in anger. You shall not cast me out, neither abandon me, my God and my Savior.
Because my father and mother abandoned me, and LORD JEHOVAH took me up.
Teach me your way, LORD JEHOVAH, and lead me in your straight paths.
And do not hand me over to my enemies, because false witnesses stood up against me and they have spoken evil.
But I have believed that I shall see the goodness of LORD JEHOVAH in the land of the living.
Hope in LORD JEHOVAH, and your hearts will be strengthened; hope in LORD JEHOVAH!
To you I cried, LORD JEHOVAH, my God; do not be silent to me, lest you be silent to me and I shall be handed over with those who go down to the pit.
Hear the voice of my prayer when I cry to you, and when I lift my hands to your holy temple.
Do not number me with the wicked, or with evil Servants who speak peace with their companions and have evil in their hearts.
Pay them according to their works and according to their evils.
Because they have not understood the deeds of LORD JEHOVAH or the work of his hands, he will overthrow them and will not build them up.
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH who has heard the voice of my prayer.
LORD JEHOVAH is my helper and my protector, for my heart is confident in him and my flesh flourishes, and with glory I shall praise him.
LORD JEHOVAH is the power of his people, the protector and the Savior of his Anointed One.
Save your people and bless your inheritance; shepherd them and lead them unto eternity.
Bring the offspring of rams to LORD JEHOVAH; bring to LORD JEHOVAH glory and honor.
Bring LORD JEHOVAH honor for his Name; worship LORD JEHOVAH in the court of his Holiness.
The voice of LORD JEHOVAH is upon the waters; the glorious God thundered: LORD JEHOVAH, upon the many waters.
The voice of LORD JEHOVAH is in power, and the voice of LORD JEHOVAH is in glory.
The voice of LORD JEHOVAH that breaks the cedars and LORD JEHOVAH shatters the cedars of Lebanon.
He makes them skip like calves, Lebanon and Senir like the children of a wild bull.
The voice of LORD JEHOVAH that cuts off the flame of fire.
The voice of LORD JEHOVAH that shakes the wilderness and LORD JEHOVAH shakes the wilderness of Qadesh.
And the voice of LORD JEHOVAH that shakes the bushes and uproots forests, and in his temple everyone says, "Glory!"
LORD JEHOVAH turns back the flood; LORD JEHOVAH sits King for eternity.
LORD JEHOVAH will give power to his people; LORD JEHOVAH will bless his people with peace.
I shall bless you, LORD JEHOVAH, for you have exalted me, and you have not gladdened my enemies against me.
LORD JEHOVAH, my God, I begged of you and you healed me
And you raised my soul up from Sheol, and you have saved me from those who go down to the pit.
Sing to LORD JEHOVAH, his Elect Ones, and give thanks for the remembrance of his Holiness.
Because rebuke is in his anger, and life is in his pleasure; at evening, weeping will spend the night, and in the morning, joy!
I said in my quietness, "I shall never be moved.”
God, in your pleasure you established power upon my glory, and you turned your face and I was shaken.
And I called you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I begged of you, my Lord:
What profit is there in my blood that I should descend to destruction? The dust does not give thanks to you, neither does it show your faithfulness.
Hear, God, and show mercy to me"; LORD JEHOVAH has been a helper to me!
For you turned my griefs into joy; you took off my sackcloth and you clothed me with joy!
Therefore I shall sing praise to you and I shall not be silent. LORD JEHOVAH, my God, I shall confess you for eternity!
I have hoped in you, LORD JEHOVAH; I shall never be disappointed; deliver me in your righteousness!
Incline your ear to me and answer me quickly; be a helper to me, Oh God, and the house of my refuge, and save me!
Because you are my strength and the house of my refuge, comfort me, LORD JEHOVAH, for your Name's sake!
And take me from this net they have hid for me, because you are my protector.
To you I have committed my spirit, and you have saved me, LORD JEHOVAH, God of truth!
You have hated those who observe empty worship, and I have hoped in you, LORD JEHOVAH.
I shall exult and rejoice in your kindness, for you have seen my affliction, and you have known the affliction of my soul.
And you have not delivered me into the hand of my enemies; you have set my feet in an expanse.
Show mercy upon me, LORD JEHOVAH, because I have grief; my eye is troubled with grief; my soul and my belly.
Because my life is consumed in misery and my years in sighings; my power is weakened in poverty and my bones are troubled.
I have been the reproach of all my enemies, to my neighbors, and a dread to those who know me, and those who see me in the street have been turning away from me.
I am forgotten, like one dead to the heart, and I have been like a lost item.
Because I heard the scheme of many when they counseled against me together and they conceived to take my life.
But I have trusted upon you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I have said, "You are my God, LORD JEHOVAH.”
And the times are in your hands; save me from my enemies and from those who persecute me.
Shine your face upon your Servant and save me in your kindness.
LORD JEHOVAH, I shall not be ashamed that I called you; the wicked shall be ashamed and they shall descend into Sheol.
And the lips of the evil shall be stopped, for they speak lies and insanity against the righteous.
How great is your kindness which you keep for your worshipers, for them that hope in you before the children of men!
You will hide them in the shelter of your presence; from the trouble of the children of men you will hide them from strife in your shadow.
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH who has chosen The Elect Ones for himself in the strong city.
I have said in my haste, "I am destroyed from before your eyes”, and you heard the voice of my prayer when I cried out to you.
Love LORD JEHOVAH, his righteous ones; LORD JEHOVAH keeps the faithful and he pays to the evil their works.
Be strong, and your hearts will be strengthened, all who hope in LORD JEHOVAH.
Blessed is he whose evil is forgiven him and his sins have been covered for him.
Blessed is the son of man whose sin LORD JEHOVAH will not account to him, and there is no deceit in his heart.
Because you have been silent, my bones are worn out, while I have been roaring all day.
Because night and day your hand has been heavy against me, and pain returned into my chest to kill me.
I confessed my sins to you and my crimes I have not hidden from you; I have said, "I shall confess to LORD JEHOVAH concerning my crimes”, and you forgave me all my sins.
Because of this, everyone whom you choose will pray to you in the acceptable time, but there will be a flood of many waters and they will not come near him.
You are my hiding place and you will protect me from my enemies; praise and salvation will surround me.
For I shall teach you; I shall make known to you the way in which to go and I shall set my eyes upon you.
You shall not be like a horse or like a mule which are not wise, which are tamed with a bit from their youth, and they do not go near it.
Many are the afflictions of the evil one, and grace will surround him who hopes in LORD JEHOVAH.
Rejoice, righteous ones, and be delighted in LORD JEHOVAH, and praise him, all the upright in heart.
Praise LORD JEHOVAH, righteous ones, and praise is fitting for the upright.
Give thanks to him with the harp, and on a guitar of ten strings, sing unto him.
Sing unto him a new song and sing and speak beautifully with the voice.
Because the answer of LORD JEHOVAH is upright and all his works are in faithfulness.
He loves righteousness and judgment; the grace of LORD JEHOVAH fills the Earth.
By The Word of LORD JEHOVAH the Heavens were made, and all his hosts by The Breath of his mouth.
He gathered the waters of the seas like water skins and set the deep in storehouses.
All the Earth will stand in awe of LORD JEHOVAH and all the inhabitants of the world will tremble from before him.
Because he spoke and they existed; he commanded and it was established.
LORD JEHOVAH nullifies the counsel of the nations; LORD JEHOVAH nullifies the strategies of the peoples.
The counsel of LORD JEHOVAH stands to eternity and the thought of his heart to a generation of generations.
Blessed are the people whose God is LORD JEHOVAH: the people whom he has chosen for himself for his inheritance.
LORD JEHOVAH looked out from Heaven and saw all the children of men
And from his seat he sees all the inhabitants of the Earth.
For he formed their heart as one and he discerns all their works.
A King is not saved by a multitude of an army, neither is a mighty man delivered by the multitude of his power.
The salvation of a horse is false, for he does not deliver his rider by the greatness of his strength.
The eyes of LORD JEHOVAH are upon the righteous who expect his kindness.
For he will deliver their souls from death and he will save them in a famine.
But our soul has expected LORD JEHOVAH, because he is our helper and our shield.
And it is in him that our heart will rejoice, for we hope in his holy Name.
Let your kindness be upon us, LORD JEHOVAH, even as we wait for you.
I shall bless LORD JEHOVAH in all times, and in all times shall his praises be in my mouth.
My soul will boast in LORD JEHOVAH; the poor will hear and they will rejoice.
Exalt LORD JEHOVAH with me; let us lift up his Name as one.
I have begged of LORD JEHOVAH and he answered me and saved me from all my troubles.
Gaze unto him and hope in him, and your faces will not be disappointed.
This is the poor one who called to him, and he heard him and saved him from all his afflictions.
The army of the Angels of LORD JEHOVAH surrounds his worshipers and delivers them.
Taste and see that LORD JEHOVAH is good, and blessed are all who trust upon him.
The rich have been made poor and they were hungry.
And those who seek LORD JEHOVAH will not lack any good thing.
Come, children, hear me, and I shall teach you the worship of God.
Who is the man who desires life and loves to see good days?
Keep your tongue from evil and your lips will not speak deceit.
Pass from evil and do good, seek peace and run after it.
The eyes of LORD JEHOVAH are upon the righteous ones, and his ears to hear them.
The face of LORD JEHOVAH is against the evil, to blot out their remembrance from the Earth.
The righteous ones cried out and LORD JEHOVAH heard them and delivered them.
LORD JEHOVAH is near to the broken hearted and he saves the meek in spirit.
Many are the afflictions of the righteous one, and LORD JEHOVAH delivers him from all of them.
And he will keep all his bones that not one of them will be broken.
Evil kills the wicked and those who hate the righteous will come to an end.
LORD JEHOVAH will redeem the souls of his Servants and none who hope in him will be condemned.
Judge my case, LORD JEHOVAH, and fight against those who fight against me.
Take arms and a shield and stand up for my help.
Draw out a sword and cause it to flash against my persecutors, and say to my soul, "I am your Savior.”
Those who seek my soul will be ashamed and they will be put to shame; they shall turn their behind and they shall be put to shame, those who plotted evil against me.
They shall be like dust before the wind, and the angel of LORD JEHOVAH will persecute them.
Their way will be dark and it will be in a slippery place and The Angel of God will persecute them.
Because they have hid snares for me and they have spread a net for my soul,
Let evil come against them suddenly, and the net that they have hid will take them and they will fall into the ditch which they have dug.
But my soul will exult in God and will delight in his salvation.
And all my bones will say, "LORD JEHOVAH, who is like you? For you deliver the afflicted from his enemy, and the poor and the afflicted from him who plunders him by force.
Evil witnesses stood up and they questioned me about something that I did not know.
They paid me evil for good and destroyed my life from among the children of men.
And I wore sackcloth in their sicknesses, and my soul was humbled by fasting and my prayer returned to my bosom.
I have walked as a friend and a brother, and as he who sits in mourning, I was saddened.
In my suffering they gathered and rejoiced over me, and they had gathered against me for a long time and I did not know it.
In their boasting and in their scorning, they gnashed against me with their teeth.
My Lord, they have lied and you have seen it; bring back my soul from their troubles and my only one from the lions.
I shall confess you in the great congregation and I shall sing to you among the many nations
For my enemies will not rejoice over me, nor the liars who hate me without cause, who wink with their eyes.
And they do not speak peace, and they conceive deceit against the meek of the Earth.
They opened their mouths against me and they said, "Aha! Aha! Our eyes have seen it"!
You have seen, oh, God, and do not be silent, my Lord, and do not be far from me!
Awake for my judgment, my God and my Lord, and see the defrauding of me.
Judge me according to your righteousness, LORD JEHOVAH, lest they rejoice over me.
Lest they say in their heart, "Our soul is contented, and we have buried him.”
Let them be ashamed and they shall be put to shame together; those who seek my affliction and those who magnify themselves against me will wear shame.
Those who seek my victory will praise and rejoice and they will say at all times, "Great is LORD JEHOVAH who is pleased in the peace of his Servant!"
My tongue will confess your righteousness and your praises every day!
The wicked conceives evil in his heart because the awesomeness of God is not before his eyes.
Because it is hateful in his eyes to forsake his sins and to hate them.
The answer of his mouth is disease and deceit and he does not want to do good.
He conceives disease upon his bed and walks in a way which is not beautiful that he may do evil.
LORD JEHOVAH in Heaven, your mercies and your faithfulness are unto the Heaven of Heavens!
And your righteousness is like the mountains, Oh God, and your judgments like the great abyss! You save the children of man and beast, LORD JEHOVAH!
How abundant are your compassions, oh, God! The children of men will be sheltered in the shadow of your wings.
And they will feed from the fatness of your house, and from your sweet torrent you will give them drink.
Because the fountain of life is with you and it is in your light that we see light.
Keep your mercies for those near you and your righteousness for the upright of heart.
Let not the violent foot come upon us and the hand of the wicked will not move us.
Because all workers of lies fall there and they are overthrown and unable to stand.
Do not emulate the wicked neither envy the workers of evil.
Because they dry up quickly like straw and they wither like green grass.
Hope in God and do good, dwell in the land and seek faithfulness.
Hope in LORD JEHOVAH and he will give you the requests of your heart.
Straighten your road in front of LORD JEHOVAH; hope in him and he will do it.
And he will bring forth your righteousness like a light and your judgments like the noon.
Beg of LORD JEHOVAH and pray before him, and do not envy a man who does evil and whose way prospers.
Rest from anger and rest from passion and do not envy the evildoer.
Because the wicked are destroyed and those who hope in LORD JEHOVAH inherit the Earth.
In a little time you seek the wicked and he is not, and you gaze into his place and he is not found.
And the poor inherit the Earth and enjoy abundant peace.
The wicked one rages against the righteous one and gnashes his teeth upon him.
And LORD JEHOVAH will laugh at him because he knows that his day is coming.
The wicked have drawn the sword and have bent the bow to kill the poor and the afflicted and those whose ways are upright.
Their sword will enter their heart and their bows will be broken.
A little that a righteous one has is better than the many possessions of the wicked
Because the arms of the wicked will be broken; LORD JEHOVAH supports the righteous.
LORD JEHOVAH knows the days of the perfect and their inheritance will be for eternity.
And they will not be ashamed in the evil time and in days of famine they will be satisfied.
Because the wicked perish and the fattened enemies of LORD JEHOVAH are finished and like smoke they disappear.
The wicked borrows and does not repay and the righteous shows mercy and gives.
Because the blessed of LORD JEHOVAH inherit the Earth and his cursed ones will come to an end.
The steps of a man are set in order before LORD JEHOVAH and his way is set in order.
For if he falls, he is not harmed, for LORD JEHOVAH holds his hand.
I have been young and I am old, and I have not seen a righteous one forsaken, neither his seed seeking bread.
But all the day he shows mercy and lends and his seed is blessed.
Pass from evil and do good; rest for eternity.
Because LORD JEHOVAH loves judgment and does not forsake his righteous ones, but keeps them for eternity, and the seed of the wicked he destroys.
And the righteous ones inherit the Earth and dwell upon it for eternity.
The mouth of the righteous attends to wisdom and his tongue speaks judgment.
The Torah of God is in his heart and his steps are unmoved.
The wicked lies in wait for the righteous and seeks to kill him.
And LORD JEHOVAH will not leave him in his hands neither will he condemn him in judgment.
Hope in LORD JEHOVAH and keep his way, and he will exalt you to inherit the Earth; when the wicked are destroyed, you will see it.
Because I have seen the wicked who are boasting and are lifted up like trees of the forest.
When I passed by, he was not, and I looked for him, and I did not find him.
Keep perfection and choose integrity, because there is a good end for men of peace.
Sinners will come to an end together, and the end of the wicked is for destruction.
LORD JEHOVAH is The Savior of the righteous; he is a helper for them in the time of trouble.
LORD JEHOVAH is a helper for them and delivers them; he delivers them from the wicked and saves them because they hope in him.
LORD JEHOVAH, do not rebuke me in your wrath, neither discipline me in your anger.
For your arrows have stuck in me and your hand has pressed against me.
And there is no peace for my flesh from before your anger, and there is no peace for my bones from before my sins.
For my crimes have passed above my head, and like heavy cargo, they are heavy for me.
My wounds defile me and rot me even from the presence of my crime.
I was very agitated and all day I have walked in sadness.
Because my ankles are filled with shaking and there is no peace for my flesh.
I shook and I was very saddened and I have been groaning from the moaning of my heart.
LORD JEHOVAH, all my desire is before you and my sighs are not hidden from you.
My heart is cast down and my power has left me, and the light of my eyes has not been with me.
My friends and my neighbors have stood before my sorrow and my relatives have been staying at a distance.
And those who seek my life and seek my affliction took me and have spoken lies and have been meditating deceit all day.
But I, like a deaf man, have not heard, and like a dumb man, I did not open my mouth.
I have been like a man who does not hear and there is no rebuke in his mouth.
Because I have waited for you, LORD JEHOVAH, and you have answered me, LORD JEHOVAH, my God.
Because I said, "Do not let them rejoice against me, and do not let them be exalted against me while my feet shake."
Because I am prepared for suffering and my sorrow is always before me.
For I shall declare to you my wrongdoing and I shall be purged from my sins.
My enemies have been strengthened and have seen and my lying haters have increased.
They have paid me evil for good and have regarded me with malice because I have sought good.
Do not abandon me, LORD JEHOVAH, my God, and do not be far from me.
But stay for my help and save me.
I have said that I would keep my way and that I would not sin with my tongue. I shall keep my mouth from evil because of the wicked who are before me.
I was dumb; I was sorrowful and grieved for what is good and my sorrow was agitated.
My heart is hot within me and fire is renewed in my body; I meditated with my tongue.
Show me, LORD JEHOVAH, my end, and the measure of my days, what it is, that I may know why I remain.
Behold, you have given me my days by a measure, and my delay is as nothing before you, because all the children of men abide as a vapor.
Because a man walks in an image and he fades away like a vapor; he lays down treasures and does not know for whom he gathered them.
Therefore, what is my hope, if not you alone, LORD JEHOVAH?
And save me from all my crimes and do not make me a reproach to the evil.
I am dumb, and I did not open my mouth, because you have done it.
Remove your scourges from me and the blows of your hands.
I am wasted by rebuke for the sake of my sins. You have chastened man, and you have put away his desires like stubble and all the children of men are like a vapor.
Hear my prayer and my request, LORD JEHOVAH, and give heed to my tears and do not be silent, because I am an inhabitant with you and a Pilgrim, like all my fathers.
Save me, and I shall rest, lest I depart and I shall be no more.
Hoping, I have hoped in LORD JEHOVAH, for he turned toward me and he heard my prayer.
And he brought me up from the pit of misery and from the mire of destruction; he set my feet upon a rock and he has made my ways ready.
He gave a new song by my mouth: glory to God! For many will see and will rejoice, and they will hope in LORD JEHOVAH.
Blessed is the son of man who trusts upon The Name of LORD JEHOVAH, and has not returned to futility, neither to lying speech.
Many are the wonders that you have done, LORD JEHOVAH, our God, and your thoughts concerning us, and there is none like you; I have shown and I have said, "They are beyond computation"!
With sacrifices and with offerings you have not been pleased, but you have pierced the ears for me; burnt peace offerings for sin you have not requested.
Then I said, " Behold, I have come, for in the first of The Writings it is written about me:"
To do your pleasure oh, God, I have desired, and your Law is within my belly.
I have preached your righteousness in the great congregation and I have not restrained my lips, LORD JEHOVAH, you do know.
For I have not hidden your righteousness within my heart but I have told your salvation and your faithfulness, and I have not hidden your kindness and your faithfulness from the great congregation.
And you, LORD JEHOVAH, do not you restrain from me your mercies, but let your mercies and your faithfulness keep me at all times.
Because evils without number surround me, and my sins have overtaken me and I was not able to see, and they have increased more than the hairs of my head, and my heart has forsaken me.
Be pleased, LORD JEHOVAH, to deliver me; oh, LORD JEHOVAH, stay to help me.
They shall be ashamed and put to shame, those who seek to kill my soul; they shall turn their behind and they shall be put to shame, those who seek my affliction!
Let them be ashamed of their shame repeatedly, those who have said against me, "Aha, aha!"
All who seek you will rejoice in you and those who love your salvation will say always, "Great is LORD JEHOVAH!"
And I am poor and afflicted, my Lord; they have plotted against me; You are my helper and my deliver; my God, do not delay!" Ps
Blessed is he who regards the poor, for in the day of evil, LORD JEHOVAH will set him free.
LORD JEHOVAH will keep him and will give him life, and will bless him in the Earth and will not hand him over to his enemies.
LORD JEHOVAH will sustain him upon the bed of his afflictions and will change all his bed in his sickness.
I have said, "You are my Lord; have mercy on me and heal my soul, because I have sinned against you.”
My enemies speak evil against me: "But when does he die and his Name perish?"
When they have come to see me, they have been speaking lies and planning evil in their heart; they have been going into the street and talking.
All who hated me whispered against me together and they have conceived evil against me.
They were meditating on a word of evil: "Now that he lies down, he will rise no more.”
Even a man invoking my peace, in whom I trusted, ate my bread, for I trusted in him; he was very treacherous against me.
And you, LORD JEHOVAH, show mercy upon me and raise me up, that I may repay them.
In this I have known that you are pleased with me, because my enemy does not harm me.
But you have supported me in my perfection, and you have established me before you for eternity.
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH, God of Israel, from eternity and unto eternity. Amen and amen!
Like a stag that bellows over the brook of waters, so also my soul bellows for you, LORD JEHOVAH!
My soul is thirsty for you, Living God! When shall I come and see your face, oh, God?
My tears have been food for me by day and by night, while they have been saying to me every day, "Where is your God?"
I remembered these things and my soul was troubled, therefore I shall enter into your strong shelter, unto the house of God; many rejoice with the voice of praise and thanksgiving!
Why are you troubled, my soul, and why have you perplexed me? Wait for God, because again I shall praise him, the Savior of my whole being, and my God.
My soul was troubled against me; therefore, I have remembered you from the land of Jordan and from Hermon and from Mount Zora.
The Deep to deep calls The Voice to the voice of the waters of your fountains. All your storms and your waves passed over me.
By day LORD JEHOVAH will command his mercies and his songs in the night; prayer is with me unto the living God.
I have said to God, "Why have you forgotten me, and why do I walk sadly in distress of my enemies?"
In the breaking of my bones, my enemies reproached me as they have been saying to me every day, "Where is your God?"
Why have you agitated me, my soul? And why have you perplexed me? Look for God, because I shall again praise him, The Savior of my entire being, and my God.
Judge my judgment, oh, God, and plead my plea from a people without mercy, and save me from evil men and deceivers
Because you are the God of my power and why have you forgotten me, and why do I walk sadly in distress of my enemies?
Send your light and your truth and comfort me, and they will bring me to your holy mountain and to your tent.
And I shall come to the altar of God, and to God who gladdens my youth. I shall praise you on the harp, oh, God, my God.
Why have you agitated me, my soul, and why have you perplexed me? Look for God, because I shall again praise him, The Savior of my entire being, and my God.
Oh God, we have heard with our ears, also our fathers related to us what you did in their days, in the former days:
Your hand destroyed Gentiles, and you planted them, and you afflicted kingdoms, and you established them
Because it was not by their sword that they inherited the land, neither their arms that saved them, but your right hand and your arm and the light of your face, for you were pleased with them.
You are God, my King, for you commanded concerning the salvation of Jacob.
By you we shall wound our enemies, and because of your Name we shall tread upon those who hate us.
Because we have not trusted upon our bows, neither upon our armor, to save us.
You have saved us from our haters and you have put our enemies to shame.
We glorify you every day, oh God, and we shall confess your Name to eternity!
Now you have forgotten us and you have shamed us and you do not go forth with our army.
But you have turned us back and our enemies have plundered us.
You have given us like sheep for food and you have scattered us among the Gentiles.
And you have sold your people without a price and you have made no gain by their exchange.
You have made us a reproach to our neighbors; a mockery and a laughingstock to those who are around us.
You have made us a proverb among the Gentiles and a shaking of the head among the peoples.
And all day my shame is in front of me and the shame of my face has covered me,
From the voice that reproaches and insults, and from before the enemy who avenges.
All these things were heaped up upon us and we have not forgotten you, neither have we dealt falsely in your covenant.
And we have not turned our back, neither have we turned our steps from your road.
Because you have humbled us in the place of dragons and you have covered us with the shadows of death.
And we do not forget The Name of our God, neither have we stretched our hands to foreign gods.
God searches into this, for he knows the purposes of the heart.
For your sake we are being killed every day, and we are accounted like lambs for slaughter.
Awake and do not sleep, LORD JEHOVAH! Remember us and do not forget us!
And do not turn your face from us, neither forget our humiliation and our afflictions!
Because our soul is humbled upon the dust and our belly has cleaved to the Earth.
Arise! Help us and save us because of your love!
My heart brings forth good accounts and tells the deeds of The King; my tongue is the pen of a ready Scribe,
Who is more beautiful in his appearance than the children of men; mercy has been poured upon your lips; because of this, God has blessed you to eternity.
Gird the sword upon your waist, Oh, Mighty Man, your Excellency and Your Honor,
And Your Honor is victorious. The Humility of Righteousness rides upon The Word of Truth: your Law, in the awesomeness of your right hand!
Your arrows are sharp and the nations will fall under you in the heart of the enemies of The King.
Your throne, oh God, is to the eternity of eternities. A straight scepter is the scepter of your kingdom.
You have loved righteousness and you have hated evil; because of this, oh, God, your God has anointed you with the oil of a joy greater than that of your companions.
Myrrh and Cassia and Storax make all your garments fragrant from The Excellent Temple, and from my presence they have gladdened you!
The daughter of The King stood in glory, and the Queen at your right hand in clothing of gold of Ophir.
Hear, my daughter, and see, and incline your ear, and forget your people and your father's house.
For the King will be ravished with your beauty; because he is your Lord, worship him.
And the daughter of Tsur shall worship him with offerings; your face will seek the rich of the people.
And all the glory of the King's daughter is from within; she has woven her clothing in fine gold.
She will go with offerings to the King and the virgins will bring her train after her.
And they will go in joy and in sweetness and they will enter the Temple of the King.
Instead of your fathers will be your sons; he has made them Rulers in all the Earth.
For your Name will be remembered in every generation, therefore the nations shall confess you to the eternity of eternities.
Our God is our strong house of refuge, and he is found to us our helper always in times of trouble.
Therefore we will not fear when the Earth quakes and the mountains quake in the heart of the seas.
Their waters shall be troubled and return and the mountains will be moved by his strength.
The streams of the rivers will rejoice in The City of our God: it is the holy place, the dwelling of The Highest.
God is within it; it will not shake. God will help it at daybreak.
The nations raged and the kingdoms moved, he raised his voice and the Earth shook.
LORD JEHOVAH of hosts is with us and our helper is the God of Jacob.
Come behold the works of God who does wonders in the Earth.
He stops wars from the ends of the Earth; he breaks the bows and breaks spears and burns chariots in fire.
Return and know that I AM GOD. I am exalted among the nations and I am exalted in the Earth.
LORD JEHOVAH of hosts is with us, and our helper is the God of Jacob.
Clap hands, all you peoples and sing to God in a voice of praise!
Because LORD JEHOVAH is exalted and awesome; he is The Great King over all the Earth.
For he has subdued for us the nations under us, and the peoples under our feet.
He has chosen us for his inheritance and the honor of Jacob whom he loved.
God went up in glory! LORD JEHOVAH with the sound of the trumpet!
Sing to God in glory! Sing to our King!
Because the King of the whole Earth is God! Sing praise to him!
God reigns over the nations. God sits upon his holy throne.
The Rulers of the nations were turned to the God of Abraham because the dominions of the Earth are God's, and he is greatly exalted.
Great is our Lord and greatly to be praised, in the city of our God and in his holy mountain.
And Mount Zion is a glorious joy in all the Earth, which is in the north slopes, the city of the great King.
God within her walls makes known his strength.
For behold, Kings were prepared and they passed by together
They saw, they marveled and shook,
And trembling seized them, and pains, as of labor.
With a mighty wind the ships of Tarshish will be broken.
As we have heard, so we have seen in the city of LORD JEHOVAH of hosts, in the city of our God; God shall establish it unto eternity.
We have proclaimed your kindness, oh God, within your temple.
As is your Name, oh God, so are your praises unto the ends of the Earth. Righteousness fills your right hand.
Mount Zion will rejoice and the daughters of Yehuda will be glad, because of your judgment, LORD JEHOVAH.
Surround Zion and go around it and count its towers.
Establish your hearts upon its power and pull down her palaces that you may tell the following generation.
For this is God, our God, for eternity, and to the eternity of eternities, and he will lead us beyond death.
Hear this, all you nations, and obey, all inhabitants of the Earth.
Children of Earth and the children of men together, the rich and the poor,
My mouth will speak wisdom and the meditation of my heart is intelligence.
I shall turn my ears to parables and I shall speak my riddles with the harp.
I will not fear in the evil days; the evil of my enemies surrounds me:
All who trust upon their power and are boasting in the abundance of their riches.
A brother does not save, and a man does not give God his redemption.
The salvation of their souls is precious; it labors for eternity,
That you shall live for the eternity of eternities and you shall not see destruction.
When you shall see the wise who die together with fools, and feeble minds who are perishing, and leave their possessions to others,
Their graves are their houses for eternity, and their dwelling for a generation of generations, and they read the names in the ground.
A man is not sustained in his honor, but ends up an animal, and resembles one.
This their way is a subversion to their souls, and in the end they will feed like sheep with their mouths.
They will be given up to Sheol and death will feed on them, and the upright will rule over them in the morning, and Sheol will consume their form and they shall be cast out from their glory.
God will redeem my soul and he will raise me up from the hand of Sheol.
Do not fear when a man is made rich and the honor of his house increases.
Because he will not take anything in his death, neither does his glory descend after him.
Because he blesses his soul in his life, he will acknowledge you when you bless him.
And you will bring him to the generation of his fathers; he will not see light until eternity.
A man who is in his honor is not sustained, but ends up an animal and resembles one.
The God of gods, LORD JEHOVAH, has spoken, and called the Earth from the risings of the sun and unto its settings.
From Zion God has shown a glorious crown.
God will come and will not be silent, and fire will devour before him and it will storm around him greatly.
He shall call Heaven from above and to the Earth, to judge his people.
Gather unto him his Elect Ones who establish his covenant by sacrifice!
Heaven will show his righteousness, because God is The Judge.
Hear, my people, and I shall speak to you, and Israel, I shall testify to you.
I am God, your God. I shall not rebuke you concerning your sacrifices, and your offerings are always before me.
I shall not take bulls from your house, neither goats from your fold.
Because all the animals of the wilderness are mine, and the cattle that are on the hills, and the bulls.
I know every bird of the sky and the animal of the wilderness is mine.
If I were hungry, I would not tell you, because the world in its fullness is mine.
I do not eat the flesh of calves or drink the blood of goats.
Offer thanksgiving to God and fulfill your vows to The Highest.
Call upon me in the day of trouble; I shall strengthen you and you will glorify me.
God says to the sinner, "What business do you have with The Books of my Commandments, that you have taken my Covenant in your mouth?"
But you have hated my instruction and you have cast my words behind you.
If you have seen a thief, you have run with him and you have put your lot with the adulterer.
Your mouth has spoken wickedness and your tongue speaks deceit.
You have been sitting and plotting against your brother; you have been mocking against the son of your mother.
You have done all these things and I have been silent to you; you had hoped that I would be evil like you, but I shall rebuke you and I shall set them in order before your eyes.
Understand this, those who forget God, lest you be crushed and there is no one to deliver.
He who offers thanksgiving is he who will glorify me; there I shall show him the way of the salvation of our God.
Show mercy upon me, oh God, according to your kindness, and according to the multitude of your mercies, blot out my sins!
Wash me completely from my evil, and purge me from my sins.
Because I know my crimes and my sins are always in front of me.
To you alone I have sinned and have committed wickedness before you, because you shall be just in your word and you shall conquer in your judgment.
Because in evil I was formed in the womb and in sin my mother conceived me.
But you have desired the truth and you have shown me the hidden things of your wisdom.
Sprinkle me with hyssop and I am pure; wash me in it and I shall be whiter than snow.
Satisfy me in your sweetness and your joy and my humble bones will rejoice.
Turn your face from my sins and erase all my crimes.
Create in me a pure heart, oh, God, and renew your right Spirit within me.
Do not cast me out from before you and do not take your Holy Spirit from me.
But return your sweetness to me and your salvation and your glorious Spirit will hold me.
For I shall teach the evil your road and sinners will turn to you.
Save me from blood, my God, God of my salvation, and my tongue will praise your righteousness!
LORD JEHOVAH, open my lips for me, and my mouth will sing your glory.
Because you have not desired sacrifices, neither have you chosen burnt offerings.
The sacrifices of God are a humble spirit; God does not reject a broken heart.
Do good in your pleasure to Zion and build the walls of Jerusalem.
Then you will be pleased with the sacrifices of righteousness and with burnt offerings; then they will offer bulls upon your altar.
Why do you boast in evil, oh, mighty man, and against the innocent every day?
Your tongue conceives evil and, like a sharpened razor, you have worked deceit.
You have loved evil more than good, and lying more than speaking righteousness.
You have loved all evil speaking and deceitful tongues.
Because of this, God will root you out and will overthrow you for eternity from your dwelling, and he will root you out of the land of the living.
For the righteous will see and will rejoice and they will hope in LORD JEHOVAH.
And we shall say, "This is the man who did not make God his trust but trusted upon the multitude of his wealth and is lifted up by his possessions.”
And I, like a glorious olive tree in the house of God, have hoped in the grace of God for eternity and to the eternity of eternities.
I shall confess to you for eternity what you have done, and I shall proclaim your Name to a generation of generations before your righteous ones.
The evil one has said in his heart, "There is no God.” They are corrupted and they are defiled in their evil and there is none doing good.
God looked out from Heaven upon the children of men to see if any was intelligent and did seek God.
All of them have gone astray together and are corrupted, and they have been rejected.
And none of the workers of evil have known, who have been consuming my people as the food of bread, and they have not called upon God, and none is doing good, not even one.
There they feared a fear where there was no fear, because God would scatter the bones of those who are pleasing the children of men. They were ashamed because God despised them.
Who will give salvation to Israel from Zion? When LORD JEHOVAH returns the captivity of his people, Jacob will leap for joy and Israel will rejoice!
God, save me by your Name and judge me by your power!
God, hear my prayer and given ear to these the words of my mouth.
Because foreigners stood up against me and the mighty have sought my soul and have not considered you, oh, God!
God is my helper; LORD JEHOVAH sustains my soul.
Bring evil upon my enemies and stop them by your truth.
And I shall sacrifice separately to you and I shall praise your Name, LORD JEHOVAH, because it is good.
For you have delivered me from all troubles and my eye has perceived my enemy.
Give ear to my prayer, oh God, and do not reject my prayer.
Hear me and answer me and turn to my crying and hear me
Because of my enemies and because of the affliction of the evil, because the evil have prayed against me and they regarded me with malice!
And awe has fallen upon me,
And the shadows of death covered me!
But I said, "Who would give me wings like a dove?" I had flown and I would have rested.
And I had gone far away; I had flown and dwelt in the wilderness.
And I had waited for him who delivers me from the wind of hurricanes.
LORD JEHOVAH, drown the conversation of their tongues, for I have seen fighting and judgment in the city.
By day and by night they go around its walls.
Evil, lies and deceit are within it and fraud and deceit do not depart from its streets.
For it was not my enemy reproaching me, which I may endure, neither one hating me who was lifted up against me, that I would hide from him.
For it is you, a man like me, my neighbor and my friend.
For we ate a meal together in the house of God as we were walking in agreement.
Bring the plague upon them and they shall descend alive to Sheol because evil is within them.
But I shall call unto God and God will save me.
At evening, at dawn and at noon I shall meditate and speak and make my voice heard.
Save my soul from those who are my wise ones, because they have been in contention with me.
God will hear and will humble them, he who is from before the ages; there is no substitute for them and they were not afraid of God.
They stretched forth a hand against his companion and they smeared his covenant
They were troubled by the passion of his Person and by the anger of his heart; his words were softer than oil and effective as spearheads.
Cast your cares upon LORD JEHOVAH and he will support you, and he will never give terror to his righteous ones.
But you, God, have sent them down to the pit of destruction: men, shedders of blood and deceitful deceivers, and they shall not fulfill their days and I shall trust in you.
Show mercy upon me, God, because man has trodden upon me, and all day the warrior has persecuted me, because a multitude of warriors has risen up against me.
My enemies have trodden upon me all day.
In the daytime I will not be afraid, because it is upon you I trust.
In God I shall triumph; in God I have hoped; I will not be afraid what a man does to me.
All day they have been conspiring against me and they have been plotting evil against me.
They will lie in wait and they will stay and they will watch my steps as they lay wait for my life.
And they said, "There is no Savior for him.” Judge them in the wrath of the nations, oh, God!
I have shown you my confession; put my tears before you and in your book.
Then my enemies shall turn their back and I shall know that God is for me.
I shall praise the word of God!
In God I trust. I will not fear what a man does to me.
To you, oh God, I shall fulfill my vows, and I shall offer thanksgiving to you.
Because you have delivered my soul from death and my feet from slipping, that I may be pleasing before you, God, in the land of the living.
Show mercy upon me, God, because it is in you that my soul hopes, and in the shadow of your wings I shall have refuge until trouble passes.
I shall call to God, The Highest, and to God my Savior.
For he sent from Heaven and he saved me and he has reproached my enemies. God sent his grace and his truth.
And he saved my soul from the dogs and I slept as I was troubled. The teeth of the children of men are spears and arrows and their tongue like a sharp sword.
God is exalted above Heaven and your honor is over all the Earth.
They prepared a net for my feet and they have dug a ditch for my soul and they fell into it.
My heart is ready, oh, God, my heart is ready; I shall praise and sing in my honor.
Awake my harp! Awake psaltery and harp, and I shall awake at dawn!
I shall confess to you among the nations, oh, God; I shall sing to your Name among the peoples
Because your kindness is exalted unto Heaven and your faithfulness unto the roof of Heaven!
God, be exalted above Heaven, and let your honor be above all the Earth!
Whether truly you are speaking righteousness and integrity, you judge, oh, children of men!
Behold, you all speak evil in the Earth, and your hands are defiled with evil.
The evil are set apart from the belly and have gone astray from the womb, speaking lies.
Their venom is like a snake's or that of a cockatrice, or like a deaf asp that covers its ears.
That will not hear the voice of the charmer or conjurer or of a wise man.
God will shatter their teeth in their mouths and LORD JEHOVAH pulls out the fangs of the Lions.
They will be rejected like waters that are thrown out and he will shoot his arrows until they are finished.
Like wax that is melted and falls before the fire, they will be destroyed; the fire has fallen and they have not seen neither have they perceived the sun.
Let their thorns be brambles and let wrath trouble them.
The Righteous One will rejoice, who sees the vengeance, and he will wash his hands in the blood of the wicked.
A son of man shall say, "There is truly a reward for the righteous; it is God who shall judge them in the Earth.” Ps
Save me from my enemies, oh, God, and from those who stand against me, lift me up.
