Save me from workers of lies and save me from men who shed blood.
Because they lay in wait for my soul and their evils prevailed against me, not by my crimes, and not by my sins, my Lord.
That it is not by my foolishness they have run against me and were prepared against me, awake and see!
You are LORD JEHOVAH, God of hosts, God of Israel; awake and order all the nations and do not forgive any evil ones!
They shall be turned back in the evening and they will growl like dogs and will surround the city.
The speech of their mouths is a sword in their lips and they say, "Who hears?"
And you, LORD JEHOVAH, laugh at them, and mock at all the nations.
God, I shall praise you, because you are the place of my refuge, oh, God!
God, your kindness will go before me; God will avenge me of my enemies.
Do not kill them, lest my people forget, but shake them by your power and chase them LORD JEHOVAH, my trust.
The sin of their mouths speaks; their lips rejoice in their boasting because they tell a curse and lies.
Destroy them in your wrath; destroy them and they will not be found, that they may know that God is the Ruler over Jacob and over the ends of the Earth.
They shall be turned back in the evening and they will growl like dogs and will surround the city.
They will beg to eat and will not be satisfied and they will not spend the night.
And I shall praise your power and I shall praise your kindness at dawn, because you have been a place of refuge to me and a Savior in the day of affliction!
Oh God, I shall sing to you, because you are the God of the house of my refuge, and the God of my grace!
God, you have forgotten us, and you have driven us out and you have been provoked with us!
You have shaken the Earth and you have opened it, breaching its breaks, therefore it is weakened.
You have shown your people hardships and you have made them drink foul wine.
You have given your worshipers a sign that they will not flee from before your archer.
So that your beloved ones will be equipped, save me by your right hand and answer me.
God has spoken in his Holiness: "I shall be strong; I shall divide Shechem and I shall measure the valley of Succoth.”
Gilead is mine; Menasheh is mine; Ephraim, the champion of Captains; Yehuda my King.
Moab, the washing of my feet; over Edom I shall take off my shoes, and I shall shout against Palestine.
Who is going to lead me unto Edom and who will escort me to the mighty city?
Behold, oh God, you have forgotten us and you do not go forth with our armies!
Give us help against our enemies, because the salvation of man is false.
(Peshitta mss. lack this verse. See 108:13 however, which has the Hebrew reading of this verse.)
Oh God, hear my prayer and give ear to my prayer!
From the ends of the Earth I call to you! In the agitation of my heart you have raised me up upon a rock and you have comforted me,
Because you have been for me a house of refuge and a high tower in front of my enemies.
For I shall dwell in your tent for eternities and I shall have refuge in the shadow of your wings.
Because you, oh, God, have heard my vows, and you have given an inheritance to those who worship your Name.
And you have added days upon the days of the King, and his years to the generation of generations as an inheritance
That grace and truth, which will keep him, may be established before God to eternity.
So I shall praise your Name to the eternity of eternities as I fulfill my vows from day to day.
My soul waits for God, from whom is my salvation.
He is my God and my Savior, and the great place of my refuge, so that I shall not be moved.
How long will you be provoked by a man that you would kill, like a fallen wall or like an abandoned hedge?
But they also thought to cast him out from his honor and they have run with lies; they bless with their mouths and they curse with their heart.
My soul looks for God, from whom is my salvation.
And he is my God and my Savior, and the place of my refuge, that I shall not move.
My salvation is in God, and God is my honor, my foundation, my helper and my hope.
Hope in him at every hour, oh, people, and pour out your hearts before him, because God is our refuge.
And all the false children of men are like a vapor who are placed in a balance, and together they are worthless.
Do not trust upon oppression or rape. Do not love property when it has increased; let not your hearts rejoice in it.
For God said this once, and twice I have heard these things: "For strength is of God."
And you, LORD JEHOVAH, have grace, because you reward a man according to his works.
My God, you are my God, and I shall wait for you; my soul is thirsty for you, and my flesh looks for you like thirsty and troubled land that seeks water
As I have gazed upon you in the truth, that I may see your might and your honor
Because your mercies are better than life, and my lips shall praise you.
So I shall bless you in my life, and in your Name I shall lift up my hands.
As by fat and as by oil, my soul will grow fat, and with the lips of praise my mouth will praise you.
I have remembered you upon my bed, and in the nights I meditated upon you
Because you have been a helper to me and in the shadow of your wings I shall triumph!
My soul is gone forth after you and your right hand has rested upon me.
They have sought to destroy my soul; they will enter into the lower parts of the Earth.
They are given up to the sword and they shall be food for foxes.
And the King will rejoice in God and all who swear by him will boast, because the mouths of liars will be stopped up.
Hear my voice, oh, God, when I have made supplication to you, and keep me from the fear of my enemies.
Hide me from the evil of the evil one, and from the way of life of evildoers.
They sharpened their tongue like a sword, and their words like an arrow
To shoot in a secret place at the perfect one; suddenly they will shoot at him and they will not be seen.
And their evil words prevailed, and they have conceived to bury snares and they said, "Who sees us?"
They have conceived evils and they are consumed with searching evil from within a man, and from within the depths of his heart.
God will rise up and will shoot an arrow at them suddenly.
Their tongues will become diseased and all who see them will be afraid.
And all the children of men will be afraid and they will show the works of God, and they will consider the work of his hands.
The righteous ones will rejoice in LORD JEHOVAH, and they will trust upon him, and all the upright of heart will glorify him.
Praise is fitting for you, oh, God, in Zion, and to you a vow is paid.
Hear my prayer; everybody will come to you!
The words of the evil are stronger than I; you will cover my sins.
Blessed is he with whom you are pleased, and you bring him near to dwell in your dwelling, and he will be satisfied by the goodness of your house and by the holiness of your temple.
And from your awesome righteousness answer me, oh, God, our Savior, the hope of all the ends of the Earth and of the distant peoples.
He establishes the mountains by his power and is strong in his manliness.
He stops the storms of the seas and the sound of their waves; the nations shall be troubled.
And the inhabitants of the Earth will stand in awe of your signs, and of the goings forth of the dawn and the evening in glory.
You have remembered the Earth; you calmed it and you enriched it with abundance. The streams of God are full of waters; you have prepared their food when you established it.
You have watered its plowed fields to multiply its fruit; with gentle showers you will give increase and you will bless its growth.
Bless the crown of the year with your kindness and your calves will be filled with sprouting grass
And they will be satisfied from the pastures of the wilderness and the hills will be girded in glory
And they will wear the fat of sheep, and the vales will be filled with grain and they will rejoice and sing praise.
Praise God, all the Earth!
Sing the honor of his Name! Sing the honor of his glory!
Say to God, "How awesome are your works! By the greatness of your might your enemies will be enlisted for you."
In all the Earth they will worship you and they will sing to you and will glorify your Name for eternity.
And they will say, "Come, behold the works of God who multiplies his wonders upon the children of men!"
For he turned the sea to dry land and they crossed the river on foot; there we shall rejoice in him.
The eyes of him who rules in his manliness to eternity behold among the nations, and rebels will not be exalted forever.
Bless God, oh peoples, and make the voice of his praise heard,
Who sets our soul in life and does not give our feet unto shaking!
For you have tried us, God, and you have proved us like silver is tried.
You brought us into the net and you have appointed affliction to our loins.
You have made a man to ride over our head; you have brought us into fire and into water, and you have brought us out unto an expanse.
I shall go to your house in honor and I shall pay my vow:
That which opened my lips in a speech of my mouth in trouble.
I shall offer burnings of fat to you; I shall offer to you with the savor of rams and I shall offer bulls and goats.
Come, hear, and I shall tell you all the works of God, that which he has done for my soul.
With my mouth I called him and he answered me and I extolled him with my tongue:
If you have seen evil in my heart, you will not save me, LORD JEHOVAH.
Then God heard the voice of my prayer.
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH, who has not turned away my prayer or his grace from me!
Our God will show mercy upon us; he will bless us and shine his face upon us,
To make known his way in the Earth and his salvation in all the nations.
The nations shall confess you, oh God; all the nations shall confess you!
The kingdoms shall rejoice and shall sing praise, for you judge the nations justly, and you govern the kingdoms in the Earth!
The nations shall confess you, oh God, all the nations shall confess you!
Earth has given its fruit; God, our God, shall bless us.
God shall bless us, and all the ends of the Earth shall be in awe of him!
Let God arise and let all his enemies be scattered and his haters will flee from before him.
And they will vanish like smoke vanishes, and as wax is melted before fire, the wicked shall be destroyed from before God.
And the righteous will rejoice; they will be strengthened before God and they will rejoice in his sweetness.
Sing to God and praise his name! Praise him who rides to the West. LORD JEHOVAH is his name. Be courageous before him
Who is the father of the orphans and the judge of widows; God in his holy dwelling!
God sets the only child in a house and he sends out prisoners into prosperity, and the rebels will dwell in the tombs.
God, when you went forth before your people when you passed through in the deserts,
The Earth shook and the Heavens dropped from before God; this Mount Sinai from before God, the God of Israel!
You have given rain willingly, oh God, to your inheritance, for it was weakened and you have strengthened it.
And your living creatures dwell in it; you have strengthened the afflicted by your grace, oh God!
LORD JEHOVAH will give the word of the Gospel in great power!
Kings of armies will assemble and the favored ones of your house will divide the spoil
If you sleep between sharpened stakes: wings of The Dove overlaid in silver and its feathers in refined gold.
When God set apart a King to himself, it became white as snow in Salmon.
The mountain of God, the mountains of Bayshan, the ridged mountains and mountains of Bayshan.
What do you seek in the ridged mountains? The mountain that God has chosen for himself to dwell in, LORD JEHOVAH will dwell in it to eternity.
God rides in ten thousands and thousands of hosts, LORD JEHOVAH among them of Sinai in his Holiness.
You have ascended on high and you have captured captivity and you have given gifts to the children of men and rebels will not dwell before God.
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH every day, for God our Savior has chosen us as his inheritance; God is delivering us.
LORD JEHOVAH is God; Lord of death is The Exodus.
But God will cut off the head of his enemies and the hairy scalp of those who walk in their sins.
LORD JEHOVAH said, "From among the peaks I shall bring forth and I shall lead from the depths of the sea.”
Because you will dip your foot and the tongue of your dogs in the blood of your enemies.
They have seen your goings, oh, God, the steps of my God and my Holy King.
Princes went before; after were the singers among the young girls striking on tambourines.
And in the assemblies bless LORD JEHOVAH, the God who is the springs of Israel.
There is little Benjamin in silence, the Princes of Yehuda and their Rulers, the Princes of Zebulon and the Princes of Naphtali.
Command your might, oh, God, and strengthen, oh, God, this that you have prepared for us.
From your temple in Jerusalem Kings will bring offerings to you.
Rebuke the beasts of the rushes, the assembly of cattle and calves of the Gentiles which are overlaid in silver; scatter the peoples who seek war.
Ambassadors will come from Egypt and Cush will yield the hand to God.
The kingdoms of the Earth sing praises to God; sing praises to LORD JEHOVAH!
For he rides in the Heaven of Heavens; from the East he gives his voice, a strong voice.
Give glory to God, even Israel, the magnificence of his strength in the Heaven of Heavens!
You are awesome, oh God, from your holy place! The God of Israel will give power and strength to his people. Blessed is God!
Save me, oh, God, because the waters have come unto the soul.
I have sunk into a deep abyss and there was no place to stand in it; I entered the depth of waters and a whirlpool sank me.
I am weary by my crying and my throat is dry; my eyes are bereaved as I wait for my God.
My enemies who are without a cause are more than the hairs of my head and they are harder than my bones; I have returned that which I did not defraud to my lying enemies.
God, you know my crimes and my sins have not been hidden from you.
Those who hope in you will not be ashamed of me, oh, LORD JEHOVAH, God of hosts, and those who seek you, oh God of Israel, shall not be ashamed of me!
For your sake I have borne reproach and shame has covered my face.
I have been a stranger to my brothers and a foreigner to the children of my mother.
Because the zeal of your house has consumed me and the reproach of those who reproach you has fallen upon me.
My soul is humbled by fasting and I have been a reproach to them.
I have made my clothes sackcloth and I have been a proverb to them.
Those who sit in the gate have schemed against me, and those who drink liquor have plotted against me.
And I have prayed before you, LORD JEHOVAH, in an acceptable time; oh God, in the abundance of your grace answer me, and in the abundance of your salvation.
Save me from the mud, that I will not drown, and I shall be saved from my haters and from the deep waters.
So that a whirlpool of waters will not sink me neither the mire swallow me, nor a well shut its mouth upon me.
Answer me, LORD JEHOVAH, because your grace is good, and in the multitude of your mercies return to me.
Do not turn your face from your Servant; because I have adversity, answer me quickly!
Bring my soul to your salvation; save me because of my enemies!
You know my reproach, and my shame is before all my enemies.
Heal the breaking of my heart and bind it up; I have waited for one to grieve for it, and there is none, and for a comforter, and I have not found one.
They put bitter herbs in my food and for my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink.
Let their table be a snare before them, and their reward a stumbling block.
Their eyes will be darkened that they will not see and their back will always be stooped.
Pour out your wrath upon them and let the heat of your wrath tread upon them.
Let their dwelling place be desolate and let there be no inhabitant in their tents.
Because they have persecuted the one whom you have stricken, and they added to the sorrow of one who is put to death.
Place evil upon their evil that they will not enter your righteousness.
Let them be blotted out from your Book of Life and let them not be written with your righteous ones.
And I am poor and suffering; your salvation oh, God, will help me.
I shall praise The Name of God in song and I shall magnify him with thanksgiving.
I shall please LORD JEHOVAH more than fattened bulls, horned and hooved.
See, poor ones, and rejoice, and your hearts will live.
Because LORD JEHOVAH hears the poor and does not despise his prisoners.
Heaven and Earth will glorify him, and the seas and everything that swarms in them.
Because God saves Zion and builds the cities of Yehuda, for his Servants will dwell in it.
And the lovers of his Name will dwell in it.
God, save me! LORD JEHOVAH, stay for my help!
Those who seek my soul shall be ashamed and put to shame and they who seek my harm shall turn their behind and shall be put to shame.
They will be ashamed in the repetition of their disgrace who say against me, "Aha, aha!"
All who seek you will rejoice in you and those who love your salvation will always say, "God is great!"
And I am poor and afflicted, oh, God, stay with me; you are my helper and my deliverer; my God, do not delay!
In you, LORD JEHOVAH, I have hope; I shall never be ashamed.
Save me by your righteousness; incline your ear to me and save me.
Be my dwelling place that I may enter it always, and command to save me, because you are the house of my refuge and my fortress.
God, save me from the hand of the wicked and from the evil hand of The Evil One.
Because you are my hope, LORD JEHOVAH, oh, God, my trust from my youth.
For I have been sustained upon you from the womb and from the bowels of my mother you are my trust; I am always praising you.
I have been a wonder to many, for you are my strong confidence.
Let my mouth be filled with your song, and with your greatness all day.
Do not cast me off at the time of old age; when my power fails, do not leave me
Because my enemies speak against me and those who watched my soul counselled against me together.
And they said, "God has forsaken him; pursue him and take him because he has no Savior."
Oh God, do not be far from me! Oh God, stay for my help!
Those who shut up my soul shall be ashamed and shall be put to shame. Let those who seek my affliction be clothed in shame.
But I shall pray always and I shall magnify concerning your glory.
My mouth will proclaim your righteousness, and your praise all the day, because I have not known book writing.
I shall enter into the manliness of LORD JEHOVAH, and I shall mention your righteousness, I alone!
God is my teacher from my youth, and when shall I show your wonders?
Leave me not to old age and seniority until I show your arm and your power to the coming generation!
And your righteousness, oh God, is unto The Highest Place, and the great things that you have done! Who is like you?
You have shown me great trouble and evil and you have returned and you have saved me, and even from the depths of the Earth you will return; you will raise me up!
You have increased my greatness and you have returned and you have comforted me.
I also shall praise you with the harp and I shall sing your truth; oh God, I shall sing praise to you with the harp, Holy One of Israel!
And my lips will glory when I shall sing praise to you, and my soul which you have saved.
And my tongue will confess your righteousness all day, because those who seek my affliction will be ashamed and they will be disgraced.
God, give your judgment to the King and your righteousness to the King's son
That he shall judge your people in righteousness and your poor ones in judgment.
The mountains will bring peace to your people, and the hill of your righteousness.
For he will judge the poor of the people and he will save the afflicted children and abase the oppressors.
They shall revere you with the sun and before the moon to a generation of generations.
He will descend like rain upon the grass and like gentle showers that descend upon the Earth.
The righteous shall spring up in his days and the abundance of peace until the moon passes away.
He shall rule from sea to sea and from the rivers unto the ends of the Earth.
The islands shall bow before him and his enemies will lick up the dust.
Kings of Tarshish and of the islands will bring him offerings; the Kings of Sheba and of Seba shall bring him offerings.
All the Kings of the Earth will worship him and all the nations shall serve him.
Because he delivers the afflicted from him who is stronger than he, and the poor who has no helper.
He shows pity upon the poor and upon the afflicted and he saves the souls of the poor.
He redeems their souls from fraud and from evil; their blood is precious in his eyes.
He shall live and gold of Sheba will be given to him and we shall turn to him always, and they shall bless him all day.
He shall be like the abundance of grain in the Earth and its fruit will spring up in the top of the mountains like Lebanon and they will sprout from the city like the grass of the Earth.
And his Name shall be blessed to eternity and his Name is before the sun; all the nations will be blessed in him and they all will glorify him.
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH, God of Israel, who alone does great wonders!
And blessed is his honorable name to eternity! Let his honor fill all the Earth! Amen and amen!

(The Peshitta mss. lack this verse: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended. Jesus attributed Psalm 110 to David, so it would appear that the prayers of David continued after Psalm 72.Many later Psalms are attributed to David.)
God is good to Israel and to those in a natural state of heart.
And I had almost declined with my feet and my steps would have been outcast as nothing!
Because I envied the evil when I saw that the wicked had peace.
Because there is no expectation of their death and their madness is great.
They are not in the toil of men neither are they taken aside with the sons of men.
Because of this, contempt has seized them and their evil is covered and their wickedness.
And their evil comes through like grease and they have done according to the thought of the heart.
They have conceived and have spoken evil and oppression; they have spoken against The Highest.
They set their mouths in the sky and their tongue walks in the dirt.
Therefore my people will return here and they will find for themselves abundantly.
And they will say, "How does God know?", and "Is there knowledge in The Highest?"
Behold, these wicked ones are prosperous in the world and are strong in power.
And I alone have purified my heart and have washed my hands in purity.
I have had the plague all day and my reproof in the morning.
If I said, "I shall do as they”,
It is evil in my eyes.
Until I would enter the holy place of God and would discern their end:
You will appoint for them according to their foolishness and you will cast them down when they are exalted.
How suddenly they have ended in insensibility and they are finished by tumult!
It is like waking up when seeing a dream; LORD JEHOVAH, at cock crow you will despise their image.
And I am troubled; my heart and my kidneys rage against me.
And I have been simple and ignorant and I have been a beast with you.
Comfort me in your counsel and lead me after your honor.
Whom do I have in Heaven with you and whom have I desired in the Earth? For you have held my right hand.
My heart and my flesh fail; the strength of my heart and my portion is in God for eternity.
For behold, your distant ones shall be destroyed and you shall destroy all who go astray from you for eternity.
I have desired to draw near to God; your Name is good to me, LORD JEHOVAH, my trust, that I may tell all your wonders.
[Verse text missing in source]
God, why have you forgotten me forever and have hardened your wrath against the sheep of your pasture?
Remember your congregation which you have possessed from the first, and you have saved the tribe of your inheritance, this Mount Zion in which you have dwelt.
Lift your Servants above those who are taken by your might: everyone who oppresses is the enemy of your Holiness.
Your enemies are boisterous within your assembly day; they have made their ensigns the signs.
And you know as The Exalted One above.
They hewed down the doors together with axes, like a forest of trees with axes and with hammers.
They took and burned your holy place with fire and they defiled the Tabernacle of your Name in the land.
They said in her heart, "We will destroy them together and we will destroy all the feast days of God from the land.”
They have not seen their signs; there is no more a Prophet, neither is there a wise man with us.
How long, oh God, does the enemy reproach and rage against your Name; forever?
Why have you turned your hand and your right hand from within your assembly?
Our God is King who has performed salvation in the midst of the Earth.
You have separated the sea in your might and you have broken the heads of the dragons in the waters.
You broke the heads of Leviathan and you have given food to the mighty people.
You shook the springs in the valleys; you dried up mighty rivers.
The day is yours and yours is the night; you have prepared the light and the sun.
You set all the boundaries of the Earth; summer and winter, you have created them.
LORD JEHOVAH has remembered the reproach of the enemy; a foolish people angered your Name.
You will not give the soul that confesses you to destruction and you will never forget the souls of your poor.
Look, LORD JEHOVAH, at your covenant, because the dwellings of the Earth are filled with darkness and evil.
Let not the poor remain ashamed; let the afflicted and the poor praise your Name.
Rise up, oh God, and judge your judgment and remember your reproach from the fools every day.
Do not forget the voice of your enemies and the tumult which is always rising up of those who stand against you.
We praise you, oh God, we praise you, and we call upon your Name; we have narrated all your wonders.
Because I shall take the time and I shall judge in integrity.
The Earth will be humbled and all its inhabitants; you have fashioned its inhabitants.
You have said to the fools, "Do not be fools”, and to the wicked, "Do not lift up the trumpet,
Neither lift your trumpet to The Highest nor speak with a high neck."
For it does not proceed from the West neither from the wilderness of the mountains.
Because God is the Judge; he brings down this one and he raises that one.
For a cup is in the hand of LORD JEHOVAH and it is full of a mixture of wine; he lets down the dregs from this to each; all the wicked of the Earth will drain his dregs and will drink them.
And I shall live to eternity and I shall sing to the God of Jacob.
I shall dash all the trumpets of the wicked in pieces and the trumpets of the righteous will be lifted up.
God is known in Yehuda and his Name is great in Israel.
His tabernacle shall be in Salem and his dwelling in Zion.
There he shattered the arms of bows, the supply of arms and the sword in war.
You are shining and Anointed from your mighty mountain.
All the foolish of heart are troubled and the mighty men have slept their sleep and they have not found their hands.
By your rebuke, oh, God of Jacob, the riders of horses have slumbered.
And you are fearful! Who will stand before you in this wrath?
You have caused judgment to be heard from Heaven and the Earth saw and was afraid
When God arose to judge and to save all the poor of the Earth.
Because the counsel of man will praise you and the remainder of his anger you will take away.
Vow and fulfill to LORD JEHOVAH your God; all around him shall bring offerings to The Awesome One.
For he shall humble the spirit of Rulers and he is feared by the Kings of the Earth.
I cried to God with my voice and he heard me and I lifted my voice and to him and he answered me!
In the day of my suffering I prayed to LORD JEHOVAH and his hand drew me in the night and I was not silent and there was no comforter for my soul.
I remembered God and I was disturbed and I meditated and my spirit was troubled.
And dizziness seized me in my eyes; I was dumb and did not speak.
I have considered the former days and the years of the ages.
I remembered, I meditated in the night; I meditated in my heart and I examined my spirit and I said:
LORD JEHOVAH has forgotten me eternally and is no longer pleased with me,
Or does not his grace pass away forever from me, or is not his word finished to a generation of generations?
Or has God forgotten to love, or does he withhold his mercies in his wrath?"
I said, "This is my sickness and it is the narrative of the right hand of The Exalted One
Because I have remembered your wonders from the first
And I have meditated on all your works; I have meditated on your skills."
Oh God, your way is holy, and there is none who is great like our God!
You are God, for you have done wonders and you have shown your might among the nations!
And you have saved your people with your arm, the children of Jacob and of Joseph.
The waters saw you, oh, God, the waters saw you and they feared and even the depths shook!
And the clouds rained waters, the skies of the Heavens gave a sound and even your arrows fly!
And the voice of your thunders was in the sphere, your lightnings lit up the world, the Earth was disturbed and shook!
Your path is in the sea and your steps in the many waters, neither are your footprints known.
For you led your people like a flock by the hand of Moses and of Aaron.
My people, give ear to my Law and be persuaded and incline your ears to the words of my mouth.
For behold, I shall open my mouth in proverbs and I shall speak in parables of a former time.
Those things that we have heard we have known them, also those things that our fathers related to us,
Which we will not hide from their children, but to the generation following we shall tell the praises of LORD JEHOVAH, his power and his wonders which he did.
He established his testimony in Jacob and he set his law in Israel, as he commanded our fathers to make known to their children
That they should instruct another generation, the children who are born and remain, to tell their children
That their hope would be in God and that they would not forget the works of God and they would keep his commandments,
And they should not be like their fathers, an evil and rebellious generation, a generation that has not set its heart right and whose spirit did not trust in God.
The children of Ephraim strung and cast away the bow when they were attacked and they turned back in the day of war.
For they did not keep the covenant of God and they did not choose to walk in his Law.
And they forgot his works and his wonders that he had shown them
In front of their fathers when he did wonders in the land of Egypt and in the fields of Zoan.
He split the sea and made them pass over and he stood up the waters like water skins.
He led them by day with a cloud and all night in the brightness of fire.
He breached the flint in the wilderness and gave them drink as from the great depths.
He brought out streams from the rock and the waters flowed like rivers.
And the people continued again to sin and to bitterly provoke The Highest with thirst.
And they tempted God in their heart, asking for food for themselves.
And they complained against God and they said, "Can God arrange tables for us in the wilderness?"
If he struck the flint and the waters flowed and he made torrents flow, can he not also give bread to us, or food prepared for his people?
Because of this, LORD JEHOVAH heard and he was angry, and a fire seized upon Jacob, also wrath came up in Israel.
For they did not trust in God and were not convinced of his salvation.
And he commanded the clouds from above and the doors of Heaven were open.
He sent manna down for them to eat and he gave them the bread of Heaven.
Man ate the bread of Angels and he sent game for them to be satisfied.
He made the wind blow in the sky and he led the southern sky by his strength.
He sent flesh down for them like dust, and birds of the wing like the sand of the sea
And they fell in their camps around their tents.
They ate and were very satisfied and he gave them their desire.
And they did not depart from their lust and while their food was in their mouths,
The wrath of God went up among them and he killed some of their rich and he prostrated the Elect Ones of Israel.
In these things they all sinned and yet they did not believe in his wonders.
They spent their days in futility and their years in haste.
When he was killing them they were seeking him; they were returning and coming before his presence.
They remembered that God is their helper, and God The Highest, their Savior.
They loved him with their mouths and with their tongue they angered him.
Their heart was not made right with him and they did not believe in his covenant.
And he is merciful and he forgives sin and does not destroy; he proceeded to turn away his wrath and did not arouse all his anger.
He remembered that they were flesh, a wind that goes and does not return.
They bitterly provoked him in the wilderness and angered him in the deserts.
And they turned back and they tempted God and they provoked The Holy One of Israel.
And they did not remember his hand the day he saved them from the oppressor
When he did signs in Egypt and his wonders in the fields of Zoan.
And he turned their rivers to blood, and their streams, that they would not drink the waters.
He sent swarms of insects against them and consumed them, and frogs, and he destroyed them.
He gave their crops to the locusts and their produce to the crawling locust.
He broke their vines with hailstones and their fig trees with ice.
He gave over their cattle to hailstones and their possessions to burning.
He sent the heat of his wrath against them; heat, wrath and trouble he sent by the hand of an evil Angel.
And he breached the evil path and did not spare their souls from death and delivered their animals to death.
He killed all the firstborn of Egypt, the first of all their children in the tents of Ham.
He bore his people like sheep and led them like a flock in the wilderness.
He led them in hope and they did not fear, and the sea covered their enemies.
He brought them to the border of his Holiness, this mountain that his right hand possessed.
He destroyed the Gentiles from before them and he cast them the lots of his inheritance and the tribes of Israel dwelt in their tents.
And they tempted and bitterly provoked God, The Highest, and they did not keep his testimony.
They turned back and they lied like their fathers and they were turned aside like a deceitful bow.
And they angered him by their sacrifices and they made him jealous by their idols.
And God heard and was provoked and was very angry against Israel.
And he forgot the tent of Shiloh, the tent of the camp among the children of men.
He gave his people to captivity and his glory into the hand of the oppressor.
He gave over his people to the sword and turned away from his inheritance.
The fire consumed their boys and their virgins were abused.
The priests fell by the sword and their widows did not weep.
LORD JEHOVAH awakened like one who had been sleeping and like a man who would save himself from his wine.
He struck his enemies behind him and he gave them eternal reproach.
He despised the tent of Joseph and the tribe of Ephraim was not accepted.
He has chosen the tribe of Yehuda, the mountain of Zion that he loved.
He built his holy place upon the height and he prepared it in the Earth for eternity.
He has chosen David his Servant and led him from a flock of sheep
And from following nursing sheep to feed Jacob his people and Israel his inheritance.
And he shepherded them in the perfection of his heart and in the understanding of his hands he led them.
God, the Gentiles have entered your inheritance and they have defiled your holy temple; they have made Jerusalem desolate.
They gave the corpses of your Servants as food for birds of the sky and the flesh of your righteous ones to the animals of the Earth.
They shed their blood like water around Jerusalem and there is no one to bury them.
We were a reproach to our neighbors, a mockery and a laughingstock to those around us.
How long will you be angry, LORD JEHOVAH; forever? Your wrath burns like fire!
Pour out your wrath upon the Gentiles, those who have not known you, and upon those kingdoms that have not called upon your Name.
Because they have consumed Jacob and they have made his dwelling desolate.
Do not remember our former sins against us; let your mercies quickly precede us because we are very humbled.
Help us, God our Savior, for the honor of your Name; pardon and save us from our sins because of your Name.
Lest the Gentiles say, "Where is your God?” Let the vengeance of the blood of your Servants that is shed be known among the Gentiles before our eyes.
Let the groaning of the prisoners enter before you; by the greatness of your arm release the children from death.
And pay our neighbors each by sevens into their bosom, the reproach of those reproaching you, LORD JEHOVAH!
And we are your people and the sheep of your pasture; we will give thanks for eternity, and to a generation of generations we shall tell your wonders!
Shepherd of Israel, give ear and lead Joseph like a flock! Be revealed sitting upon the cherubim!
Before Ephraim, Benjamin and Menasheh, show your power and come for our salvation!
God of hosts, restore us and make your face shine and we will be saved!
LORD JEHOVAH, God of hosts, how long are you angry against the prayer of your Servant?
You fed them bread with tears and you made them drink with tears.
You have made us a mockery to our neighbors and our enemies have mocked at us.
God of hosts, restore us and shine your face and we shall be saved!
You brought out a vine from Egypt, you destroyed Gentiles and you planted it.
You dug in it and you planted its roots and the land was filled with it.
And the mountains were covered by its shade and its shoots were upon the cedars of God.
It sent its tendrils unto the sea and its shoots upon the rivers.
Why have you broken down its hedge and all those passing by the way have trampled it?
The boar of the forest consumed it and the wild beasts of the wilderness feed on it.
God of hosts, return and look from Heaven and see and visit this vine!
Even the vine that your right hand has planted and The Son of Man that you made strong for yourself!
He consumed its shoots in a fire and by the reproof of your face they shall be destroyed.
Let your right hand be upon The Man and upon The Son of Man whom you strengthened for yourself.
Give us life so that we will not turn from you, and we will call upon your Name.
LORD JEHOVAH, God of Hosts, restore us and shine your face and we shall be saved!
Praise God, our Champion, and cry to the God of Jacob!
Take tambourines and lyres and those pleasant on harps.
Call with the trumpets at the first of the month and at full moon on feast days.
For this is the law for Israel and the judgment for the God of Jacob!
He appointed a testimony in Joseph when he went forth to the land of Egypt; he heard a language that he did not know.
I took the burden from his shoulder and I freed his hands from the baskets at the waters of testing.
He called me in trouble, and in secret, in my glorious refuge, I saved him and I tested him.
Hear my people and I shall speak, and Israel, I shall testify of you if you will hear me.
You shall have no strange god neither shall you worship to serve another.
I AM The Living God, LORD JEHOVAH, your God, who brought you out from the land of Egypt. Open your mouth and I shall fill it.
And my people did not listen to my voice and Israel was not persuaded by me.
But they walked in the desire of their heart and in the counsel of their souls.
If my people had heard me and Israel had walked in my ways,
I would have shortly destroyed their enemies and would have turned my hand against those who hated them.
The haters of LORD JEHOVAH have angered him and he is their cause of trembling for eternity.
He fed him from the fatness of the wheat and honey from the rock satisfied him.
God stands in the assembly of the Angels and among the Angels he will judge.
How long will you vindicate evil and accept the face of the wicked?
Judge the orphans and the afflicted and justify the poor and the meek.
Save the poor and the afflicted from the hand of the wicked.
For they have not known neither are they wise; they have been walking in darkness and all the foundations of the Earth are moved!
I have said, "You are gods; you are all children of The Highest!
Therefore, you will die like children of men and you will fall like each of the princes."
Arise, oh God, and judge the Earth, because you will inherit all the nations!
God, who is like you? Do not be silent, neither be still, oh God!
Because, behold, your enemies are enraged, and your haters lift up the head against your people!
They forged a secret in their craftiness and counseled against your Holy Ones.
And they said, "Come, we will destroy them from the nation and the name of Israel will be remembered no more!"
Because they plotted together in their heart and established a covenant against you:
The tents of Edom and of Arabians and of Moab and of the Gadarenes,
The borders of Ammon and of Amalek and of the Philistines with the inhabitants of Tsur.
Also the Assyrians have made agreement with them and they have been a help to the sons of Lot.
Do to them as to Midian and as to Sisera and as to Nabin in the valley of Qishon,
Who were exterminated at Endor and became dung on the ground.
Cut them off and destroy them like Aureeb and like Zeeb and like Zebakh and like Tsalmunna: all their Rulers.
They said, "We will inherit for us The City of God.”
God, make them like a tumble weed and like a straw before the wind,
Like fire that is left in a forest like a flame that burns the mountains.
So chase them in your hurricane and trouble them in your whirlwinds.
Fill their faces with shame, that they may seek your Name, LORD JEHOVAH!
They shall be ashamed; they shall be troubled to an eternity of eternities; they shall be put to shame and they shall be destroyed!
And they shall know that your Name is LORD JEHOVAH; you alone are exalted in all the Earth!
How beloved are your tabernacles, LORD JEHOVAH of hosts!
My soul has waited and has lusted for the courts of LORD JEHOVAH! My heart and my flesh have praised The Living God!
Even the sparrow has found a house for itself and the pigeon makes a nest; they have raised chicks on the side of your altar, LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts, my King and my God!
Blessed are those who dwell in your house; they shall praise you for eternity!
Blessed is the son of man whose helper you are, and in whose heart are your ways!
They passed by the valley of weeping and they have made it a dwelling place, also blessings will cover The Lawgiver.
They will go from power to power and the God of gods will be seen in Zion!
LORD JEHOVAH, God of hosts, hear my prayer and give ear, God of Jacob!
And see, God our shield, and look at the face of your Anointed!
Because one day in your court is better than a thousand! I have desired to dwell in the house of God more than to dwell in the tent of the wicked.
Because LORD JEHOVAH is God, our sustainer and our helper; LORD JEHOVAH will give love and honor and will not withhold his good things from those who walk in perfection.
LORD JEHOVAH, God of hosts, blessed is the man who hopes in you!
You have delighted, LORD JEHOVAH, in your land and you have turned the captivity of Jacob!
You have forgiven the evil of your people and you have covered all their sins!
And you have removed all your anger and you have turned away the heat of your wrath!
Restore us, oh God our Savior, and cancel your wrath from us!
Do not be angry against us for eternity and do not keep your wrath for a generation of generations!
But do restore us and give us life, and your people will rejoice in you!
Show us your kindness, LORD JEHOVAH, and give us your salvation,
That we may hear what LORD JEHOVAH God speaks, who speaks peace with his people and with his righteous ones, lest they turn their back!
His salvation is near his worshipers; his honor will encamp in our land!
Favor and truth are reconciled; righteousness and peace will kiss!
Faith will sprout from the Earth and righteousness looked out from Heaven!
Also LORD JEHOVAH will give his precious things and Earth will give its harvests!
And the righteous one will walk before him and he will establish his steps in the Earth!
Incline your ear, LORD JEHOVAH, and answer me, because I am poor and afflicted!
Keep my soul because you are good; deliver your Servant who hopes in you, oh God!
Show mercy to me, LORD JEHOVAH, because I shall call to you every day!
Make the soul of your Servant glad, because to you, LORD JEHOVAH, I have lifted up my soul!
Because you, LORD JEHOVAH, are good and your kindness is great to all who call to you!
Give ear to my prayer, oh, LORD JEHOVAH, and hear the voice of my cry!
I called you in the day of my suffering and you answered me!
There is none like you, LORD JEHOVAH, our God, and there are none like your works!
All the nations whom you have made will come, and they will worship you, LORD JEHOVAH, and they will praise your Name!
Because you are great, you are doing wonders; you are God alone!
Show me your road, LORD JEHOVAH, and I shall walk in the truth; my heart shall rejoice with those who are in awe of your Name!
I shall confess to you, LORD JEHOVAH, my God, from my whole heart and I shall glorify your Name to eternity!
Because your greatness upon me is great and you have delivered my soul from the lowest Sheol!
God, the evil have stood up against me and the assembly of mighty ones seek for my soul, and they have not remembered you!
And you, LORD JEHOVAH God, are compassionate and hovering, patient and abounding in grace and truth!
Return to me and show mercy to me; give power to your Servant and save the son of your maid Servant!
Make a good sign with me that those who hate me will see and will be ashamed because you, LORD JEHOVAH, have helped me and you have comforted me!
His foundations are in his holy mountain!
LORD JEHOVAH loves the gates of Zion more than all the tents of Jacob!
Glories are spoken in you, City of our God!
Remember my doctrines, Rahab and Babel; behold, Philistines and Tsur and the people of the Cushites: This One was born there!
And to Zion let it be said, "The Mighty Man was born in it and he will prepare it.”
LORD JEHOVAH will recount in the book for the peoples: "This One was born there"!
Princes who dwell in you will rejoice and all who were humbled in you!
LORD JEHOVAH, God of my salvation, in the daytime I have cried and before you in the nighttime.
My prayer will enter before you and bend your ear to my prayer!
Because my soul has been filled with evils and my life has arrived at Sheol!
I am counted with those who descend to the pit and I have been like a man who has no helper!
A free man among the dead, like the slain sleeping in the graves, those whom you remember no more and they were destroyed by your hands!
You have laid me into the deepest pit, into darkness and the shadows of death!
And your wrath rests upon me and you have brought against me all your storms!
You have removed my acquaintances from me and you have made me unclean to them; I am prohibited that I may not come out.
My eyes have melted from affliction and I called you, LORD JEHOVAH, every day, and have stretched forth my hands to you!
Behold, you work wonders to the dead and mighty ones will stand and confess you!
And they will tell your kindness which is in the tombs and your faithfulness in destruction!
Your wonders will be known in darkness and your righteousness in the land that was forgotten!
And I have cried to you, LORD JEHOVAH, and at dawn my prayer will come before your presence!
Do not forget my soul, LORD JEHOVAH, and do not turn your face from me!
I am afflicted and weary from my youth; I was exalted and I have been humbled and confounded.
Your wrath passed over me and your tumult silenced me.
They have surrounded me all day like waters and they have stood up against me together!
You have removed my friends and my neighbors from me and you have caused my acquaintances to depart from me.
I shall sing the grace of LORD JEHOVAH for eternity, and for a generation of generations I shall teach his faithfulness with my mouth,
Because he said, "The world will be built in grace and Heaven will establish your faithfulness"!
I have established a covenant for my chosen and I have sworn to David my Servant:
I shall establish your seed for eternity and I shall build your throne for a generation of generations.
The Heavens shall confess your wonders, LORD JEHOVAH, and your faithfulness in the congregation of the Holy Ones.
Who is equal to LORD JEHOVAH in the Heaven of Heavens, and like LORD JEHOVAH among the children of Angels?
God stands in the congregation of The Holy Ones, great and awesome above all who are around him!
Oh, LORD JEHOVAH, God of hosts, who is strong like you? Your faithfulness is around you!
You are The Ruler in the magnificence of the sea and you stop the tumult of its waves!
You have humbled the proud like the slain, with your strong arm you have scattered your enemies!
The Heavens are yours and the Earth is yours; you have prepared the world in its fullness.
You have created the North and the South; Tabor and Herman sing your Name.
Yours is the arm and yours is the might; your hand will prevail and you will lift up your right hand.
Your throne is established in righteousness and in judgment, in grace and in truth before your face.
Blessed is the people that knows your glory songs! LORD JEHOVAH, they will walk in the light of your face!
And they will leap for joy in your Name all day and they will be exalted in your righteousness!
Because you are the glory of our strength and our horn will be lifted up in your pleasure!
Because LORD JEHOVAH is our trust and The Holy One of Israel is our King!
Then he spoke in visions with his righteous ones and he said, "I have set help for a man and I have raised The Chosen One from the people.”
And I have found David my Servant; I have anointed him with the oil of my holiness.
My hand has helped him, also my arm gave him power.
His enemy has availed nothing and the son of evil does not humble him.
I shall destroy his enemies from before him and I shall defeat his haters.
My faithfulness and my grace are with him and in my Name his trumpet will be lifted up.
I shall put his hand on the sea and his right hand on the rivers.
He will cry to me: 'You are my Father, my God and my mighty Savior'!
Also I shall make him the firstborn and I shall exalt him above the Kings of the Earth.
I shall keep my favor for him for eternity and my covenant will be steadfast with him.
I shall establish his seat to eternity and his throne like the days of Heaven.
If his children forsake my law and will not walk in my commands
— Peshitta mss. do not contain verse 31:"if they profane My Precepts, and do not keep My Commandments”
I shall adjudge their evil with a scepter and their sins with a scourge.
And I shall not take my grace from him, neither shall I be false in my faith.
Neither shall I reject my covenant, nor shall I change a thing that is gone forth from my lips.
Once I have sworn in my holiness to David and I shall not lie.
For his seed will continue for eternity and his throne like the sun before me.
And he will be established like the moon for eternity, a faithful witness in Heaven.
And you have forgotten me and despised me and you have turned away the face of your anointed!
And you have despised the covenant of your Servant and you have cast his crown upon the ground!
You have broken down his hedge and you pulled down his fortresses!
And all who passed by the way trampled him and he has been a reproach to his neighbors!
You have lifted the right hand of his enemies and you have gladdened all his haters!
And you have turned away the aid of his sword and you have not upheld him in war!
And you have destroyed his justifiers and you have pulled down his throne to the ground!
And you have diminished the days of his youth and you have clothed him in shame!
How long are you angry LORD JEHOVAH; to eternity? And your wrath burns like fire.
Remember me from the pit, because it is not for nothing that you have created all the children of men!
Who is the man who will live and will not see death and will save his soul from the hand of Sheol?
Where are your former favors, LORD JEHOVAH, that you have sworn to David in faithfulness?
Remember, LORD JEHOVAH, the reproach of your Servant, for I have carried the mockery of the peoples my whole life!
Your enemies have reproached me, LORD JEHOVAH, and they have reproached the steps of your Anointed One!
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH to eternity. Amen and amen!
LORD JEHOVAH, you have been a dwelling place for us for a generation of generations.
Before the mountains would have been brought forth, or ever you would have brought forth the world, or the world had ever been acquired, from eternity unto eternity you are God.
Because you have turned man unto humility and you have said, "Return children of men.”
Because a thousand years in your eyes is like a day that is finished when it is passed and like a watch of the night.
Their generations shall be a sleep and at dawn it shall change like a flower
Which sprouts at dawn and changes, and in the evening it withers and dries up.
Because we are consumed in your wrath and we are agitated by your anger.
You have set our sins before you, our lifetimes in the light of your face.
Because all our days are consumed in your passion and our years are spent like spiders.
The days of our years with them are seventy years, or being stronger. eighty years; most of them are toil and pains, because affliction comes upon us and we are buffeted.
Who knows the power of your passion and the awesomeness of your passion?
Teach us the number of our days that we may enter the heart of wisdom.
Return, LORD JEHOVAH. How long will you not comfort your Servants?
Satisfy us at dawn; we shall praise your kindness and rejoice all our days.
Gladden us, because our wickedness has died, and the years in which we have seen evil are gone.
Let your works appear to your Servants and your excellence to their children!
Let the sweetness of LORD JEHOVAH our God be upon us, because of the works of his hands which he has fashioned for us, and he formed us among the work of his hands!
He sits in the shelter of The Highest and is glorified in the shadow of God.
He said to LORD JEHOVAH, "My trust, my refuge place, God upon whom I trust!"
He is the one who shall deliver you from the snare of scandal and from worthless speech.
In his feathers he shall deliver you and under his wings you shall have refuge; his truth shall surround you as a supply of armor.
You shall not be afraid of the dread of the night or of the arrow that flies by day,
Or of the account that walks in darkness or of the spirit that devastates at noonday.
Thousands will fall by your side and ten thousand by your right hand, and they shall not come near you.
But with your eyes alone you shall see the reward of the wicked.
Because you are LORD JEHOVAH my trust, for you have set your dwelling on high,
Evil shall not come near you and disease shall not come near your dwellings,
For he will command his Angels concerning you, to keep you in all your ways
And upon their arms they shall take you up, lest you strike your foot.
Upon the viper and upon the cockatrice you shall tread, and you shall trample the lion and the dragon.
Because he seeks me, I shall save him; I shall strengthen him, because he knows my Name.
He will call me and I shall answer him; I am with him in trouble; I shall strengthen him and I shall honor him.
With length of days I shall satisfy him and I shall show him my salvation.
It is good to thank LORD JEHOVAH, and to praise your Name, Most High
To show your kindness at dawn and your faithfulness in the nights.
I shall play on the harp of ten strings and I shall play on the psaltery
Because you have gladdened me, LORD JEHOVAH, by your works, and I shall triumph in the work of your hands.
How great are your works, LORD JEHOVAH, and your thoughts are very deep!
A mindless man does not know and a fool does not understand this.
When the wicked have sprung up like grass and all workers of evil sprout, they shall be destroyed to an eternity of eternities.
And you are LORD JEHOVAH, The Highest, for eternity, and let all workers of evil be scattered.
Because, behold, your enemies, LORD JEHOVAH, for, behold, your enemies shall be destroyed!
You have raised my horns like a wild ox and you have moistened me with fragrant oil.
And my eyes see among my enemies, and among the evil who stand against me my ears will hear.
The righteous will flourish like a palm tree and will spring up like the Cedars of Lebanon.
Those that are planted in the house of LORD JEHOVAH and in the courts of our God, will flourish.
Moreover they will increase in old age; they will be Heavenly and sweet!
And they will show that mighty LORD JEHOVAH is upright and that there is no evil in him!
LORD JEHOVAH reigns and he wears Majesty! LORD JEHOVAH wears strength and is strengthened and he set the world in order that it would not be moved.
He sets your throne in order from the first and you are from eternity!
The rivers are risen, LORD JEHOVAH, the rivers have raised their voice; the rivers are risen in purity.
The storms of the sea are stronger than the voice of many waters; LORD JEHOVAH is glorious in the high places!
And your testimonies are very trustworthy; holiness is fitting for your house, LORD JEHOVAH, for the length of days!
God of vengeance, LORD JEHOVAH, God of vengeance, be revealed!
Be lifted up, Judge of the Earth, and return vengeance upon those who are pompous!
How long are the wicked, LORD JEHOVAH? How long are the wicked boasting?
They vomit and speak evil, and all workers of evil are talking
Who have humbled your people, LORD JEHOVAH, and they have subdued your inheritance.
They have killed widows and inhabitants and they have ravaged orphans.
And they said, "LORD JEHOVAH does not see, and the God of Jacob does not understand.”
Be wise, fools of the people! Idiots! How long will you not understand?
He who planted the ears, does he not hear? He who created the eyes, does he not perceive?
He who chastises the nations, does he not rebuke, who teaches a son of man knowledge?
LORD JEHOVAH knows the reasonings of the children of men, because they are a vapor.
Blessed is the son of man whom you will chasten, LORD JEHOVAH, and you will teach him from your Law!
And you will give him rest from evil days until a pit is dug for the wicked.
Because LORD JEHOVAH does not abandon his people and has not forsaken his inheritance.
Because judgment returns after The Righteous One, and after him all the upright of heart.
Who shall stand for me with the evil and who shall be ready for me with the evildoers?
If LORD JEHOVAH had not been a helper to me, before a little while my soul would have dwelt in misery!
I said, "My feet have slipped, and your grace, LORD JEHOVAH, has supported me.”
In the multitude of my heart's afflictions, your comforts have redeemed my soul!
The throne of the evil ones will not have fellowship with you, those who have formed evil against your law.
And they lay wait to trap the soul of the righteous and they condemn the blood of the innocent!
And LORD JEHOVAH has been the Defender to me, the Savior, God, The Mighty One, The Helper!
He returns their evil against them and their companions in their evils, he silences such; LORD JEHOVAH our God silences them!
Come, we will glorify LORD JEHOVAH and we will sing to our God the Savior!
Let us come before his face with Thanksgiving and we will glorify him with songs!
Because God is great. LORD JEHOVAH the King is great above all gods.
For the foundations of the Earth and the height of the mountains are in his hands.
The sea is his and he made it and his hands formed the dry land.
Come, we will bow and worship him and we shall bless LORD JEHOVAH who made us.
Because he is our God and we are his people and the sheep of his pasture; today if you will hear his voice,
Do not harden your hearts to anger him like the rebels and like the day of temptation which was in the wilderness.
For your fathers tempted me and they proved and They saw my works.
Forty years I was wearied with that generation and I said, "It is a people that forgets their heart and they have not known my ways."
As I have sworn in my anger, "They will not enter my rest!" Ps
Sing to LORD JEHOVAH a new song! Sing to LORD JEHOVAH, all the Earth!
Praise LORD JEHOVAH and bless his name! Announce his salvation from day to day!
And declare his honor among the nations and his works among all peoples.
Because our Lord is great and very glorious and he is feared above all gods
Because all the gods of the Gentiles are worthless!
Brightness and glory are before him; strength and glory are in his holy place and LORD JEHOVAH made the Heavens!
Give to LORD JEHOVAH, you generations of the nations, give to LORD JEHOVAH glory and honor!
Give LORD JEHOVAH the honor due to his Name. Take offerings and enter his courts.
Worship LORD JEHOVAH in the court of his Holiness. All the Earth will shake from before him!
Say among the nations, "LORD JEHOVAH reigns, and the world is prepared that it will not move. He shall judge the nations in integrity!"
Heaven will rejoice and the Earth will be glad! The sea will exult in its fullness!
The fields will be lush and all that is in them and all the trees of the forest will sing
In front of LORD JEHOVAH, for he comes to judge the Earth! He judges the world in righteousness and the peoples in faithfulness!
LORD JEHOVAH reigns! The Earth will be glad; the many islands shall rejoice!
Clouds and thick darkness surround him; his throne is established in righteousness and in judgment.
Fire will devour before him and will burn up his enemies.
His lightnings lit up the world, the Earth saw and was troubled.
And the mountains melted like wax before LORD JEHOVAH, the Lord of all the Earth!
Heaven has shown his righteousness and all the people beheld his honor!
All who serve idols and boast in carvings shall be ashamed! Worship him, all his Angels!
Zion will hear and rejoice and the daughters of Yehuda will be glad because of your judgments, LORD JEHOVAH!
Because you are LORD JEHOVAH, The Highest over all the Earth and you are greatly exalted over all gods!
The lovers of LORD JEHOVAH hate evil, and he will keep the souls of his righteous ones and he will save them from the hand of the wicked,
Because light shines to the righteous ones, and joy to the upright in heart.
Rejoice, righteous ones, in LORD JEHOVAH, and give thanks for the remembrance of his Holiness!
Sing to LORD JEHOVAH a new song because he has done wonders! His right hand and his holy arm have saved him!
LORD JEHOVAH has shown his salvation; to the eyes of the people he has revealed his righteousness!
He has remembered his grace and his faithfulness to the house of Israel and all the ends of the earth have seen his salvation!
Praise LORD JEHOVAH, all the Earth; exult and sing and glorify our God!
Sing to LORD JEHOVAH with harps and with the voice of singing
And praise with the sound of the trumpets before the King LORD JEHOVAH!
Let the sea be shaken in its fullness, the world and all its inhabitants!
The rivers will clap hands together and the mountains will sing
Before LORD JEHOVAH, because he comes to judge the Earth; he will judge the world in truth and the peoples in integrity!
LORD JEHOVAH reigns! The nations will be moved; he sits above the cherubim. The Earth will shake!
LORD JEHOVAH is great in Zion and high above all the peoples.
They shall confess your great and awesome Name, for it is holy!
For the strength of the King loves justice; you have prepared integrity and judgment and you have performed righteousness in Jacob.
Exalt LORD JEHOVAH our God and worship at his footstool; he is holy.
Moses and Aaron among his priests, and Samuel among those crying his Name, for they called LORD JEHOVAH and he answered them!
He spoke with them in a column of cloud; they kept his testimony and the covenant that he gave them.
LORD JEHOVAH, our God, you answered them, oh God, you have been an avenger to them; pay them according to their works!
Exalt LORD JEHOVAH our God and worship at his holy mountain because LORD JEHOVAH our God is holy!
Praise LORD JEHOVAH all the Earth!
Serve LORD JEHOVAH with joy; enter before him with praise!
Know that he is LORD JEHOVAH our God and it is he who has made us and it was not we ourselves; we are his people and the sheep of his pasture.
Enter into his gates with thanksgiving and his courts with praise; give thanks to him and bless his name!
Because LORD JEHOVAH is good and his grace is for eternity and his faithfulness for a generation of generations!
I shall sing grace and judgment and I shall glorify you, LORD JEHOVAH!
I have walked in your road without blemish. When will you come to me? I have walked in the perfection of my heart within my house.
I have set no evil account before my eyes. I have hated him who does evil, neither will he cling to me.
An evil heart passes from me and I have not known evil.
I have destroyed him who secretly slanders his neighbor; I have not eaten with him whose eyes are lofty and is enlarged in his heart.
My eyes are with the faithful of the Earth, for they will dwell with me; he that walks in the way without defect will serve me.
He that works deceit will not sit within my house and the speaker of lies will not be established before my eyes.
At dawn I shall silence all the wicked of the Earth, and I shall destroy from the city of LORD JEHOVAH all evil doers.
LORD JEHOVAH, hear my prayer, and my cry will enter to your presence!
Do not turn your face from me in the day of my affliction but bend your ear to me in the day that I call you and answer me quickly!
Because my days are finished in smoke and my bones are white as if they were burnt!
My heart withers like grass and is dried up because I have forgotten the food of my bread.
My flesh cleaves to my bones from the voice of my groanings!
I have been like a pelican in the wilderness and I have been like an owl in the desert.
I am terrified and have been alone like a sparrow that flies on the rooftops.
My enemies have reproached me all day, and my Singers are sworn against me!
Because I have eaten ashes like bread and I have mixed my drink with weeping
From before your anger and your passion, for you have exalted me and you have cast me down!
My days have declined like the shadow and I have withered like the grass!
And you, LORD JEHOVAH, endure to eternity and your remembrance to a generation of generations!
Arise and show love upon Zion because the time has come to show love upon her!
Because your Servants delight in her stones and they love her dust!
The nations shall worship your Name, LORD JEHOVAH, and all the Kings of the earth, your honor!
Because LORD JEHOVAH builds up Zion and he shall appear in his glory!
And he turns to the prayer of the poor and does not despise their prayer.
This will be written for the following generation; the people to be created will glorify LORD JEHOVAH
For he looked out from the high place of his Holiness. LORD JEHOVAH looked out from Heaven to the Earth
To hear the groaning of the prisoners and to release the children from death
That they may tell The Name of LORD JEHOVAH in Zion and his praises in Jerusalem!
Why do the nations gather as one, and the kingdoms to serve LORD JEHOVAH?
They humbled my power in the Earth and in the shortage of my days
He said to me, "Do not take me up in the middle of my days; your years are for a generation of generations.
You have prepared the Earth from the first and your hands made Heaven.
They pass away and you endure, and all of them are worn out like clothing and like a cloak they are changed.
And you are as you are, and your years do not end.
And the sons of your Servants will dwell in the Earth and their seed will be established before you.” Ps
Bless LORD JEHOVAH, my soul, and all my bones, bless his holy name!
Bless, LORD JEHOVAH, my soul, and do not forget all his rewards,
Who forgives you all your evil and heals all your diseases.
He saves you from destruction; he supports you with grace and with compassions.
He satisfies your body with precious things; your youth is renewed like the eagle.
LORD JEHOVAH performs righteousness and judgment to all the oppressed.
He shows his way to Moses and his works to the sons of Israel.
LORD JEHOVAH is compassionate and cherishing; he is patient and his grace is abundant.
Because he does not harbor ill will to eternity and will not keep his wrath to eternity.
For he has not done to us according to our sins, neither has he rewarded us according to our evil.
Because as Heaven is higher than the Earth, so has the grace of LORD JEHOVAH prevailed upon his worshipers.
And as the East is far from the West so will our evil be far from us!
And as a father shows compassion upon children, LORD JEHOVAH shows compassion upon his worshipers.
Because he knows our form; he remembers that we are dust.
A son of man is like the grass in its days and like a flower of the field so he springs up.
For when the wind has blown upon it, it is not, neither is his place known.
The grace of LORD JEHOVAH is from eternity and unto eternity upon his worshipers and his righteousness to their children's children
To those who keep his covenant and remember his commandments and do them.
LORD JEHOVAH establishes his throne in Heaven and his Kingdom is authorized over all.
Bless LORD JEHOVAH, his Angels, who are Masters in power, doing his commandments.
Bless LORD JEHOVAH, all his hosts, and his Servants who do his will.
Bless LORD JEHOVAH, all his Servants who are in all the Earth of his dominion. Bless LORD JEHOVAH, oh my soul!
Bless LORD JEHOVAH, my soul! LORD JEHOVAH my God is very great; he wears brightness and glory!
He is covered in light like a cloak. He has stretched out Heaven like a curtain.
He makes his lofty dwellings in the waters and sets his chariot above the clouds and walks upon the wings of the wind.
He makes his Angels the wind and his ministers burning fire.
He has prepared Earth upon its foundations that it will not move for an eternity of eternities.
The deep was like a cloak for its covering and above the mountains the waters rose up.
From your rebuke they flee and they hasten from the voice of your thunders.
They went up the mountains and they came down the valleys into the place which you prepared for them.
You have set borders for them which they will not cross and cover the earth.
You have sent the springs into the valleys and they walk among the mountains.
And they give drink to all the animals of the wilderness and satisfy wild donkeys that thirst.
And the birds of the sky alight upon them; from among the mountains they give a sound.
He waters the mountains from his lofty dwellings; from the fruit of your works you will satisfy the Earth.
He makes grass to sprout for the beasts and green plants for the service of man to bring forth bread from the Earth.
Wine gladdens the heart of the son of man and brightens his face with oil; bread sustains the heart of the son of man.
The trees of LORD JEHOVAH will be satisfied and the cedars of Lebanon that he has planted.
There the fowl have made a nest and the stork nests itself in the cypress.
The high mountains for the mountain goats and the crags are a refuge for the rabbits.
He made the moon for times and the sun knows the time of its settings.
He made the darkness and there was night and in it pass through all the wild beasts of the forest.
The lionesses roar to tear apart and to seek their food from God.
The rising of the sun they are gathered and they lie down in their dwellings.
A son of man goes forth to his work and for his service until the evening.
How many are your works LORD JEHOVAH, and you have made them all in wisdom, and you have filled the earth with your possessions!
This is the great sea and an expanse round about in which are swarming things without number, great creatures with the small.
In it the ships travel; this is Leviathan which you have created to be merry in it.
All are waiting for you to give them food in their times.
You give to them and they are fed; you open your hand and they are satisfied.
You turn your face and they are disturbed; you take their spirit and they die and return to their dust.
You send your Spirit and they are created and you renew the face of the earth.
The glory of LORD JEHOVAH shall be for eternity! LORD JEHOVAH will rejoice in his works.
For he looks at the earth and it quakes and he rebukes the mountains and they smoke!
I shall praise LORD JEHOVAH with my life and I shall sing praise to my God as long as I endure.
My praise will delight him I shall rejoice in LORD JEHOVAH!
Sinners will cease from the earth and the evil will not be seen in it. Bless LORD JEHOVAH, my soul!
Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH and call his Name and show his works among the nations!
Praise him and sing to him and declare all his wonders!
Praise The Name of his Holiness! The heart of those who seek LORD JEHOVAH will rejoice!
Seek LORD JEHOVAH and be strengthened. Seek his face always!
Remember his wonders that he made; his wonders and the judgment of his mouth!
The seed of Abraham his Servant, and the children of Jacob, his Elect Ones.
He is LORD JEHOVAH, our God, whose judgments are in all the earth!
He remembers his covenant for eternity, the word that he commanded to a thousand generations
Who established his covenant with Abraham and his oaths with Isaac.
And he establishes his testimony with Jacob to Israel for eternity.
And he said, "I shall give to you the land of Canaan, the lines of their inheritance”
When they were few in number; they were small, and they were inhabitants in it.
They walked from nation to nation and from a kingdom to another people.
And he allowed no man to do them wrong; he rebuked Kings for their sakes.
You shall not touch my Anointed and you shall not harm my Prophets.
And he called a famine upon the land and he broke all the stalks of their grain.
He sent a man before them. Joseph was sold to slavery.
And they bound his feet in shackles and he himself was put in irons.
Until his word was proven, the speech of LORD JEHOVAH tried him.
The King sent and released him; he made him a Prince over his people,
Lord over his house and Ruler over all his possessions,
That he would instruct Rulers as he pleased and would teach wisdom to the Elders.
Israel entered Egypt and Jacob dwelt in the habitation of Ham.
He multiplied his people well and strengthened him more than his enemies.
And they turned back their hearts to hate his people and to deal treacherously against his Servants.
He sent Moses his Servant and Aaron whom he chose.
He performed his signs among them and his wonders in the land of Ham.
He sent darkness and it became dark and they bitterly provoked his Word.
He turned their waters to blood and killed their fish.
Frogs swarmed in their land and in the inner chambers of their Kings.
He spoke and there was a swarm of insects and lice in all their borders.
He made their rain hail and fire burned in their land.
He struck their vines and their fig trees and shattered the trees of their borders.
He spoke and the locusts came and the crawling locust without number in all their land.
It ate all the grass and fruit of their lands.
He killed all the firstborn of Egypt, the first of all their offspring.
He brought them out with silver and with gold and there was no one who was weak among their generations.
Egypt was glad at their exodus because their fear had fallen upon them.
He spread a cloud before them and it shaded them, and fire to give light in the night.
They asked and he brought them food and the bread of Heaven filled them.
He opened the flint and the waters flowed and the waters walked in the thirsty place.
Because he had remembered the word of his Holiness of Abraham his Servant,
He brought his people out with joy and his young men with praise.
He gave them the lands of the Gentiles and they inherited the toil of the peoples
That they would heed his commandments and keep his laws.
Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his grace is to eternity.
Who will tell the wonders of LORD JEHOVAH and will proclaim all his praises?
Blessed are they who keep his judgments and do his righteousness at all times.
Remember me, LORD JEHOVAH, with the pleasure of your people, and save me in your salvation!
That I may see the good of your chosen ones, I shall rejoice in your joy and I shall be glorified in your inheritance!
We have sinned with our fathers; we have gone astray and we have done wickedness.
Our fathers in Egypt did not understand your wonders and they did not remember the multitude of your graces when they contended by the waters at the Sea of Reeds.
He saved them because of his Name to show his manliness.
He rebuked The Sea of Reeds and it dried up; he walked them into the deep as into the wilderness.
He saved them from the hand of the enemy and delivered them from the hand of the oppressor.
Waters covered their oppressors and not one of them remained.
They believed his words and sang his praises.
They made haste and they forgot God and did not trust his counsel.
They lusted greatly in the wilderness and they tempted God in the desert.
He gave them their requests and sent fullness to their souls.
They were envious of Moses in the camp and of Aaron, the Holy One of LORD JEHOVAH.
The Earth opened and swallowed Dathan and buried over the assembly of Abiram.
A fire was kindled in their assemblies and a flame burned up the evil ones.
They made a calf in Khoreeb and worshiped the molten image.
And they changed their glory into the likeness of an ox eating grass.
And they forgot God who saved them, who did great things in Egypt
And wonders in the land of Ham and awesome deeds in the Sea of Reeds.
And he said that he would destroy them if Moses, his chosen, had not stood in the gap before him, and turned back his wrath, lest he would destroy them.
They despised the land of desire and they did not believe his word,
And they complained in their tents and they did not hear the voice of LORD JEHOVAH.
And he lifted his hand against them to destroy them among the Gentiles.
And he would scatter their seed among the Gentiles and would destroy them in the lands.
For they joined themselves to the idols of Peor and they ate the sacrifices of the dead.
And they angered him by their works and made him jealous with their idols, and he strengthened the plague against them suddenly.
Phinehas stood up and prayed and the plague was restrained.
And it was accounted to him justification for a generation of generations unto eternity.
And they angered him concerning the waters of strife and he afflicted Moses because of them.
Because they bitterly provoked his spirit and they spoke by his lips.
And they did not destroy the nations of which LORD JEHOVAH had spoken to them.
But they were mixed with the Gentiles and they learned their works.
And they feared their idols and they were a stumbling block to them.
For they sacrificed their sons and their daughters to demons.
And they shed innocent blood, the blood of their sons and their daughters, whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan, and the land was defiled with blood.
