They were defiled by their works and they committed fornication with their inventions.
And the wrath of LORD JEHOVAH was provoked upon his people and he despised his inheritance.
He gave them over into the hand of the Gentiles and their haters were authorized over them.
And their enemies subdued them and they were subject under their hands.
Many times he delivered them and they bitterly provoked him in their minds and they were humbled in their evil.
And he saw their affliction and he heard their prayer.
And he has remembered his covenant and has shown mercy upon them and has led them according to the abundance of his grace.
And he gave them affection before all their captors.
Save us, LORD JEHOVAH, our God; gather us from the nations that we may confess your holy name and we shall be glorified in your inheritance.
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH, The God of Israel, from eternity and unto eternity; and all the people shall say, "Amen and amen"!
Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his grace is for eternity.
The redeemed of LORD JEHOVAH will say that he saved them from the hand of the oppressor.
From all the lands he gathered them: from the East and from the West, from the North and from the Sea.
And they were lost in the wilderness of the deserts and they did not find the road of an inhabited city.
They were hungry and thirsty and their souls were agitated.
They begged of LORD JEHOVAH in their sufferings and he brought them out from their griefs.
He walked them in the way of truth to go to inhabited cities.
His righteous ones shall thank LORD JEHOVAH for his mercies upon the sons of men.
Because he satisfies the afflicted souls and he fills the hungry soul:
Those who sit in darkness and in the shadows of death, and are bound in poverty and in irons.
Because they bitterly provoked the Word of God and rejected the counsel of The Highest
He broke their heart with toil and they were sick and there was no helper for them.
And they prayed to LORD JEHOVAH in their adversity and he saved them from their adversity.
He brought them out from darkness and from the shadow of death and he cut their bonds.
His righteous ones shall confess to LORD JEHOVAH that his mercies are upon the children of men.
Because he shattered the gates of brass and has cut down the bars of iron.
He helped them from the way of their sins and they were humbled by their evils.
Their souls had hated all food and had arrived unto the gates of death.
They begged LORD JEHOVAH in their sufferings and he brought them out from their adversity.
He sent his word and he healed them and delivered them from destruction.
His righteous ones shall confess LORD JEHOVAH for his mercies upon the children of men.
Sacrifice to him sacrifices of praise; praise his works with his wonders!
Those who go down to the sea in ships and do work in the great waters
They have seen the works of LORD JEHOVAH and his wonders in the depths of the sea!
For he has raised up the wind of hurricanes and the waves of the sea were lifted up.
They went up to the sky and went down to the abyss and their soul staggered within them.
They shook and were agitated like drunkards and all their wisdom came to nothing.
They cried to LORD JEHOVAH in their sufferings and he brought them out from their adversity.
He calmed the hurricanes and they stopped and the waves of the sea were quieted.
And they rejoiced when they stopped; he led them to the haven that they had chosen.
His righteous ones shall thank LORD JEHOVAH for his mercies upon the children of men.
Praise him in the congregation of the nations and exalt him upon the seat of the Elders.
For he makes the rivers like the wilderness and the springs of water thirsty.
The land has given its fruit to a salt pit by the works of the evil ones who inhabit it.
For he makes the wilderness pools of waters and a thirsty land into springs of waters.
He makes the hungry to dwell there and they have built cities and have dwelt in them.
They sowed the fields and they planted vineyards and they ate from the fruit of their crops.
He blessed them and they multiplied greatly and he did not diminish their cattle.
And they decreased and they were humbled in the abundance of evil and of misery.
He casts evil upon Rulers and makes them wander in a trackless waste without a road.
And he strengthened the poor and he made their families like flocks.
For the righteous ones will see and will rejoice and all the evil ones will shut their jaws.
He who is wise will keep these things and will make known the mercy of LORD JEHOVAH.
My heart is ready, oh God, my heart is ready; I shall glorify and sing praise in my honor.
Awake, my harp, awake, psaltery and harp, and I shall awake in the morning.
I shall thank you among the peoples, oh God, and I shall sing praise to your Name among the peoples.

Gilead is mine; Menasheh is mine; Ephraim is the defender of my head; Yehuda is my King!

Who will escort me into the strong city and who will lead me unto Edom?
Behold, you are God, you have forgotten us and you do not go forth with our armies.

God of my praise, do not be silent!
Because the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of the deceiver is opened against me; they have spoken with me with a false tongue.

In exchange for my love they regarded me with malice, and I have been praying for them.
They paid me evil for good and hatred for love.
Command evil against them and Satan shall stand at their right hand!

Their days will be few and whatever is kept for them others will take.
Their children shall be orphans and their wives, widows.

The creditor will seize upon all that they have and foreigners will weaken their power.

Because they did not remember to do good and they persecuted the poor and afflicted him whose heart grieves to death.

Because I am poor and afflicted my heart is troubled within me.

Israel will say, "My torturers have increased from my youth!"
My torturers have increased from my youth and they have not prevailed over my power.
The scourgers scourged upon my back and prolonged their affliction.
LORD JEHOVAH is righteous and cuts off the expectations of the evil ones.
All the haters of Zion shall turn their backside.
They shall be like the grass of the rooftop which the wind pulls out and dries up when it blows upon it.
And the reaper does not fill his palm with it, neither does the sheave binder strip it.
Neither do those who pass through say, "The blessing of LORD JEHOVAH be upon you; we bless you in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH." Ps
From the deep I called you, LORD JEHOVAH!
And you heard my voice; your ears will be listening to us, to the voice of my supplication.
If you keep sins, LORD JEHOVAH, who is able to stand?
Because from your presence is forgiveness.
I have hoped in LORD JEHOVAH and my soul has waited for his word.
I have waited for LORD JEHOVAH from the watch of dawn and unto the watch of the morning.
Let Israel expect LORD JEHOVAH because from his presence are compassions and great salvation is with him.
And he will save Israel from all his evil.
LORD JEHOVAH, my heart is not lifted up, neither are my eyes lifted up, neither have I walked in a pretense of things greater than I.
But my soul is humbled like one weaned of his mother, and my soul is like one weaned of me.
But let Israel hope in LORD JEHOVAH from now and unto eternity.
LORD JEHOVAH, remember David and all his affliction!
For he swore to LORD JEHOVAH and vowed to the God of Jacob:
I shall not enter to the roof of my house; I shall not ascend to the mattress of my bed,
I shall not give sleep to my eyes, neither slumber to my eyebrows
Until I find a place for LORD JEHOVAH and a tent for the God of Jacob.
Behold, we heard it in Ephrata and we found it in the fields.
We shall enter his tabernacle and we shall worship at the stool of his feet.
Arise, LORD JEHOVAH, to your rest, you and the ark of your might!
Your priests will wear righteousness and your righteous ones, glory.
Because of David your Servant, do not turn away the face of your Anointed.
LORD JEHOVAH has sworn to David in truth and he will not turn from it: "One from the fruits of your loins I shall set upon your throne.”
If your sons will keep my covenant: this testimony that I teach them, some also of their children will dwell to the eternity of eternities upon your throne
Because LORD JEHOVAH is pleased in Zion and he chose it a dwelling place.
This is my rest to an eternity of eternities; here I shall sit because I desired it.
And I shall bless her game and her poor ones I shall satisfy with bread.
I shall clothe her priests with salvation and her righteous ones in glory.
There I shall make the trumpet of David shine and I will shine a lamp for his Anointed.
And I shall clothe his enemies in shame, and upon him my holiness will flourish.
How good and how beautiful for brothers when they dwell as one
It is like oil that descends upon the head and upon the beard, the beard of Aaron, that descends upon the collar of his garment
Like the dew of Hermon that descends upon the mountain of Zion, because there LORD JEHOVAH commanded the blessing and the Life unto eternity.
Bless LORD JEHOVAH, all you Servants of LORD JEHOVAH, those who stand in his house and in the courts of the house of LORD JEHOVAH at night.
Lift up your hands unto Holiness and bless LORD JEHOVAH!
LORD JEHOVAH will bless you from Zion, he who made Heaven and Earth!
Praise the Name of LORD JEHOVAH, praise, oh Servants of LORD JEHOVAH!
Those who stand in the house of LORD JEHOVAH and in the courts of the house of our God.
Praise LORD JEHOVAH because he is good; sing to his Name because it is sweet!
Because LORD JEHOVAH has chosen Jacob for himself and Israel for his congregation!
Because I know that LORD JEHOVAH, our Lord, is greater than all gods!
And all that LORD JEHOVAH pleases, he does in Heaven and in Earth and in the seas and in all the depths!
He brings up clouds from the ends of the Earth and he made lightnings for the rain; he will bring forth the winds from storehouses!
For he struck the firstborn ones of Egypt, from the children of men and unto the animals.
He sent his signs and his wonders within mighty Egypt upon Pharaoh and upon all his Servants
He who struck many peoples and killed Kings.
Sihon, King of the Amorites and Og, King of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan.
He gave their land as an inheritance to Israel his people.
LORD JEHOVAH, your Name is to eternity; LORD JEHOVAH, your remembrance is for a generation of generations.
Because LORD JEHOVAH judges his people and he is comforted in his Servants.
The idols of the Gentiles are silver and gold, the work of the hands of man.
They have mouths and they do not speak; they have eyes and they do not see.
They have ears and they do not hear, neither is there breath in their mouths.
Their makers shall be like them and all who trust upon them.
House of Israel, bless LORD JEHOVAH! House of Aaron, bless LORD JEHOVAH!
House of Levi, bless LORD JEHOVAH! Worshipers of LORD JEHOVAH, bless LORD JEHOVAH!
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH from Zion, he who dwells in Jerusalem!
Give thanks to LORD JEHOVAH, because he is good, and his mercies are to eternity.
Give thanks to the God of gods, for his mercies are to eternity.
Give thanks to Lord of Dominions, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who alone does great wonders, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who made the Heavens in his wisdom, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who spread out the earth upon the waters, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who made great lights, for his mercies are to eternity.
The sun for a ruler of the day, for his mercies are to eternity.
The moon and the stars for rulers of the night, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who struck the firstborn of Egypt, for his mercies are to eternity.
For he brought out Israel from the midst of them, for his mercies are to eternity.
With a strong hand and with a high arm, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who divided The Sea of Reeds, for his mercies are to eternity.
And he made Israel pass into it, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who struck Pharaoh and his army in The Sea of Reeds, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who led his people in the desert, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who struck great Kings, for his mercies are to eternity.
And he killed mighty Kings, for his mercies are to eternity.
Sihon, King of the Amorites, for his mercies are to eternity.
And Og, King of Bashan, for his mercies are to eternity.
For he gave their lands as an inheritance, for his mercies are to eternity.
An inheritance to Israel his Servant, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who remembered us in our humiliation, for his mercies are to eternity.
And he saved us from our enemies, for his mercies are to eternity.
To him who gives food to all flesh, for his mercies are to eternity.
Give thanks to God who is in Heaven, for his mercies are to eternity.
By the rivers of Babel, there we sat and we wept, when we remembered Zion.
Upon the willows within it we hung our harps.
Because there they asked and they wanted the words of songs, and those leading us said to us, "Sing to us of the songs of Zion.”
How will we sing to you the praises of LORD JEHOVAH in a foreign land?
If I forget you, oh, Jerusalem, let my right hand forget me!
And let my tongue cleave to the roof of my palate, unless I remember you, unless I shall go up to Jerusalem, my chief joy!
LORD JEHOVAH has remembered the children of Edom in the day of Jerusalem, when they said, "Lay bare, lay bare unto its foundations"!
Daughter of Babel, destroyer, Blessed is he who will pay you the reward which you have paid us!
Blessed is he who will seize your infants and will dash the rocks!
I shall confess you, LORD JEHOVAH, from my whole heart; in front of Kings I shall sing praise to you!
I shall worship in the temple of your holiness and I shall give thanks to your Name for your kindness and for your truth, because you have extolled your Word above every name!
In the day that I called you, you answered me, and you have increased the strength of my soul.
All the Kings of the Earth shall confess to you, LORD JEHOVAH, because they have heard the speech of your mouth!
And they will praise the way of LORD JEHOVAH, because the honor of LORD JEHOVAH is great!
And high is LORD JEHOVAH who sees in the deep, and he who is exalted knows from afar off!
If I walk in trouble, you will save me! In the anger of my enemies you will reach your hand and your right hand will save me!
LORD JEHOVAH, abide upon me! LORD JEHOVAH, your mercies are to eternity and you will not desert the work of your hands!
LORD JEHOVAH, you have searched me and you have known me.
You know my sitting and my rising; you have understood my reasonings from the high place.
You know my way and my steps and you have investigated all my ways.
If there is an alteration in my language, you, LORD JEHOVAH, know all these things.
For from the beginning to the end you have formed me, and you have set your hand upon me.
The knowledge and the wonder are stronger than I and I could not master them.
Where shall I go from your Spirit and where shall I hide from before you?
If I shall ascend to Heaven, there you are, and if I would descend to Sheol, you are there also!
If I shall lift my wings like an Eagle's and dwell at the end of the Sea
There also your hand will hold me and your right hand will lead me.
You have said, "The darkness will shine to me and the night will shine upon my face."
And the darkness will not darken from you, the night will shine like the day and the darkness as the light.
Because you have prepared my kidneys and you have carried me from the womb of my mother.
I shall give thanks to you because of the wonders that you have done, for your works are exalted and my soul knows it well.
And my bones were not hidden from you; when I was made in secret, I went down to the lower parts of the earth.
And my eyes saw my germination upon your Scriptures; all these things were written; behold, the days were cut short, and there was no person in them.
But your friends are very precious to me, oh, God, and they have strengthened their rulers greatly.
I shall count them and they will be multiplied more than the sand; I awoke and again I am with you!
Surely you will kill the sinners, oh God, and men of blood will pass from me!
Because they have spoken against you and they have taken your city without a cause!
I hate those who hate you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I am enraged against those who stand against you!
I have hated them with a complete hatred and they are enemies to me.
Search me, oh God, and know my heart, and prove me and know my steps
And see if there is a way of lies in me; lead me in your eternal way!
Save me, LORD JEHOVAH, from the evil man, and keep me from evil men.
For they have conceived evil in their heart and they have provoked disputes all day
Who have sharpened their tongues like a snake and the venom of an asp is under their lips.
Keep me, LORD JEHOVAH, from the hand of the evil, and keep me from men who are extortionists, who have schemed to overthrow my steps.
And the proud have hidden snares for me and they spread the cords of their nets upon my path and cast nets over me!
I said to LORD JEHOVAH, "You are my God! Give ear to the voice of my prayer!"
LORD JEHOVAH, my mighty Savior! The shelter of my head in the day of war!
LORD JEHOVAH, do not grant the lust of the evil man and do not exalt his plot for my head.
The evil of their lips will cover them.
And coals will come down upon them and they will fall into fire and they will not be able to rise.
A talkative man will not be established in the earth and evil will hunt the evil man to destruction.
I know that LORD JEHOVAH performs the judgment of the poor and the judgment of the afflicted.
But the righteous shall confess your Name and the upright will dwell in front of your face.
LORD JEHOVAH, I have called you; answer me, give ear and accept my words.
My prayer came before you like incense, and an offering of my hands like the evening offering.
LORD JEHOVAH, set a guard at my mouth and a guard for my lips
That my heart would not turn aside to an evil word or do evil works with wicked men. I shall not eat salt with them.
The Righteous One will teach me and will rebuke me; the oil of the wicked will not anoint my head because my prayer is against their evil companions.
And their Judges were restrained by the hand of The Stone, and they heard my words, for they are sweet.
Like a plowshare tears open the Earth, their bones are scattered over the mouth of Sheol.
And I have lifted my eyes up to you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I have trusted upon you; do not cast out my soul.
Keep me from the hand of the boastful, for they have hidden snares for me.
The evil will fall as one into their nets as I pass by.
With my voice to LORD JEHOVAH I cried; with my voice to LORD JEHOVAH I made supplication.
And I poured before him my supplication and have shown before him my affliction.
When my spirit was troubled, you knew my path; in the way of my steps they have hidden snares for me.
I looked to the right and I saw there was none to advise me; a place of refuge was lost to me and there was no avenger for my soul.
I cried to you, LORD JEHOVAH, and I have said:" You are my hope and my portion in the land of life."
Give ear to my request because I have been very humbled; save me from my persecutors, because they are stronger than I.
Bring my soul out from prison, for I shall praise your Name and your righteous ones will wait for me when you reward me.
Hear my prayer, LORD JEHOVAH, and give ear to my request; answer me in your speech and in your righteousness.
Do not bring your Servant to judgment, because no one who lives is innocent before you.
Because the enemy pursues my soul and he has humbled my life in the Earth and made me to dwell in darkness like the dead for eternity.
My spirit is troubled against me and my heart is moved within me.
And I have remembered you, LORD JEHOVAH, from the first, and I have meditated on all your works and have meditated on the work of your hands.
And I have stretched forth my hands to you; my soul is thirsty for you like the ground.
Answer me quickly, LORD JEHOVAH, because my spirit is spent; do not turn your face from me, lest I be handed over with the descenders to the pit.
Make me hear your kindness at dawn, because I trust upon you; show me your road that I may go in it, because to you, LORD JEHOVAH, I have lifted up my soul.
Save me from my enemies!
And teach me to do your pleasure, because you are my God; your Spirit is sweet; you will lead me in the way of life.
Because of your Name, LORD JEHOVAH, comfort me, and because of your righteousness, bring my soul out from trouble.
In your kindness, stop those who hate me, and destroy the enemies of my soul, because I am your Servant!
Blessed is LORD JEHOVAH who teaches my hands for war and my fingers for battle!
The house of my refuge and my deliverer, my helper, upon whom I trust and he subdues the people under me!
LORD JEHOVAH, what is a son of man that you know him, and a son of man that you think much of him?
A son of man is like a vapor and his days pass away like smoke.
Bend Heaven, LORD JEHOVAH, and come down, and severely rebuke the mountains and they will be reduced to smoke!
Cause your lightnings to flash and trouble them; send your arrows and scatter them.
Reach your hand from the high place and draw me out of many waters and from the hand of the evil ones!
For their mouths speak emptiness and their right hand is the right hand of evil.
Oh God, I shall sing a new song to you, and with a harp of ten strings I shall sing praise to you!
For he gave salvation to the King and he delivered David his Servant from the sword of evil.
Save me from the hand of the evil whose mouths speak futility and their right hand is the right hand of evil.
Our sons are like plants that grow from their youth and our daughters like brides adorned in the likeness of temples.
Our garners are full and overflowing, each one. Our sheep bear young and increase in our marketplaces.
Our herds increase and there is none sterile among them; there is no ruin neither outcry in our streets!
Blessed is the people that is so. Blessed is the people whose God is LORD JEHOVAH!
I shall exalt you, my Lord, the King, and I shall bless your Name for an eternity of eternities!
Every day I shall bless you and I shall glorify your name for an eternity of eternities!
Great is our Lord and very glorious and there is no end to his greatness!
Generation to generation they will tell your works and they will show your heroism!
And they will relate the might of your awesomeness and they will tell your greatness.
And they will speak the awesomeness of your might and I shall tell your greatness.
Your righteous ones will seek the remembrance of your many favors and they will find.
LORD JEHOVAH is merciful and cherishing; he is patient and his grace is abundant.
LORD JEHOVAH is good and his mercies are upon all his works.
LORD JEHOVAH, your Servants shall give thanks to you and your righteous ones shall praise you!
They will tell the glory of your kingdom and they will speak by your might
To show the sons of men your heroism in the glory of your kingdom.
Your Kingdom is a Kingdom of all the ages and your authority is unto all generations of generations. LORD JEHOVAH is faithful in his words and righteous in all his works.*
LORD JEHOVAH sustains all who fall and he straightens all who are stooped.
The eyes of everyone are raised to you; you give them food in their times.
You open your hand and satisfy the desire of everyone who lives.
LORD JEHOVAH is righteous in all his ways and compassionate in all his works.
LORD JEHOVAH is near to those who call to him in truth.
And he performs the desire of his worshipers; he hears their prayer and saves them.
LORD JEHOVAH keeps all his worshipers and all the evil ones he destroys.
I shall speak the praises of LORD JEHOVAH with my mouth and all the children of flesh will bless The Name of his Holiness to an eternity of eternities.
Praise LORD JEHOVAH, my soul!
I shall glorify LORD JEHOVAH with my life and I shall sing praise my God while I endure.
Do not trust a prince or upon a son of man, for there is no salvation in his hand.
For his spirit goes out and he returns to his earth and in that day all his thoughts are destroyed.
Blessed is he whose help is in the God of Jacob and his hope is upon LORD JEHOVAH his God
He who made Heaven and Earth and the seas and all that is in them; he keeps truth for eternity.
And he executes judgment for the oppressed, he gives bread to the hungry; LORD JEHOVAH releases prisoners.
LORD JEHOVAH opens the blind eyes. LORD JEHOVAH straightens the stooped ones. LORD JEHOVAH loves the righteous.
LORD JEHOVAH also keeps the poor; he nourishes the orphans and the widows and he drowns the way of the evil.
LORD JEHOVAH reigns to eternity and your God, oh, Zion, for a generation of generations!
It is good to sing to our God, and sweet, and praise is fitting for him.
LORD JEHOVAH built Jerusalem and the scattered ones of Israel he gathered.
He heals the broken hearts and binds up their sorrows.
He counts the number of the stars and he calls all of them by names.
Great is our Lord and he is strong in his power and there is no end to his understanding.
LORD JEHOVAH raises the poor and humbles the evil unto the dirt.
Praise LORD JEHOVAH with glory; sing to LORD JEHOVAH with harps
Who hides Heaven with clouds; he gives rain upon the Earth and he makes the grass sprout upon the mountains.
And he gives food to the beasts and to the young ravens that cry.
LORD JEHOVAH does not delight in the power of a horse, neither delights in the legs of a mighty man.
But LORD JEHOVAH delights in his worshipers and those who expect his grace.
Praise LORD JEHOVAH, oh, Jerusalem; praise your God, oh, Zion!
Because he has strengthened the bars of your gates and blessed your sons within you.
He established your borders in peace and he satisfied you with the fatness of wheat.
He sends his word upon Earth and his answer runs quickly.
He gives snow like wool and he scatters frost like ashes.
He casts ice like morsels; who can stand before his cold?
He sends his word and melts them; he makes the winds blow and the waters flow.
He shows his word in Jacob, his laws and his commandments in Israel.
He has not done so for all the nations, neither has he shown them his judgments.
Praise LORD JEHOVAH from Heaven; praise him in high places!
Praise him, all his angels! Praise him all his hosts!
Praise him, Sun and Moon! Praise him, all stars and lights!
Praise him, Heaven of Heavens; The waters higher than the Heavens!
Let them praise The Name of LORD JEHOVAH because he spoke and they existed; he commanded and they were created!
He established them for an eternity of eternities. He gave the law and it does not pass.
Praise LORD JEHOVAH from the Earth, dragons and all the depths!
Fire and hail stones and snow and ice, wind and hurricanes, Servants of his word!
The mountains and all these hills, trees of fruit and all cedars!
Animals and all cattle creeping things and flying things and birds!
Kings of the earth and all peoples, Princes and all Judges of the earth!
Boys and virgins, old men and young men,
Let them praise The Name of LORD JEHOVAH, because his Name alone is great; his glory is in the earth and in the Heavens!
He raises the trumpet of his people in praise to all his righteous ones, and to the children of Israel, a people that is near to him.
Sing to LORD JEHOVAH a new song, his glory in the congregation of the righteous!
Let Israel rejoice in his Maker and let the children of Zion rejoice in their King!
And they will praise his Name with tambourines and with timbrels and with harps; let them sing to him!
Because LORD JEHOVAH is pleased with his people and he gives salvation to the poor.
Let the righteous ones be strengthened in honor and they will praise him upon their beds.
They will exalt God in their throats with a dual edged sword in their hands
To exact vengeance from the Gentiles and reproof from the peoples
To bind their kings in shackles and their honorable ones in chains of iron
To do for them the judgment that is written. Glory to all his righteous ones!
Praise LORD JEHOVAH in his Holiness! Praise him in the firmament of his strength!
Praise him in his power! Praise him in the multitude of his greatness!
Praise him with the sound of the horn; praise him with harps and with lyres.
Praise him with tambourines and with timbrels; praise him with sweet strings.
Praise him with loud cymbals; praise him with voice and with shouting!
Everything breathing, praise LORD JEHOVAH!

name: Proverbs
chapters: The Proverbs of Solomon, son of David, King of Israel.
To know wisdom and instruction and to notice the words of intelligence;
To receive instruction and awe and righteousness and judgment and uprightness;
To give children cunning and to boys knowledge and intelligence.
A wise man will listen and will add to his wisdom and the intelligent will gain leadership
To perceive proverbs and parables and the words of the wise and their riddles.
The chief wisdom is the awe of LORD JEHOVAH, but the evil despise knowledge and instruction.
Hear, my son, the law of your father and do not forget the law of your mother.
For they are beauty to your head and a necklace for your neck.
My son if sinners entice you, do not consent,
And if they say to you "Come with us, let us lay wait for blood and hide for the innocent in depravity
And we will swallow him alive like Sheol, and one without blemish like those descending into the pit;
We will find all his wealth and his stuff and fill our houses with loot;
Cast your lot with us and each of us will have a money bag."
My son, do not go in the way with them, but withhold your foot from their paths,
Because their feet run to evil and hasten to shed innocent blood.
It is by deceit that nets are spread for a bird.
And they lay wait for blood and hide themselves.
So are the ways of all who do evil and take the lives of their Masters.
Wisdom is praised in the market and raises her voice in the street.
She preaches in the chief streets and she speaks her words in the entrances of the city gates.
How long, children, will you love childishness, and you mockers desire mockery, and you fools hate knowledge?
If you turn to my reproof, I shall bring forth my Spirit to you, and I shall show you my word.
For I have cried, and you have not believed, and I have lifted my voice and you have not listened.
And you despise all my counsels and you were not pleased with my reproof.
I also shall laugh over your destruction and I shall rejoice when tumult and destruction suddenly comes upon you.
And your destruction will come like a hurricane, and when trouble and adversity comes against them,
Then they will call on me and I shall not answer them, and they will come early to my presence and they will not find me
Because they hated knowledge and they did not choose the worship of LORD JEHOVAH.
And they did not choose my counsel and they have rejected all my reproof.
And they will eat of the fruit of their ways and they will be filled with their counsels.
Because of this, the turning away of the children will kill them, and the error of feeble minds will destroy them.
And he who hears me will dwell in hope and will be quiet from the multitude of evils.
My son, if you receive my words, and hide my commandments in your heart
And you will incline your ear to wisdom and turn your heart to understanding
And call to understanding and lift up your voice to intelligence
And you will seek it as silver and you will search it out as treasure
Then you will understand the awe of LORD JEHOVAH and you will find the knowledge of God.
Because LORD JEHOVAH gives wisdom, and from his mouth, knowledge and understanding.
And he keeps hope for those who are upright and helps those who walk without blemish.
And he keeps the ways of justice; the ways of his pure ones he will preserve.
Then you will understand righteousness and justice and uprightness of all excellent ways
When wisdom will enter your heart and knowledge will be sweet to your soul.
A good mind will keep you and the intelligence of the good will deliver you
That you may be delivered from evil ways and from men speaking contradictions
Who leave the upright way and they walk in the way of darkness.
And they rejoice to do evil and they rejoice in the lifestyle of the evil.
Their ways are perverted and their paths are crooked.
Wisdom will deliver you from an estranged woman who subverts by her words
Who has left the rearing of her childhood and has forgotten the covenant of her God.
She has forgotten the doorposts of her house and the steps of her paths.
None who enter unto her return, neither remember the way of life.
Walk therefore in the way of the good and keep the way of the righteous ones
Because the upright dwell in the land and those without blemish are spared in it
And dissenters are consumed from the Earth and the evil are uprooted from it.
My son, do not forget my law and let your heart keep my commandments
Because the length of days and the years of life they will add to you.
And let not peace, favor and truth forsake you; bind them on your neck and write them upon the tablet of your heart
That you may find mercies and grace and intelligence in the presence of God and in the presence of the children of men.
Hope in LORD JEHOVAH from your whole heart and do not trust upon the wisdom of your soul.
Know him in all your ways and he straightens your paths.
Do not be wise in your own eyes but be in awe of LORD JEHOVAH and depart from evil
That there may be healing to your flesh and fatness to your bones.
Honor LORD JEHOVAH from your possessions and from the best of all your increase
And your barns will be filled with fullness and your wine presses will pour forth wine.
My son, do not reject the discipline of LORD JEHOVAH and do not neglect his admonition to you
Because the one whom LORD JEHOVAH loves, he disciplines, as a father disciplines his son.
Blessed is the man who finds wisdom and the son of man who finds understanding
Because its merchandise is better than the merchandise of silver, and the excellencies of its increase than refined gold,
For it is more valuable than precious stones and nothing is comparable to it.
The length of days is in her right hand; wealth and honor in her left.
Her ways are the ways of sweetness and all her paths are peace.
She is a tree of life to those who hold her fast and blessed are those who look for her.
LORD JEHOVAH in his wisdom laid the foundations of the Earth and the Heavens were established by his understanding;
And in his knowledge the depths were broken up and the clouds sprinkle dew.
My son, let not your eyes depart from keeping my teaching and my counsels.
And it shall be Life to your soul and Grace to your neck.
And then you will walk your ways in hope and you will not stumble by your foot.
And you will sleep and be unafraid, and you will lie down, and sleep will be sweet to you.
And you will not be afraid of trouble that comes suddenly, or of the rush of sinners when it comes.
Because LORD JEHOVAH shall be with you and will keep your foot from being caught.
Do not refrain from doing what is beautiful as long as you are able.
And when you have possessions, do not say to your neighbor, "Go, and come again tomorrow, and I shall give to you."
Do not devise evil against your neighbor who sits with you in the quiet.
Do not judge with a man by deceit,
And do not envy an evil man, neither desire any of his ways;
Because an evil one is defiled before LORD JEHOVAH and the discourses of LORD JEHOVAH are with the upright.
The curse of LORD JEHOVAH is in the houses of the evil and he will bless the dwellings of the righteous.
And he will overthrow mockers, and he will hover over the wise.
The wise will inherit honor and fools will receive disgrace.
Hear, children, the instruction of a father, and listen to knowledge and understanding.
Because I have given you good teaching, forsake not my law.
For I have been a delightful son to my father and an only child in the presence of my mother.
And he taught me and said to me, "Confirm my word in your heart; keep my commandments and live, and my law like the pupils of the eyes.”
Get wisdom and get understanding, and do not turn aside from the sayings of my mouth.
Do not forsake her that she may keep you; love her that she may deliver you.
Wisdom is the summit; get wisdom, and with all your possessions purchase understanding.
Love her that she may exalt you and embrace her that she may honor you.
And she will put the beauty of grace on your head and she will satisfy you with a crown of glory.
Hear, my son, and receive my words, and the years of your life will be many.
I have taught you the ways of wisdom and I have led you in the straight paths.
And when you walk, your walking will not quake, and if you run, you will not stumble.
Hold my instruction fast and do not forsake her; keep her because she is your life.
Do not go in the way of sinners and do not envy the way of the evil.
Do not pass through the place where they dwell, but turn aside and pass from it.
They do not sleep until they do evil and their sleep flees away until they do their desires.
Because their food is the food of evil and they drink the wine of depravity.
But the way of the righteous ones is like the shining light, and the light progresses until the day is established.
But the way of the wicked is darkness and they do not know on what they stumble.
My son, give ear to my words and incline your ear to my speech.
Do not let them depart before your eyes but keep them within your heart.
Because he who finds them has life, and all healing in his flesh.
Keep your heart with all caution because from it is the outgoing of life.
Cause the perverse mouth to pass from you, and put far from your lips the thought of depravity.
Let your eyes see in uprightness and let your eyelashes be straight before you.
Let your foot pass from evil streets and all your ways will be established.
Do not turn aside to the right or to the left, but remove your foot from evil.
My son, give ear to my wisdom and incline your ear to my sayings
So that you heed counsel and your lips will keep knowledge.
Because the lips of an estranged woman are dripping honey and her words are softer than oil.
But their end is of bitter wormwood, for they are sharper than a doubleedged sword
And her legs marry to death; her walk causes men to recline in Sheol.
And she treads not in the way of life, for her paths lead them astray and they are unknown.
Therefore children, hear me, and do not turn away from the words of my mouth.
Remove your way far from her and do not go near the door of her house
Lest you give others your power and your years to those who are merciless
And foreigners will be filled with your power and your labor enter into the house of strangers
And your soul moves you to regret in your old age when the flesh of your body is wasted
And you will say, "Why have I hated instruction and my heart has despised reproof"
And I have not listened to the voice of my teachers, and to my instructors have not turned my ear?
I have been in almost every evil in the assembly and in the congregation.
Drink waters from your well and running waters from your spring,
And let your waters overflow in your streets and let them travel in your streets.
And let them be to you alone, and let not estranged males be sexual partners with you.
And your fountain shall be blessed and rejoice with the wife of your youth
An affectionate hind and an affectionate mountain goat; learn her ways always and think on her love.
Do not go astray, my son, with an estranged woman, neither embrace the bosom of an estranged woman.
Because the ways of a man are in front of LORD JEHOVAH and all his paths are open before him.
The evil man will be held captive in his debts and he will be bound in the cords of his sins.
He will die without instruction and in the abundance of his error he will be led astray.
My son, if you are security for your friend, you have yielded your hand to a stranger.
You are trapped by the saying of your mouth and you are taken by the speech of your lips.
Do thus my son and be delivered because you are security for the person of your friend; you have fallen into the hands of your enemy. Coax therefore your friend, for whom you are security
And you shall not give sleep to your eyes neither slumber to your eyelids
That you may be delivered like a deer from a net and like a bird from a snare.
Be like the ant and see her ways and learn, for there is no harvest for her,
And there is no ruler over her, neither anyone to drive her.
And she prepares for herself her bread from the summer and she stores her food at harvest.
How long will you sleep, sluggard? When will you arise from your sleep?
You will slumber a little, and a little you will sleep, and for a little you will put your hand upon your chest.
Poverty will come upon you and want will overtake you like an athletic man.
A foolish evil man walks in rebellion.
He winks with his eyes and strikes with his feet and he signals with his fingers,
And he is turned backward in his heart and devises evil always, and he stirs up strife between two.
Because of this, his ruin will come suddenly and suddenly he will be broken, and there will be no remedy for him.
There are six things that LORD JEHOVAH hates, and his soul has despised a seventh:
Lofty eyes and the false tongue, hands that shed innocent blood,
The heart that makes plans of depravity and feet that hasten to run to evil,
A false witness who speaks lies and deception among brothers.
Keep, my son, the commandment of your father and do not forget the law of your mother.
Fasten them in your heart permanently and coil them around your neck.
And whenever you walk, make them cleave to you and they will be with you; keep them that they may keep you, and when you are awakened, they will be your meditation.
For the commandment is a lamp and the law is a light, and reproof is the way of life and instruction,
To keep you from the evil woman and from the slander of the tongue of the estranged woman.
Do not desire her beauty in your heart and do not be ensnared by her eyes, neither let her capture you with her eyelids.
For the comparison of a woman who is a harlot is like a loaf of bread, and a man's wife hunts the precious soul.
Does a man put fire in his bosom and do his garments not burn?
Or does a man walk upon coals of fire and his feet are unharmed?
So he who goes unto the wife of his neighbor and touches her will not be innocent.
And not to wonder at one who is caught stealing, because he steals to satisfy himself when he is hungry.
And if he is caught stealing, he pays each sevenfold, and he gives all the possessions of his house.
But he who commits adultery with a woman lacks intelligence and is destroying his soul.
And he is working to bring disgrace to himself and it apprehends him, and his shame will not be forgotten.
For because the anger of a husband is full of jealousy, he has no pity in the day of vengeance.
He does not accept the appearance of a gift, neither does he consent when you increase bribes to him.
My son, keep my words and hide my commandments in your heart.
Keep my commandments and live, and my law like the pupil of the eye.
Tie them on your neck and write them upon the tablets of your heart.
Say to wisdom, " You are my sister”, and to understanding, "My expounder of knowledge.”
For it will keep you from the estranged woman whose words are seductive.
Because she looked out from a window of her house and from the balcony
And she saw children and gazed on the boys and on the feebleminded
Who pass by in the street, beside the corner of the road of her house.
At evening, at setting of the sun, in the darkness of the night and in thick darkness
A woman went forth to meet him in the attire of a harlot to make the young men's hearts flutter.
She is rebellious and a prodigal, and her feet do not rest in her house,
But she wanders outside from time to time in the streets, and she lies in wait on the corners.
And she caught him and kissed him, and her face was bold, and she said to him:
There are peace sacrifices today; I have paid my vows,
Therefore I went out to meet you, for I've been waiting to see you and I found you.
I have spread my bed on a carpet and with Egyptian bedspreads I have spread it;
I have sprinkled myrrh on my bed and saffron crocus and cinnamon.
Come let us delight in love until the morning and we shall embrace each other in desire,
For my husband has not been in the house; he is gone on the road far away.
He has taken the money bag of money in his hand and it will be for many days before he comes to his house.
And she deceived him with the multitude of her words; in the flattery of her lips unto him, she enticed him.
And he went after her like a child, and like a bull that goes with a butcher, and like a dog to captivity.
And like a stag when an arrow flies into its liver, he hastens like a living bird to a snare, and does not know that it is to the death of his soul that he goes.
Therefore, children, hear me and obey the words of my mouth.
Do not incline your heart to her ways and do not go astray in her paths
Because she has cast down a multitude of the slain and mighty ones; they all have been killed by her.
The paths of her house are the paths of Sheol, of those descending to the chambers of death.
Because of this, wisdom preaches, and understanding will answer you.
For on top of the high places is wisdom; between the roads and upon the side of the paths she stands.
Over the gates with her mouth she calls, and in the entrances of the gates of The Glorious City.
And she says, "To you, men, I call, and my voice to the children of men"
That children may understand subtlety and the feeble minds may know in their heart.
Hear me, because it is truth that I speak, and my mouth opens with uprightness.
For my mouth ruminates truth and lying lips are unclean before me.
And all these words of my mouth are in righteousness and there is no perversion or crookedness in them.
All these are plain to him who perceives them and they are right to him who chooses to know them.
Receive discipline and not silver, and choose for yourselves knowledge rather than refined gold.
"Because wisdom is better than refined gold and better than precious stones, and nothing compares to it.”
I, Wisdom, have created cunning and I own knowledge and reason.
The worship of LORD JEHOVAH is hating evil; pomp, pride, the evil way, and the perverse mouth, I hate.
Reason is mine and instruction; mine is understanding and mine is manly strength.
Because of me, Kings rule, and Rulers search out righteousness.
Because of me Rulers are authorized and Nobles and all Judges of righteousness.
I love my friends, and those who seek me will find me.
Riches and honor are mine, and possessions, old age and righteousness.
My fruits are better than refined gold and my produce than choice silver.
I walk in the way of righteousness and within the streets of judgment
That I might leave hope as an inheritance to my friends, and I shall fill their treasures.
LORD JEHOVAH created me at the beginning of his creation and from before all his works.
And before the world he was possessed by me, and from the beginning, before he would establish the Earth.
Before the depths would be, I was born, and before there would be waters in the springs.
And before the mountains would be established, and before the hills, I was formed in the womb.
Before he would make the Earth and the floods and the beginning of the dust of the world
When the Heavens were established, I was with him, and when he made a circle over the face of the depths.
And when he empowered the clouds from above and when he strengthened the springs of the depths,
When he set the law of the Sea and the waters would not disobey his mouth, when he made the foundations of the Earth,
I was fashioning with him; he was rejoicing in me every day, and I have been rejoicing before him always.
I have been rejoicing in the world of his Earth and I have been glorying in the sons of man.
Therefore, children, hear me: Blessed is he who keeps my ways.
Hear instruction and receive wisdom and do not go astray.
Blessed is the man who will listen to me and will keep watch upon my gates all day and guards the posts of my gates.
Because my goings forth are the goings forth of Life, and so the will of LORD JEHOVAH goes forth.
And those who sin against me harm their soul, and all who hate me are the friends of death.
Wisdom has built a house and she has set seven pillars in it.
And she has killed her sacrificial victim and she has mingled her wine and has prepared her table.
And she has sent her Servants to call upon the hills and they will say:
Who is simpleminded? Let him come to me, and whoever lacks his mind; And he said to him:
Come, eat of my bread and drink of the wine which I have mingled
Put off from you the deficiency of your mind, and live, and agree with the way of uprightness.
To an evil person, discipline gives disgrace, and it rebukes the vice of the evil one.
Do not rebuke an evil one, lest he hate you, but rebuke a wise one, for he will love you.
Give opportunity to a wise man that again he may learn wisdom, and teach the righteous that he may progress beyond his teacher.
The beginning of wisdom is the awe of LORD JEHOVAH and the knowledge of the Righteous Ones is understanding;
Because by it, your days will be multiplied, and years of life will be added to you.

My son, if you are wise, you are wise for yourself and for your friends, and if you will be evil, you alone will draw out your evils. The one who denies falsely, feeds on the winds and pursues a bird of the sky, for he has forsaken his service to travel in the desert without water, and from beside the path of his vineyard, and he forgets the trodden paths; he travels in thirst, and he will gather nothing!
A woman deficient in mind is alluring and she knows no shame.
She sits at the door of her house upon a high seat.
She calls passersby in the way who go straight on their ways and she says:
Who is it that is simple? Let him come to me, and he that is deficient in his mind. And one says to her:
Stolen waters are sweet, and secret bread is pleasant,

And he does not know that mighty men perish in her presence, and all that are summoned to her are in the depths of Sheol; but do not tarry in that place, and do not let your eye be caught by her, for so you should pass by the waters of strangers and the river of foreigners, and from the waters of foreigners you should not drink, so that many days and years of life will be added to you.
A wise son gladdens his father, and a son deficient in mind shames his mother.
There is no profit in the treasures of evil, but righteousness saves from death.
For LORD JEHOVAH will not famish the soul of the righteous, but the property of the evil he demolishes.
Poverty humbles a man but the hands of the diligent make rich.
He that works in summer is an intelligent son, and he who sleeps in harvest is a son that brings shame.
Blessing will be upon the head of the righteous and the mouth of the evil will conceal evil.
The memory of the righteous is for a blessing and the name of the evil will be extinguished.
For the wise will receive the commandment to his heart and he who is insane is caught by his lips.
He that walks in perfection goes in hope, and he who perverts his ways will be known.
He that winks with his eyes in deceit gives sorrow, and he who reproves openly makes peace.
The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life, and the mouths of the evil will hide evil.
Hatred stirs up judgment, and shame will cover all the evil ones.
Whoever brings forth wisdom from his lips beats the man lacking a heart with a staff.
The wise will conceal knowledge and the mouth of the hasty is near ruin.
The property of the rich is mighty fortress cities, and the ruin of the poor is their poverty.
The work of the Righteous One is for life and the fruits of the Evil One are for sin.
The way of life preserves instruction and he that hates rebuke is a moron.
The lips of the evil lie in wait in hostility and he that brings forth a curse is lacking a mind.
In the multitude of words the evil one is not saved and he who restrains his lips is intelligent.
The tongue of the righteous is choice silver and the heart of the evil is bitterness.
The lips of the righteous multiply compassion and the insane will die in the deficiency of their mind.
The blessing of LORD JEHOVAH makes rich and there shall be no sorrow with it.
A moron, in making merry, does evil, and a man has wisdom by his reasoning.
The evil one is dragged to destruction and hope is given to the righteous.
As the tornado passes suddenly so the evil one will be destroyed and not be found, but the foundation of the righteous one will be laid for eternity.
As unripe grapes hurt the teeth, and smoke the eyes, so evil hurts those practicing it.
The worship of LORD JEHOVAH will add days, and the years of the evil ones will be subtracted.
The hope of the righteous is with joy and the hope of the evil will perish.
The way of LORD JEHOVAH is power to the perfect, and ruin to evildoers.
The righteous will not be moved for eternity and the evil will not dwell in the Earth.
The mouth of the righteous speaks wisdom and a perverted tongue will be cut out.
The lips of the righteous know goodness, and the mouths of the evil are perverted.
LORD JEHOVAH despises the scales of deceit and he is pleased with correct scales.
Where corruption enters, disgrace enters, and wisdom is for the humble.
The hope of the upright will be built up, and the pride of the evil will be overthrown.
Wealth is not useful in the day of wrath but righteousness saves from death.
The righteousness of the perfect straightens his way and the evil one has fallen in his evil.
The righteousness of the upright will save them, and the evil will be captured in their evil.
Whenever an evil man has died, his hope has perished, and the hope of the evil perishes.
The righteous is delivered from trouble and the evil one will enter in his place.
With his mouth an evil one destroys his neighbor, and by knowledge the righteous shall be strengthened.
By the blessing of the righteous the city will be strong, and in the destruction of the evil it will rejoice.
The city will be exalted by the blessings of the upright and by the mouth of the evil it will be overthrown.
He that despises his neighbor is deficient in mind and a man of understanding dwells in quietness.
An adversary reveals a secret, and he who is faithful in his spirit will hide the matter.
A people that has no leadership will fall and its salvation is in much counsel.
The evil one does evil when he meets the righteous, because he hates those who await good news.
A loving woman upholds honor for the husband, but the woman who hates the truth is a throne of disgrace. Lazy men, even in their wealth, are needy, and strong men uphold knowledge.
A pure man lays down a good reward for his soul and an unmerciful man destroys his body.
The wicked does works of depravity, and truth is the reward of him who sows righteousness.
A son of righteousness has life and he who does evil has death.
LORD JEHOVAH despises the perverse heart and he delights in those who are without blemish in the way.
He that stretches his hand against his neighbor will not be innocent of evil, and the seed of the righteous will be delivered.
Like a nose ring of gold in the snout of the pig, so is a beautiful woman who has turned from discretion.
The desire of the righteous is in excellent things, and the hope of the evil, in sensual passion.
There is one that distributes seed and brings in much, and there is one who does not gather his own and has little.
The blessed soul will grow fat and an accursed one will again be cursed.
He that withholds produce in affliction they will send away to his enemies, and blessing will be upon the head of him that sells.
He that seeks good seeks delight, and he that seeks evil, it will come upon him.
He that trusts upon his wealth will fall, and the righteous ones will bud like leaves.

He that builds his house with depravity will leave groanings to his children. He that does not remain quietly in his house will distribute the winds to his children and the fool will be Servant to the wise.
The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life and the souls of the evil will be removed.
If the righteous lives with hardship, where will the wicked and the sinner be found?
He that loves discipline loves knowledge, and he that hates reproof is a fool.
It will be well for the man who keeps the will of LORD JEHOVAH and an evil man will be condemned.
A son of man will not be established in evil, and the root of the righteous will not move.
A valiant wife is the crown of her husband, and as a boring worm, and a worm in wood, the woman that does evil things destroys a husband.
The purposes of the righteous are justice, and the way of life of the evil is deceit.
The words of the evil lie in ambush for blood, and the mouth of the upright delivers them.
The evil will be overthrown and they will not be found, and the house of the righteous will be established.
The children of men praise the mouth of understanding and he who lacks his reasoning will be despised.
Better is a poor man who waits on himself than one who boasts and lacks bread.
The righteous one is aware of the soul of his animal, and the evil withhold their compassions.
He that cultivates the soil will be filled with bread, and he that runs after futility is devoid of reason.
The evil one lusts to do evil, and the root of the righteous ones will sprout.
The evil one is caught in the evil of his lips and the righteous escapes from trouble.
A good man will be satisfied from the fruit of his mouth and every son of man is rewarded according to the work of his hands.
The way of the fool is beautiful in his eyes, and he that listens to counsel is wise.
A fool immediately makes his wrath known and a cunning one hides his insult.
The righteous speaks obvious trustworthiness and the testimony of the evil is deceit.
There are those that speak a stabbing sword, but the tongue of the wise heals.
The lips of truth are right, and the hasty witness does evil with his tongue.
Deceit in the heart of the evil devises evil, and those that counsel peace will have joy.
Nothing depraved is good to the righteous man, and the evil are filled with evil.
LORD JEHOVAH despises false lips and he delights in those who practice faith.
A cunning man is a seat of knowledge, and the heart of fools proclaims evil.
The hand of the mighty will rule and the deceitful will be under tribute.
A fearful word troubles the heart of a man and a good word gladdens it.
The righteous gives good counsel to his friend and the way of the evil will mislead them.
Prey will not be taken for the deceitful man, but the precious possession of a man is choice.
In the way of righteousness is life, and the way of the angry is unto death.
A wise son hears his father and an evil son who does not receive reproof will perish.
A good man will be satisfied from the fruit of his mouth and the souls of the evil will be destroyed.
He that keeps his mouth takes care of his soul, and he that opens his lips works shipwreck to his soul.
A man that does not work always falls into lusts and the soul of the strong will grow fat.
The righteous hates a lying word, and the evil will be disgraced and put to shame.
Righteousness will keep him who is perfect in his way, and the sinner's sin will destroy him.
There are those who enrich themselves and have nothing, and there is one who makes himself poor and possesses an abundance.
The salvation of a man's soul is his wealth and the poor does not accept condemnation.
The light of the righteous will exult and the lamp of the evil will be put out.
An evil man in disgrace does evil, and those who are counseled are wise.
Property that comes by evil will decrease and he that gathers by righteousness will increase.
A man who begins to help is better than he that props up with hope, and the tree of life brings hope.

He that has contempt against the word will be destroyed by it, and he that is in awe of the commandment will be saved; there will be no favor to the deceitful man, and a wise man whose works are upright will lift up the head by his way.
The law of wisdom is a fountain of life to those who turn from the snares of death.
Good understanding gives compassion, and the way of the evil is unto destruction.
Everything that a wise one does is in knowledge, and a fool speaks emptiness.
An evil messenger falls into affliction and a trustworthy messenger is a healer.
Poverty and shame nullify instruction and he that keeps reproof will be praised.
An honorable desire will be sweet to the soul and the defilement of the evil is removed from knowledge.
He that walks with the wise will be wise, and he that walks with a fool will harm himself.
Sinners will pursue affliction, and the righteous ones will be given precious things.
A good man gives an inheritance to his grandchildren and the wealth of sinners is kept for the righteous.
Those who do not see the way of life for themselves destroy many years of wealth, and some are destroyed utterly.
Everyone that spares concerning his rod, hates his son, and he that loves his son disciplines him earnestly.
The righteous eats and satisfies his soul, and the belly of the evil will want.
A wise woman builds a house and the foolish woman destroys it with her hands.
He that walks in uprightness is in awe of LORD JEHOVAH and he that is shifty in his way despises him.
Provocation and disgrace are in the mouth of the fool, and the lips of the wise will preserve them.
Where there are no oxen, the stalls are clean, and the abundance of crops is by the power of the ox.
A trustworthy witness is not false and he that speaks falsehood is a false witness.
The evil one seeks wisdom and will not find it, and knowledge is found by the intelligent.
To the foolish man, everything is against him, and the lips of the wise are the weapons of knowledge.
A cunning one in his wisdom understands his way, and the way of fools is in error.
The households of the evil are rightly begging for cleansing, and the households of the righteous are acceptable.
Fools commit sins and upright children are willing.
The understanding heart always has sorrow to its soul and a stranger will not share in its joy. The household of the evil will be destroyed and the tent of the upright will exult.
There is a way that men think is right, and its ways are the ways of death.
Even in laughter the heart will sorrow, and the end of its joy is grief.
He who is rash in his heart will be filled with his ways, and a good man will be filled from the awe of his soul.
A child believes every word, and a cunning one distinguishes good from evil.
A wise one is afraid and departs from evil, and the fool partakes in it confidently.
Nothing a hasty man does is advised and a wise man is temperate.
Fools inherit madness and the intelligent distribute knowledge.
The evil will fall in front of the good and the evil will come to the door of the righteous.
The poor is hated by his neighbors and the friends of the rich are many.
He that despises his neighbor sins, and he that shows mercy upon the poor is blessed.
The evil go astray doing evil, and the compassionate and righteous ones do all good things; evildoers do not understand mercy and faith, but compassion and faith are with doers of good.

In all that concerns you, one thing is profitable, and he that is diminished in his way of life is quiet and will be pleasant. LORD JEHOVAH heals every sickness, and the speech of the lips of the evil damages them.
A crown of the wise is their wealth, and the way of life of fools is their insanity.
A true witness delivers souls, and a false witness speaks deceit.
The awe of LORD JEHOVAH is strong in hope and he will be a protector to his children.
The awe of LORD JEHOVAH is a fountain of life to those that turn from the snares of death.
By many people the king is honored, and by the end of the people the king is shattered.
He that is patient is very wise and he that is impatient, very foolish.
He that cools his anger is a healer of his heart, and envy is the decay of the bones.
He that oppresses the poor is very evil; he angers him who made him; he that honors LORD JEHOVAH shows mercy upon the afflicted.
The evil one is overthrown by his evil, and he that trusts that he has no sin is righteous.
In the heart of the righteous dwells wisdom, and in the heart of fools it will not be known.
Righteousness will exalt the people and sin diminishes a people.
The pleasure of the King is with an understanding Servant, and by the wisdom of his soul evil is overthrown. He that trusts that he has no sins is righteous, but passion will destroy even wise men.
A soft word turns away anger and a hard word arouses wrath.
The tongue of wisdom adorns knowledge, and the mouth of fools vomits a curse.
The eyes of LORD JEHOVAH are in every place, gazing on the good and on the evil.
The tree of life is the healing of the tongue, and he that eats its fruit will be filled by it.
A fool mocks at the instruction of his father and he that is smart keeps reproof.
In the house of the righteous is much power, and the produce of the evil will be destroyed.
The lips of the wise speak knowledge and the hearts of fools are unrighteous.
LORD JEHOVAH despises the sacrifices of the evil and his pleasure is in the prayer of the upright.
LORD JEHOVAH despises the way of the evil and he shows mercy to him who practices righteousness.
The instruction of those who do not know evil is revealed, and those who hate reproof will die.
Sheol and destruction are in front of LORD JEHOVAH, and also the hearts of the children of men.
The evil one does not love him that rebukes him, and he does not walk with the wise.
A glad heart improves the body and the depressed heart saddens the spirit.
The heart of the righteous seeks knowledge, and the mouth of the evil speaks evil things.
All the days of the poor are poor, and the sweet are always calm.
To worship LORD JEHOVAH a little is better than the great treasures of the evil.
Better is a meal of vegetables and the love of The Name, than Fattened oxen with hatred.
An angry man provokes a brawl, and the patient man reproves a dispute, extinguishing it.
The ways of the lazy are filled with sorrows and the ways of the upright are clear.
A wise son gladdens his father and a foolish son is the shame of his mother.
A foolish man is lacking heart and an understanding man walks justly.
Those who honor the assembly bypass reasoning, and by the multitude of advisers advice is established.
The word of his mouth is joy to a man, and it is good for him that speaks in his time.
The Way of Life is an ascent to the understanding one, to turn away from Sheol beneath.
LORD JEHOVAH breaks down the house of the proud and he strengthens the border of the widows.
Evil ideas are detestable before LORD JEHOVAH, and pure words are sweet.
He that accepts a bribe destroys his soul and he that hates taking a bribe has Life.
The heart of the righteous meditates upon the faith, and the mouth of the evils speaks evil things.
LORD JEHOVAH is far from the evil ones and he hears the prayer of the righteous.
The light of the eyes gladdens the heart, and the good heart fattens the bones.
The ear that hears the reproof of life will lodge among the wise.
The one that detests discipline hates his soul and the one that hears correction possesses wisdom.
The awe of LORD JEHOVAH is the instruction of life and the glory of the meek one goes before him.
From a son of man is the thought of the heart and the speech of the tongue is from LORD JEHOVAH.
All the ways of a man are pure in the eyes of his soul and LORD JEHOVAH orders his path.
Show your works to LORD JEHOVAH and he will establish your thoughts.
All the works of LORD JEHOVAH are for those that submit to him, and the evil are kept for the day of evil.
Everyone that is exalted in his heart is defiled before LORD JEHOVAH, and he that stretches his hand against his neighbor will not be spared from evil.
The evil one is forgiven by grace and by truth and the awe of LORD JEHOVAH turns aside from evil.
The ways of a man are by the pleasure of LORD JEHOVAH; he also will repay his enemies.
Better is a little in righteousness than a multitude of gain which is not by justice.
The heart of a son of man plans his ways and LORD JEHOVAH orders his steps.
An oracle is upon the lips of the King, and his mouth will not err in judgment.
The weight of a balance is the judgment of LORD JEHOVAH and all his works are weights of truth.
Kings that do evil are defiled because the throne is established in righteousness.
The lips of the righteous are the pleasure of the King and he loves the word of the upright.
The anger of the King becomes messengers of death and the wise man will assuage it.
In the light of the King's face is life and his pleasure is like an early cloud.
Possessing wisdom is better than gold, and possessing understanding, better than silver.
The path of the upright turns from evil and he that pays attention to his soul keeps his way.
Disgrace is before ruin and pride of spirit before misfortune.
The humble spirit and humble eyes are better than he that divides loot with the mighty.
He that understands the word finds good, and he that trusts upon LORD JEHOVAH is blessed.
The wise of heart knows understanding, and he whose lips are sweet will increase learning.
Understanding is a fountain of life to those that know it and the instruction of fools is madness.
A wise heart knows the speech of its mouth and adds learning to its lips.
The speech of the wise is a honeycomb of honey, and it is sweet to his soul and healing to his bones.
There is a way that seems right in the eyes of the children of men, and its paths are the paths of death.
The soul of a sufferer makes him sick and from the mouth of his soul destruction comes to him.
An evil man forges evil and fire burns from his mouth.
An evil man provokes judgment and persecutes his friends without cause.
An evil man entices his neighbor and leads him in a way that is not good.
He winks with his eyes and devises perversions; he makes plans with his lips and perfects evil.
Old age is a crown of glory and the way of righteousness is praised.
He that is patient is better than a mighty man, and he that subdues himself, than he that seizes a city.
Into the breast of the vicious his portion falls; from before LORD JEHOVAH goes forth his judgment.
Dry bread in quietness is better than a house full of the sacrifices of judgment.
An intelligent Servant will be authorized over a disgraceful son, and he will divide property among brothers.
A refining pot proves silver, and the furnace gold, and LORD JEHOVAH tests the heart.
An evil man listens to the lips of the wicked, and the righteous does not hear the tongue of the wicked.
He that laughs against the poor angers his Creator, and he that rejoices at ruin will not be spared.
Grandchildren are the crown of old men and the glory of children is their fathers.
A trustworthy utterance is unbecoming to a fool; so is a false utterance to a righteous one.
A precious stone is beautiful in the eyes of him who owns it, and wherever it turns it is notable.
He that conceals an evil seeks friendship and he that hates to conceal separates from a close friend.
A rebuke breaks the heart of the wise, and instead of reproof, a fool is whipped and is unaware of it.
A contentious man seeks evil and a merciless messenger is sent upon him.
Anxiety and fear fall to a wise man, and to a fool in his insanity.
Evil will not depart from the house of him that pays evil for good.
He that sheds blood provokes judgment before a Ruler.
He that justifies the evil and condemns the righteous is defiled in front of LORD JEHOVAH.
Why does property go to a fool when he has no heart to possess wisdom?
A friend is loved at all times and a brother is born for trouble.
A foolish man hands over his bounty which he pledges for his neighbor as security.
He that loves evil loves fraud and brawling, and he that exalts his gate seeks ruin for his soul.
He that is perverse in his heart will not find good and he that perverts his tongue falls into evil.
He that begets a fool, it is to his own shame, neither will his father rejoice in him.
A merry heart improves the body and a depressed spirit dries the bones.
He that takes a bribe is evil, for he turns the way of justice aside.
The face of an intelligent one observes wisdom, and the eyes of a fool are in the depths of the Earth.
A foolish son angers his father and embitters her that bore him.
To harm the righteous is not good, neither to beat the righteous who speak correct things.
He that spares his words knows knowledge, and a patient man is wise.
A madman who is silent is considered a wise person, and he that keeps his lips silent is considered intelligent.
In his idleness one meditates on lust and mocks at good instruction.
A fool does not delight in wisdom because his heart meditates upon madness.
And when an evil one comes to the depths of evils, madness, dishonor and reproach come upon him.
The words of a man's mouth are deep waters and the fount of wisdom is a rushing torrent.
To accept the persons of the evil is not good, neither to pray for judgment upon a righteous one.
The lips of a fool bring into judgment and his mouth brings him to death.
The mouth of the fool is ruin to his soul, and by his lips his soul is caught.
The words of a lazy man cast him into evil, and they lower him to the inner chamber of Sheol.
And he whose hands are slack in his work is brother of the man who is a destroyer.
The name of LORD JEHOVAH is a strong tower; the righteous will run to it and be strengthened.
Honor and wealth are the city of his strength and his dwelling is strengthened by a city wall.
Before ruin, the heart of a man will be lifted up, and before honor is humility.
He that gives an answer before he hears is a fool, and is brought to shame.
The spirit of a man endures his suffering, but who will endure a suffering spirit?
An ordered heart possesses wisdom, and the ear of the wise listens to knowledge.
A man's gifts give him room and stand him before the great.
A man is innocent in his own judgment, and when his neighbor comes, he examines him.
Lots resolve a dispute and divide between the strong.
A brother is helped by his brother, like a city by its fortress, and they hold it like the bars of a fortress.
A man's belly will be filled with the fruit of his mouth, and by the produce of his lips he will be satisfied.
Death and life are in the power of the tongue, and he that loves it will eat from its fruit.
He that finds a good wife finds a good thing, and receives the will of LORD JEHOVAH, and he that puts away a good wife puts away good from his house.
The poor man speaks humbly and the rich man speaks hard things.
There are friends who are friends, and there is a friend that is closer than a brother.
Better is the poor that walks in integrity than the rich that perverts his ways.
It is not good for him that does not know his soul, and he that is hasty with his feet sins.
The madness of a man perverts his ways and he is enraged in his heart against LORD JEHOVAH.
Possessions add many friends and the poor is separated from his friends.
A false witness will not be spared and he that speaks falsehood will not be saved.
There are many that serve before the Prince, and he gives gifts to the evil.
All the brethren of the poor man hate him and his friends are far removed from him; he that is malicious in his words is not trustworthy.
He that gets wisdom loves his soul; he that keeps the faith finds good.
A false witness will not be spared, and he that speaks lies will be destroyed.
A delicacy is not fitting for a fool, neither for a Servant to rule among princes.
The intelligence of a man is his patience and his glory is the passing from evil.
The wrath of the King roars like a lion, and his pleasure is like the dew upon the grass.
A foolish son is a disgrace to a father, and the anxiety of a wife is like a continual dripping.
A house and property is the inheritance of a father and a woman is betrothed to a man from LORD JEHOVAH.
Slumber gives sleep and the proud soul will suffer hunger.
He that keeps the commandment takes care of his soul and he that despises his ways will be killed.
He that follows LORD JEHOVAH shows mercy upon the poor and he is rewarded according to his works.
Chasten your son because there is hope and do not cast out your soul to his shame.
An angry man receives injury and as much as he brings in by his care, it increases.
Hear counsel and receive instruction so that you may be wise in your ways.
Many are the thoughts in the heart of a man, and the counsel of LORD JEHOVAH will be confirmed.
The desire of a man is his favor, and the poor man is better than a rich man who lies.
The awe of LORD JEHOVAH is unto life, and he that is filled with it will live and will not visit evil.
A lazy man that hides his hands in his chest will not even bring them to his mouth.
Whenever a fool is whipped, the wise pays attention, and if you rebuke the wise, he perceives knowledge.
He that plunders his father and grieves his mother is a disgraceful and shameful son.
Stop, my son, and hear instruction, and do not forget the speech of knowledge.
An evil witness is loud in judgment, and the mouth of the evil swallows him up.
Pains are prepared for those that are loud in judgment, and affliction for foolish people.
Wine is strong and drunkenness is disgraceful, and no one that is excessive in it is wise.
The wrath of the King roars like a lion and he that angers him sins against himself.
It is the glory of a man whenever he separates a dispute, and every fool mocks it.
A lazy man is reproached and does not keep silent; he begs in harvest and there is no water.
The word in the heart of the King is deep, and a wise man will draw it out.
Many of the sons of men are called compassionate men, but who finds a trustworthy man?
Blessed after him are the children of the righteous one who walks in integrity.
The King sits upon the throne of judgment and all the wicked are scattered before him.
Who will say, "You are innocent, my heart, and I am purified from sin"?
Discrepant weights and discrepant measures, both are despised before LORD JEHOVAH.
Even by his work a boy is known, if he is pure, and if his works are right.
The ear that hears and the eye that sees; LORD JEHOVAH has made them.
Do not love sleep, lest you become poor, but open your eyes and be satisfied with bread.
A friend may say to his companion, "I have acquired wealth”, and then he will be praised.
But let him say, "Here is gold and a multitude of precious stones and valuable vessels, and the lips of knowledge.”
Take the cloak of one that pledges security for a foreigner, and for the sake of foreigners take his pledge.
He pledges security to a man with deceitful bread, and after that, his mouth will be filled with pebbles.
Counsel is acquired in the mind and in provocation war is made.
He that reveals a secret is a slanderer, and he that is faithful in his spirit hides a matter; and do not associate with one whose lips are hasty.
He that curses his father and his mother will extinguish his lamp as dark pupils.
An inheritance that is hasty in its beginning will not be blessed in its end.
