Behold, a King in righteousness and Princes in justice are authorized
And a man will be as a shelter against the wind, and like a hiding place against the violent rain, and like a stream of waters in thirst, and like the shadow of a mighty rock in an afflicted land
And the eyes of those who see are not smeared over, and the ears of those who hear shall listen
And the heart that understands shall perceive knowledge, and the tongue that stutters will be quick to speak peace
And they shall not call a fool the Ruler again, neither shall they call the worthless man Savior

Because the mad man speaks madness and his heart devises evil, so that he will commit fraud and he will speak about deception and will deprive a soul that is hungry, and he shall deprive the drink of the thirsty
The instruments of the worthless are evil, and he conceives a plan to destroy the poor by lying words, and the word of the afflicted in judgment
And a great one thinks on greatness, and on greatness he shall rise
Rich women, arise, hear my voice! Daughters who tell good news, incline to my words!
The days of the year shall be angry with those who proclaim good news, because the vintage fails and it was gathered and it did not come
Tremble rich women, and be angry, those who preach good news! Strip naked! Bind sackcloth on your waists!
And mourn upon your chests over the grass of the field and over the vine of its fruit
And upon the land of my people, thorns and briars shall sprout, and in all the households of joy and in the mighty city

Because the temple is forgotten and the host of the city is forsaken, and the beauty of the houses was for caves until eternity, thorns, and a joy for wild donkeys, and the house of Shepherds for folds of sheep
Until The Spirit from the high place will awaken upon us, and the wilderness will be as Karmela, and Karmela shall be considered as a forest
And judgment shall dwell in the wilderness and righteousness shall be given in Karmela
And his work of righteousness shall be peace and his cultivation of righteousness, stillness and hope to the eternity of eternities!
And my people shall dwell in a dwelling of peace and in a tabernacle of hope and in a lodging house of hope!
And hail shall descend on the forest, and like the valley, the city will be made low
Blessed are you who sow on all waters, wherever bulls and male donkeys tread

Woe to those who plunder you! You shall not plunder, and let none be accused of deceit among you. Whenever you choose to plunder, you shall be plundered, and whenever you choose to deceive, one shall be accused of deceit among you
LORD JEHOVAH, show mercy to us, because our hope is upon you! Be our helper at dawn and our Savior in time of trouble!
From the voice of your awe the nations turned away, and from your highness the nations were scattered
Therefore your loot shall be gathered as the gathering of crawling locusts, and like a gathering of locusts that are assembled
LORD JEHOVAH who inhabits the high places is lifted up, and judgment and righteousness filled Zion
And your time will be faith, and your salvation in the secret place. The awe of LORD JEHOVAH is wisdom and knowledge. This is his treasury
If he appears to them, they will howl severely, and the Messengers of peace will weep bitterly!
They hunted the streets and they destroyed passersby of the road, and he abolished the covenant and the cities are rejected, and they have not esteemed men
The Earth howls and sits in mourning, and Lebanon is put to shame and is ashamed, and Sharon was as a plain. Bayshan and Karmela are destroyed!
Therefore I shall arise, says LORD JEHOVAH; therefore I shall be lifted up, and from now I shall be taken up
And you shall conceive thorns and you shall bring forth stubble; by your breath fire shall consume you
And the nations shall be burning like quicklime, and like the thorns that are gathered; in fire they shall burn up
Hear, distant ones, the thing that I have done, and know, near ones, my heroism
Sinners were alarmed in Zion, and trembling fell on the pagans. “Who shall cause us to dwell with consuming fire, and who will cause us to dwell with the burning of eternity?”

He who walks in righteousness and speaks integrity and hates deceit and oppression, and he shakes his hand from taking a bribe and stops his ears that he will not hear, and shuts his eyes that he would not see evil
This one shall dwell in the high place, and his dwelling is in the strength of a cliff. His bread is given and his waters are faithful
Our eyes shall see The King in his beauty; your eyes in distant lands!
And your heart shall be taught awe. Where is the Scribe? Where is the Banker? Where is he who numbers towers for the strong people?
No one shall regard the people whose reputation is severe and his tongue stuttering, and he is not understood.

See Zion the city of our festivals, and your eyes shall behold in Jerusalem a bountiful pasture, a Tabernacle that does not move, and its poles are not uprooted for eternities, and none of its cords are cut off

Because The Name of LORD JEHOVAH is glorious to us, and he shall be a place of light and brightness to us, and an expanse round about where the authority of a Prince shall not reign, and the mighty man who is found shall not pass through in it
Because LORD JEHOVAH is the Judge and LORD JEHOVAH is The Prophet and LORD JEHOVAH is our King and he is our Savior
Your cords were loosed that were not secured, and your masts were bent whose sails they did not straighten, until they divided the loot and a multitude of lame men seized the booty
And the traveler will not say, "I am sick.” The people bearing sin who dwell in it I shall teach of judgment
Come nations to hear, and pay attention peoples! The Earth shall hear in its fullness, the world and all its inhabitants!
Because the wrath of LORD JEHOVAH is on all the nations and his wrath on all their armies, so that he shall destroy them, and he shall hand them over for slaughter
And their slain shall be cast out and the stench of their corpses will hit, and the mountains shall be melted with their blood
And all the hosts of Heaven shall melt, and Heaven will be rolled up as a scroll, and all their host shall fall as a leaf that will fall from a vine, and like a fig from a fig tree!
Because my sword shall be made drunk in Heaven! Behold, it shall come down against the Adumites, on the people that were condemned in judgment

The sword of LORD JEHOVAH is full of blood! It is anointed with blood and with the fat of fatlings and of goats, and the fat of the kidneys of rams, because of the sacrifice to LORD JEHOVAH in Butsar, and great slaughter in the land of Adum.
And wild bulls will fall with them, and bulls with heifers, and the Earth shall be soaked with their blood, and the dust will receive of their fat
Because of the day of vengeance for LORD JEHOVAH, and the year of vengeance for the judgment of Zion
And its streams shall be turned to pitch, and its dust to brimstone, and its land shall be burning pitch

And you shall not put it out night and day, and its smoke ascends to eternity, and it shall be destroyed for a generation of generations, and for the eternity of eternities a man shall not pass through in it
Pelicans and owls shall inherit it, and crows and ravens shall dwell in it, and a measuring cord of ruin shall be stretched upon it, and no joy will be there
Also they shall not call the Kingdom there, and all its great ones shall be for destruction
And thorns shall sprout up within her walls, and thorn bushes and thistles in its stronghold, and it shall be a den of jackals and the place of pasture for the daughters of ostriches
And spirits shall hold meetings in it, and an evil spirit shall call to his fellow. There a female night demon is rested, and she has found rest for herself
And the groundhog nests there and rouses itself and burrows and breaks through in the shade, and there vultures are gathered one with another
Seek in the book of LORD JEHOVAH and read, because none of these has been lost, and one has not searched for another, but he commanded with his mouth and his Spirit has gathered these
And he cast lots for these and his hand divided measuring lines for these, so that they shall inherit it until eternity, and for a generation of generations they shall dwell in it
The thirsty wilderness will rejoice and the plain shall rejoice and it shall bud as the crocus

And she will rejoice like a mountain goat, and in glory the honor of Lebanon will be given to her, and the excellence of Karmela and of Sharon. Those shall see the honor of LORD JEHOVAH and the excellence of our Goda warning and an encouragement of the weak, for The Savior is coming and he saves them
Strengthen hands that are weak and the knees that shake make firm
Say to the feeble of heart, be strengthened, and do not be afraid! Behold, your God of vengeance comes! God The Savior comes and he saves you!
Then the eyes of the blind shall be opened and the ears of the deaf shall be opened
Then the crippled one shall leap like a stag, and the tongue of the dumb shall be straightened, because waters are broken through in the wilderness and a torrent in the plain!
Pools shall be in the deserted place, and springs of waters in the place of drought shall sprout grass, and reed and papyrus reed in a dwelling of jackals
And a street will be there and the way will be called holy, and impurity shall not pass through in it. The Way must be in it and fools will not go astray there
And there shall not be a lion there or a harmful animal; it shall not come up and it shall not be found there

And the redeemed shall go, the redeemed ones of LORD JEHOVAH, and they shall be converted and they shall enter Zion in praise, and joy will be on their heads for the eternities! They shall obtain sweetness and joy, and miseries and sighing shall flee away!
And it was in the fourteenth year of Hezekiah, King of Judea, Sennakherib King of Assyria went up against all the fortress cities of Judea and he seized them
And the King of Assyria sent Rabshaqeh from Lakish to Hezekiah the King to Jerusalem with a large army, and he stood in the ascent of the upper reservoir in the road of the Field of the Fortress
And Eliakim, son of Khelqia, Chief of the Household went out to him, and Shebna the Scribe and Yuakh, son of Asaph the Chronicler
And Rabshaqeh said to them: "Say to Hezekiah, ‘Thus says the King, the great King of Assyria: what is this trust that you have trusted?
And you have said that there is among you speaking of the lips and counsel and might for battle. Now, on whom have you trusted that you have rebelled against me?

Behold, you have trusted on a staff of a fractured reed, on the Egyptian, upon which a man having leaned, it enters into his hand and pierces it. So is Pharaoh King of Egypt to all who trust upon him!

And if you will say to me, ‘Upon LORD JEHOVAH our God we trust’, what has Hezekiah gained who removed sacrifices and the altars, and he said to Yehuda and to Jerusalem: ‘Before the one altar you shall worship?’
And now, make alliance with my Lord, the King of Assyria, and I shall give you two thousand horses, if you have horsemen there whom you will mount upon them!
And how do you turn away the face of one of the little Servants of my Lord, and you yourself are confident of the Egyptian to give you chariots and horsemen?
Now, have I gone up without LORD JEHOVAH to this land for its destruction? LORD JEHOVAH said to me: ‘Go up against this land and destroy it!’"
And Eliakim and Shebna and Yuakh said to Rabshaqeh: “Speak Aramaic with your Servants, because we hear, and do not speak Judean with us before the people who stand on the wall!”

And Rabshaqeh said to them: “It was not to you and to your Lord my Lord has sent me saying these words, but to the men sitting on the wall, lest they would eat their dung and drink their urine with you!”
And Rabshaqeh stood and he called in a loud voice in Judean and said: "Hear the words of the great King, the King of Assyria!
Thus says the King, let not Hezekiah deceive you, because he cannot save you!
And do not let Hezekiah cause you to trust on LORD JEHOVAH and say: ‘LORD JEHOVAH certainly delivers us and this city is not handed over into the hands of the King of Assyria’

Do not listen to Hezekiah, because, thus says the King of Assyria: ‘Do a favor with me and go out with me and let each man eat his own grapes and a man his own figs, and each man drink the waters of his own well
Until I will come and I will bring you to a land like your land, a land of grain and of oil, a land of olives and of vineyards
And Hezekiah should not deceive you and say, ‘LORD JEHOVAH delivers us.’ Have the gods of the Gentiles delivered a man of his land from the hands of the King of Assyria?
Where are the gods of Khamath and of Raphad, and where are the gods of Sapharvim? Have they delivered Samaria from my hands?
Who of all the gods of these lands has delivered his land from my hands, that LORD JEHOVAH is delivering Jerusalem from my hands?"
And they kept silent before them and no man gave him an answer, because the King commanded and said, "Do not give him an answer"
And Eliakim, son of Khelqia, the Steward, came, and Shebna the Scribe and Yuakh, son of Asaph, the Chronicler, to Hezekiah, while ripping their garments, and they told him the words of Rabshaqeh
And it was that when Hezekiah the King heard, he ripped his garments and was covered in sackcloth and he entered the house of LORD JEHOVAH
And he sent Eliakim, Chief of the household, and Shebna the Scribe and the Elders of the Priests, covered in sackcloth, to Eshaiya the Prophet, son of Amuts
And they said to him: "Thus says Hezekiah, ‘This is a day of trouble and of rebuke and of passion today, because birth pains of the children have arrived and there is no power for the birth

Doubtless LORD JEHOVAH your God shall hear the words of Rabshaqeh, whom his Master the Assyrian King sent, that he would insult the living God, and he shall rebuke him with the words that your God heard, and you shall seek and you shall pray for the remnant who are left
And the Servants of Hezekiah the King came to Eshaiya
And Eshaiya said to them: "Thus say to your Lord, ‘Thus says LORD JEHOVAH: you shall not be afraid of the words that you heard which the Messengers of the King of Assyria blasphemed before me
Behold, I put a spirit upon him and he shall hear a report, and he shall return to his land, and I shall overthrow him by the sword in his land’”
And Rabshaqeh returned and he found The King of Assyria fighting against Lebna when he heard that he picked up from Lakish
And he heard about Tarkhaq, King of KushEthiopia and went out to fight with him, and he heard, and he sent Messengers to Hezekiah
Thus they said to Hezekiah, King of Judea, saying: ‘Do not let your God upon whom you trust deceive you and say that Jerusalem is not delivered into the hands of the King of Assyria
Behold you have heard all that the Kings of Assyria have done to all lands, killing them by sword, and are you delivered?
Have their gods saved the nations, which my fathers killed with the sword Guzan and Kharan and Ratsaph and the children of Aden who were in Dalsar?
Where are the King of Khamath and the King of Raphad, and the King and city Sepharvaim, and Dana and Dava?
And Hezekiah received letters from the hand of the Messengers, and he read them, and he came up to the house of LORD JEHOVAH, and Hezekiah spread them before LORD JEHOVAH
And Hezekiah prayed before LORD JEHOVAH and said:
“LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts, God of Israel, sitting above the Cherubim, you are God, you alone, over all the kingdoms of Earth. You have made Heaven and Earth!
Incline, LORD JEHOVAH, your ear, and hear! Open, LORD JEHOVAH, your eyes and see, and hear the words of Sennakherib that he sent to reproach the living God!
Truly LORD JEHOVAH, the Kings of Assyria have ravaged all lands and their own lands
And their gods they have burned in fire because they were not gods, but the work of the hands of men, of wood and of silver and of stone, and they destroyed them
And now, LORD JEHOVAH our God, save us from his hands, that all the kingdoms of Earth will know that you are God, you alone!”

And Eshaiya son of Amuts was sent to Hezekiah and he said to him: “Thus says LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts, God of Israel: everything that you have prayed before me concerning Sennakherib King of Assyria, I have heard
This is the word that he spoke about him: “LORD JEHOVAH has contempt for you and the virgin daughter of Zion mocks at you and the daughter of Jerusalem wags her head at you
Whom have you insulted and blasphemed, and upon whom have you lifted your voice? You have lifted your eyes on high against the Holy One of Israel!

And by the hand of your Messengers you have insulted LORD JEHOVAH and you have said: ‘In the multitude of my chariots I shall ascend to the height of the mountains and to the borders of Lebanon, and I shall cut down the heights of the cedars and the choice of its cypresses, also I shall enter to the height of the limit of the forest of Karmela
I shall dig and I shall drink water and I shall dry up with the hooves of my horses all the mighty rivers!’
Have you not heard that from a distance I have done it and from the first days I have prepared it and now I shall bring it that you will be for a desert and for a desolation like the fortress cities?

For their inhabitants’ hands have weakened among them. They were broken down and ashamed and they were like grass of the field and like the green of spring and like the corn of the roof and like a tender sprout before a stalk
I know your dwelling and your entering and your going out and that you are presumptuous before me
Because you have been presumptuous before me and your blasphemy came up into my ears, I shall put a ring in your nose and a bridle in your lips and I shall return you on the road by which you entered
And this is a sign to you: eat this year what grows itself and the second year what grows itself from what grows itself, and the third year sow and reap and plant you a vineyard and eat their fruit
And the rest of the house of Yehuda who were left shall return like a root that puts downward and makes fruit above
Because from Jerusalem a remnant shall go out and shall escape from the Mountain of Zion. The zeal of LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts has done this

Because of this, thus says LORD JEHOVAH concerning the King of Assyria: he shall not enter to this city and he shall not cast an arrow there, and he shall not meet it with shields and he shall not lay wait upon it with an ambush
But in the way that he came in, he shall return, and he shall not enter this city, says LORD JEHOVAH
And I shall rest upon this city and I shall save it, because of me and because of David my Servant”
And The Angel of LORD JEHOVAH went out and killed in the camp of the Assyrians a hundred and eighty and five thousand, and they arose at dawn and behold, all of them were dead bodies
And Sennakherib picked up and returned. He went and he dwelt in Nineva

And when he was worshiping in the house of Nasrak, his god, Edarmalek and Sheratsar his sons murdered him with a sword, and they fled to the land of the QarduitesArmenians, and Sarkhadum his son reigned after him

In those days Hezekiah was ill to die, and Eshaiya the Prophet son of Amuts came to him and said to him: “Thus says LORD JEHOVAH, ‘Order concerning your house, because you are dying and you will not live’”
And Hezekiah turned his face to the wall, and Hezekiah prayed before LORD JEHOVAH
And he said: “Oh! LORD JEHOVAH, remember that I walked before you in the truth and with a whole heart and I have done what is beautiful before you.” And Hezekiah wept with a great weeping
And the answer of LORD JEHOVAH was upon Eshaiya saying:
“Go, say to Hezekiah King of Judea, ‘Thus said LORD JEHOVAH The God of David your father: ‘I have heard your prayer and I saw your tears. Behold, I am adding fifteen years upon your days
And I shall save you and this city from the hands of the King of Assyria, and I shall rest upon this city
And this is a sign for you from before LORD JEHOVAH that LORD JEHOVAH performs this response that he has spoken

Behold, I am returning the sun backward ten degrees, the shadow of the degrees which have gone down by the degrees of Akhaz your father. And the sun returned backward ten degrees by the degrees that it had gone down
The writing of Hezekiah King of Judea when he was sick and he was saved from his sickness
I have said: "In the middle of my days I shall go into the gates of Sheol. I have departed from the remainder of my years
I said: I shall not see LORD JEHOVAH in the land of life and I shall see no man again with the dwellers of the pit
My age is removed and passes by from me like a Shepherd’s tent. They are cut off like the cords of my life and like a web that is near to being cut off. You handed me over from day to night
(Peshitta lacks this verse.)
Like a swallow that chirps, I chirped, and like a dove I mourned. I have lifted my eyes on high. LORD JEHOVAH, save me and cheer me up!
And what shall I say? He has spoken to me, and he has acted and has chased away all sleep because of the bitterness of my soul
LORD JEHOVAH, shall we live by these things? For the sake of this life of my spirit, heal me and give me life!
Behold, compared to peace, bitterness was bitter to me, and you were pleased with my soul that it will not be consumed by corruption, because you have cast behind your body all my sins
Because Sheol will not confess you, neither will death praise you, and those that descend into the pit will not hope for your truth
But the living shall confess you, like me today, and the father will show your faithfulness to the children
LORD JEHOVAH will save us and we will sing his praises all the days of our lives in the house of LORD JEHOVAH
And Hezekiah said: “What is the sign that I go up to the house of LORD JEHOVAH?”
And Eshaiya said: “They shall take a mass of figs and they shall put it on the abscess and it is healed.”
At that time Merudak Baladan, son of Baladan, King of Babel, sent a letter and an offering to Hezekiah, because he heard that he was ill and that it was severe and he was healed

And Hezekiah celebrated with them and he showed them his treasury silver and gold and sweet spices and fine oil and all the house of his armory, and everything that was found in his treasures, and Hezekiah did not omit a thing that he did not show them in his house, and in all the place of his dominion

And Eshaiya the Prophet came to Hezekiah the King and said to him: “What did these men say to you, and from where did they come to you?” And Hezekiah said: “From the distant land of Babel they came to me”
And he said: “What did they see in your house?” And Hezekiah said: “They saw everything that is in my house, and I did not leave out a thing in my house that I did not show them.”
And Eshaiya said to Hezekiah: “Hear the answer of LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts

‘Behold, the days are coming and everything that is in your house and the treasure of your fathers that there is until today shall be taken to Babel. It shall go and nothing shall be left to you, says LORD JEHOVAH
And of your children who will proceed from you whom you beget, they shall be taken away and they shall be eunuchs in the temple of the King of Babel
And Hezekiah said to Eshaiya: “The answer of LORD JEHOVAH is good, for you said there shall be peace and truth in my days.”
“Comfort her, comfort my people”, says your God
Speak to the heart of Jerusalem and cry to her, because she was filled with power, and she delighted in sin, and she received from the hand of LORD JEHOVAH double of all her sins”
The voice that cried out in the wilderness: “Return to the road for LORD JEHOVAH and straighten in the plain the street for our God
All the valleys will be filled and all mountains and high places will be leveled, and the rugged place will be smooth, and the rough place a plain
And the glory of LORD JEHOVAH shall be revealed, and everybody shall see it as one, because the mouth of LORD JEHOVAH has spoken
The voice that said, ‘Cry out!’ also said: “What shall I cry out?” “Everybody is grass and all his beauty as a flower of the field
Grass dries up and a flower fades, because the Spirit of LORD JEHOVAH blew on it; so is the grass of this people
The grass dries up and the flower fades, and the word of God stands for eternities!”

Go up on a high mountain for yourself, Oh Zion! Preaching good news, lift up your voice in power, oh Jerusalem! Preaching good news, lift up and you shall not fear! Say to the cities of Judea, ‘Behold your God!’”
Behold, LORD JEHOVAH God comes in strength and his arm in power. Behold, his reward is with him and his work before him
Like a Shepherd who shepherds his flock, and in his arm gathers the lambs, and holds them in his lap, and he feeds those that are nursing

Who has measured the waters in the hollow of his hand and he measured Heaven with a hand’s breadth and measured the dust of the Earth in the palm of his hand, and weighed the mountains in a scale and the hills in a balance
Who has directed the Spirit of LORD JEHOVAH or who was Lord of Counsel to him?
By whom was he counseled, and he taught him and he explained to him the way of judgment, and he taught him knowledge and he showed him the way of intelligence?
Behold, the nations shall be cast off like a drop from a pot and like the tipping of a balance, and the islands like the dust
And Lebanon is not considered by him for burning and its animals are not considered by him for a burnt offering
And all the nations are considered as nothing to him. They are considered by him for destruction and for the sword
To whom have you compared God and to what likeness have you likened him?
An image is what a carpenter made, and a goldsmith overlaid it in gold and refined silver
He fastened it, he selected it; it is wood that does not rot, and a carpenter chose and in his wisdom he engraved it and he constructed the image so that it is not shaken
Have you not heard and have you not known, and was it not told to you from the beginning, and have you not understood the foundations of The Earth?
And him who sits on the sphere of The Earth, and its inhabitants are like grasshoppers; who stretched out the Heavens like a vaulted bowl, and stretched them out as a tent for a dwelling
Who made the Rulers nothing and the Judges of the Earth as if they are not
They shall not plant and they shall not sow seed, and they shall not set a root in the earth; he shall blow on them and they shall dry up and a whirlwind shall pick up them like trash
To whom have you compared me that I am equal to him, says The Holy One?

Lift up your eyes on high and see who has created these things, who brings out their armies by number, and he calls all of them by names in the abundance of his honor and in the strength of his power. No man is lost. .”
Why, Yaqob, are you speaking, and you, Israel, say, “My ways are hidden from LORD JEHOVAH, and my judgment passes away from my God?"

Have you not known and have you not heard, that God to eternity is LORD JEHOVAH, who created the ends of The Earth? He is not weary and is not fatigued by labor, and there is no searching of his understanding!
He gives power to the stricken and to those afflicted of disease he increases strength
Young men shall be troubled and they shall be weary, and boys, stumbling, shall stumble
And those who hope in LORD JEHOVAH shall renew their power, and they shall grow wings like a dove, and they shall run and they shall not be tired, and they shall walk and shall not be troubled!”
Be silent, oh islands, and the peoples shall renew power. They shall come near and then they shall speak and they shall come near together for judgment

Who has awakened Righteousness from the East and called him to his feet? The nations shall be handed over before him and Kings shall fall down. He shall give his destruction like dust and like an archer whose bow bursts forth
He shall pursue them and he shall make peace and he shall not enter the road with his feet
Who has prepared and has made? He who called the generations from the beginning. I AM THE LIVING GOD LORD JEHOVAH, The First and The Last, I AM THE LIVING GOD
The islands saw and the ends of the Earth stood in awe. They stood in awe and they approached and they came
And they help, each man, his neighbor, and to his brother he said, “Be strong!”

And the Carpenter gave heart to the Goldsmith who strikes with a hammer and labors, and says to him who proves what is excellent, “There it is”, and they fasten it with nails that it will not be moved
Now, Israel my Servant, Yaqob whom I have chosen, I have not rejected you, the seed of Abraham, my friend
For I have empowered you from the ends of The Earth, and from the watchtowers I called you and I have said to you, “You are my Servant!” I have chosen you and I have not rejected you

You shall not fear, because I am with you, and you shall not be terrified, because I AM your God. I have strengthened you, I have also helped you, I have also supported you with my righteous right hand
Those who regard you as evil shall be ashamed and they shall be put to shame. They shall be as nothing, and the men who contend with you shall be destroyed
You shall seek them and you shall not find the men who contend with you. The men who fight with you shall be as if they are not
Because I AM LORD JEHOVAH your God, the Enforcer of your right hand. I have said to you: ‘You shall not fear. I AM your helper’, says LORD JEHOVAH
You shall not fear, worm of Yaqob, and weevil of Israel. I AM your helper, says LORD JEHOVAH, and your Savior, The Holy One of Israel
Behold, I have made you as a new thresher that breaks up and pounds. You shall thresh the mountains and you shall pulverize, and you shall make high places as the chaff
You shall winnow them and the wind shall carry them, and a tornado shall scatter them, and you shall dance for joy in LORD JEHOVAH, and in the Holy One of Israel you will be glorified!
The poor and the afflicted seek waters and there is nothing, and their tongue has dried up in thirst. I AM LORD JEHOVAH. I The God of Israel shall answer them, and I shall not forsake them
I shall open rivers in the mountain, and within the valleys a fountain. I shall make the wilderness into pools of waters and the thirsty land into springs of waters
I shall give cedars and acacia trees in the wilderness, and the myrtle and the tree of oil. I shall put glorious cypresses in the plain together
For they shall see and they shall know and they shall consider, and they shall understand as one that the hand of LORD JEHOVAH has done this, and The Holy One of Israel has created it
Bring near your legal case, says LORD JEHOVAH. Bring near your counsels, says The King of Yaqob

Let them approach and let them show those things that are going to be; show us what the former things are, and we shall put it in our heart and we shall know the end of them, or cause us to hear what is coming
Show us the signs that are going to occur and we shall know that you are gods. Also do good and do evil, and we will be informed and we will see together
Behold, you are nothing, you and your works! From corruption and abomination you are chosen
I have roused from the North him who will come from the dawning the sun, and he will cry out in my Name, and the Rulers shall come and they shall be trodden as clay that a potter treads
Who will show from the beginning and we shall know, and we shall say that he is righteous? There is none who shows, neither one who announces, also none who hears your words
These are the first fruits of Zion, and I shall give to Jerusalem an Evangelist
I looked and there was no man who thought upon these things, that I would ask them and they would give me an answer
Behold, they are all nothing and their works worthless, and their works are empty wind
Behold, I have upheld my Servant and my soul has desired my Chosen One. I have put my Spirit upon him so that he shall bring judgment to the nations
He shall not cry out and he shall not clamor and he shall not make his voice heard in the street
A fractured reed he shall not break and the lamp that flickers he shall not extinguish. In the truth he shall bring out judgment
It will not go out and it will not flicker until he will set judgment in the earth and the islands shall expect his law
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH God who created the Heavens, and stretched them out and spread out the Earth and everything in it, and he gave breath to the people upon it, and spirit to those who walk in it
I, LORD JEHOVAH, I have called you in righteousness and I held your hand and I have empowered you, and I have given you as a covenant to the people and a light to the nations
That you will open the eyes of the blind and you will bring out the prisoners from imprisonment and those who dwell in darkness from the house of prisoners
I AM LORD JEHOVAH, and this is My Name, and my honor I shall not give to another, neither my praise to carved things
I show new things and former things, behold, they have come, and until they will spring up I have made them to be heard by you
The song of Eshaiya: ‘Sing to LORD JEHOVAH a new song, his glory from the ends of the Earth. Those going down to the sea in its fullness, and the islands and those who dwell in them
The wilderness shall rejoice and its towns and meadows will be Qedar, and the dwellers of the cliffs shall sing, and from the tops of the mountains they shall cry out
And they will give glory to LORD JEHOVAH, and his praises they shall show in the islands!
LORD JEHOVAH shall come forth as a Giant, and like a warrior he shall provoke zeal. He shall shout and shall be valiant and he shall kill his enemies
I have been silent from eternity. I shall be silent. I endured as a woman in labor. I shall be speechless and I shall in shock as one
I shall lay the mountains waste and the hills, and all their strength I shall dry up. I shall make rivers islands and the pools I shall dry up

I shall lead the blind in the way that they do not know, and I shall make them walk in the paths that they have not known. I shall make darkness light before them and I shall smooth the rugged places. These responses I have made to them and I have not forsaken them
They shall turn their back and they shall be ashamed in shame, those who trust on carved images, and they were saying to molten images: "You are our gods!"
Hear, deaf men, and perceive and see, blind men!
Who is blind if not my Servant, and deaf as my Messenger whom I shall send? Who is blind as the Ruler and blind as the Servant of LORD JEHOVAH?
I beheld much and you do not observe, and I opened ears and you are not hearing
LORD JEHOVAH was pleased because of his righteousness, that he would magnify the Law and glorify it

And this people is robbed and downtrodden. All the boys are snared and hidden in houses of prisoners. They have been for prey, and there is none who delivers, and downtrodden, and there is none who restores
Who is among you that will hear this, and he will pay attention, and he will listen to something different?

Who gave Yaqob for treading under foot and Israel for being plundered? Was it not LORD JEHOVAH, because we have sinned against him and we were not willing to walk in his ways, and we were not listening to his Law?
He poured upon them the heat of his wrath and the power of war burned them from their surroundings, and they did not know, and fire burned in them and they did not bring it to their heart
Now, thus says LORD JEHOVAH who created Yaqob, and he formed you, Israel: You shall not fear, because I have redeemed you and I called you by your name, for you are mine
If you cross the Sea, I am with you, and the rivers shall not overwhelm you, and if you will walk on fire, you will not be scorched and the flame will not burn you
Because I AM LORD JEHOVAH your God, the Holy One of Israel, your Savior. I have given Egypt in exchange for you, and Kush and Sheba for your face
You are one who is precious in my eyes! You are glorious and I have loved you! I have given men in exchange for you, and peoples in exchange for your life!
You shall not fear, because I am with you. I shall bring your seed from the East, and from the West I shall gather you
I shall say to the North, "Give to me”, and to the south, "You shall not withhold.” Bring my sons from far away and my daughters from the ends of the Earth
Everyone who calls on my name for my honor. I have created him and I have formed him and I have made him
Bring out the blind people who have eyes and do not see, and have ears and are deaf

All the nations shall be gathered as one and the peoples shall be gathered. Who is among you who will show this, and we will hear the former things? Let them bring their witnesses and they will be justified, also we will hear and we will speak in truth

You are my witnesses, says LORD JEHOVAH, and my Servants whom I have chosen, and you shall know, and you shall believe in me, and you shall understand that I am he, and before me there has not been a God created, and none shall be after me
I AM LORD JEHOVAH and there is none again outside of me
I have shown and I have saved and I have made heard and there is not among you a foreigner, and you are my witnesses, says LORD JEHOVAH, and I am God
Also, from the first day I AM THE LIVING GOD. There is none who is saved from my hands, and who is turning back anything that I do?
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH, your Savior, The Holy One of Israel: “For your sake I have sent to Babel, and I have brought all the fugitives and the Chaldeans who boast in ships
I AM LORD JEHOVAH your Holy One, for I, your King, have created Israel
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH who gives a path in the sea and paths in many waters
Who brings out chariots and horses and a strong army, and together they shall lie down and they shall not arise, and they shall be extinguished as a lamp that flickers
You shall not call to mind former things and you shall not perceive from the beginning
Behold, I make a new thing, and now it will sprout and you shall know it, and I shall make a road in the wilderness and rivers in the desert
The animals of the wilderness shall glorify me, the jackals and the daughters of ostriches, because I have given waters in the wilderness and rivers in the deserts, that my choice people would drink
This people whom I have chosen for myself shall drink
It was not that you called me, Yaqob, for I have called you, oh Israel
You have not brought me lambs that you have burnt, neither have you honored me with your offerings. I have not oppressed you with offerings and I have not wearied you with incense

You have not bought cane of sweet incense with silver for me, and with the fat of your sacrifices you have not intoxicated me, but you have oppressed me with your sins, and with your evil you have wearied me
I AM THE LIVING GOD, I who blot out your evil for my sake, and I shall not remember your sins again
Be reminded of me; we shall be judged as one. I have said that you shall be righteous
Your first father sinned; your Rulers have done evil to me.
Your Princes have defiled Holiness. I have given Yaqob to destruction and Israel to reproach
Therefore, hear me, Yaqob, my Servant, and Israel, whom I have chosen
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH who made you, and he formed you in the womb, and he helped you: “Do not be afraid, my Servant, Yaqob, and Israel, whom I have chosen
Because I shall give waters in the thirsty place and a streams in the dry land. I shall pour out my Spirit on your seed and my blessing on your children
And they shall sprout up from among the grass as willows that are by streams of waters
This one will say, “I am of LORD JEHOVAH”, and this one will call on the name of Yaqob, and this one the hand LORD JEHOVAH will write, and in the name of Israel he will be named
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH, the King of Israel, and his Savior, LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts his Name: “I AM The First and I AM The Last, and there is no god outside of me
And who is like me? He should call and he should prepare himself and he will show what I have ordained the people for eternity, and let them show the signs that are coming

You shall not be afraid and you shall not be terrified. Have I not made heard to you from former time and shown you, and you are my witnesses? There is no God outside of me, and there is none who is mighty whom I do not know

All of the Craftsman who make images are worthless, and there is no gain by their works which they lusted to make, and Craftsman testified they had made them, that they do not see, and they do not hear and they do not know
Because of this, those who are making gods and are forming molten images shall be ashamed, because there is no profit in them
Behold all their Craftsmen are deaf. All of them shall be gathered from the children of men, and let them stand and they shall be ashamed, and they shall be put to shame together

The carpenter who sharpens iron and hews it with an ax and carves it with an auger, and he makes it with the power of his arm, also he is hungry and he is thirsty and drinks no water and he is exhausted
The carpenter chooses wood and he measures it, and he fastens it with glue, and he carves it and he makes it in the likeness of a man, according to the beauty of a son of man
And he sets it up in the house, a tree that was cut down from the forest that was grown in the rain
That would be for a person for burning, and they took some of it and they got heat, and they baked bread, also they made a god, and they worshiped it. They made a carved image and they bowed to it
Half of it they burned in the fire and they roasted meat on its coals, and they ate and were satisfied, also they were warm and they said: “Ah! I am warm, and I watched the fire”
And the rest they made a god, a carved image, and they bowed to it and they prayed to it, and they said: “Deliver us, because you are our god!”
And they have not known, and they were not wise, for the sight of their eyes and the understanding of their heart is obstructed

And they have not brought upon their heart and they have not known and they have not considered and said that half of it they burned in fire, and upon its coals they baked bread, and they roasted meat and they ate, and its remainder they made an idol of wood for themselves and they bowed to it
Their heart is feeding on ashes and straying, it is going astray, and they are not saving their soul and they are not saying: "Our right hand has wrought falsehood!"
Remember these things, Yaqob and Israel, that you are my Servant. I have formed you a Servant for myself, therefore, Israel, you shall not forget me.
I have put away your evil as thick darkness and your sins as a cloud. Turn to me, for I have redeemed you!

Sing, Heavens, because LORD JEHOVAH has worked! Blow the trumpets, foundations of the Earth! Celebrate in praise, mountains, and forest and all trees in it, for LORD JEHOVAH has redeemed Yaqob and in Israel he is glorified!

Thus says LORD JEHOVAH, who redeemed you, and he formed you in the womb, and he helped you: “I AM LORD JEHOVAH, for I have made all things. I stretched out Heaven, I alone, and I spread out the Earth from myself and for myself
He brings to nothing the signs of mediums, and their omens I despise, turning back wise men on their backside, and I cause their knowledge to fall

Establishing the word of his Servant, and bringing to perfection the mind of his Messengers; who said to Jerusalem: "You shall be inhabited”, also to the villages of Judea, that they shall be built, and I shall raise up its neighbors
Who said to the deep: “Be empty”, and your rivers, “Dry up"
Who said to Cyrus, my Shepherd, that he shall perform all my will; saying to Jerusalem: "You shall be built, and the Temple shall be finished"

Thus says LORD JEHOVAH to his Anointed, to Cyrus, whom I have held by his right hand: the nations shall be subject before him and the loins of Kings I shall loose, to open doors before him and the doors shall not be shut
"I shall go before you and I shall smooth the rugged places. I shall break the gates of brass and I shall cut down the bars of iron
And I shall give you treasures that are in darkness and hidden, buried things, that you may know that I AM LORD JEHOVAH, for I, The God of Israel, have called you by your name
Because of my Servant Yaqob and Israel my chosen, I have called you by your name, and I have named you, and you have not known me
I AM LORD JEHOVAH, and there is no more. Outside of me there is no God. I have strengthened you and you have not known me
That they may know from the dawning of the sun and from its setting, there is none outside of me. I AM LORD JEHOVAH and there is nothing more
For he formed light and he created darkness, he made peace and he created evil. I AM LORD JEHOVAH, I who have done all these things

Be delighted, Heavens from above, and clouds shall sprinkle righteousness! The Earth shall be opened and salvation shall multiply, and righteousness shall sprout up as one. I AM LORD JEHOVAH, I who have created these things
Woe to the one who sues with his Maker, a clay vessel of a potter of the Earth! Does the clay say to the potter: “What are you doing?”, and “I am not the work of your hands!”
Woe to him who says to a father: “Why do you have children?”, and to a wife: "Why did you get pregnant?"
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH, The Holy One of Israel, and his Fashioner, LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts is his Name: “Ask me for signs concerning my children, and command me concerning the work of my hands!”
I have made the Earth and the son of man upon it by my hands. I stretched out the Heavens and I commanded all their mighty host
I have awakened him in righteousness, and all his ways I shall smooth. He shall build up my city and he shall send out my captivity, not with a price and not by a bribe, says LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts

Thus says LORD JEHOVAH: “The labor of Egypt and the merchants of Kush and of Sheba, sizable men to you; they shall pass over and they shall be yours, and they shall follow after you, and in chains they shall pass over, and to you they shall bow down, and to you they shall pray: "God is in you and there is no other God"
Truly, you are a shelter, God of Israel, and his Savior
They have been ashamed and have been put to shame, all as one, who walk in shame and are forming idols
The redemption of Israel in LORD JEHOVAH is The Savior of the world. You shall not be ashamed, and you shall not be put to shame for the eternity of eternities

Because thus says LORD JEHOVAH, who created the Heavens, and he is God who formed the Earth, and he made it and he has fashioned it: “It was not for nothing that he created it, but that his creation will dwell in him. I AM LORD JEHOVAH and there is no more”

It was not in a secret place I have spoken in a dark place of the Earth, and I have not said to the seed of Yaqob, "Seek me for nothing." I AM LORD JEHOVAH, I who speak righteousness and I show integrity
Be gathered and come and be brought near as one, those who are saved from the nations. And they have not known, whoever takes up carved wood images, and they prayed to a god that does not save

Show and approach and be counseled as one. Who has made this heard from former time, and from the beginning? I AM LORD JEHOVAH, and there is no other God outside of me, The righteous God and The Savior, and there is none outside of me
Come near to me, all of you the ends of The Earth, that you shall be saved, because I AM LORD JEHOVAH, and there is no more!
By myself I have sworn, and the word of righteousness came out from my mouth, and it shall not return: "Every knee shall bow to me and by me every tongue shall swear”
And they shall say: “In LORD JEHOVAH is righteousness, and mighty ones shall go to him, and all who regard you as evil shall be ashamed
All the seed of Israel shall be glorified in me and shall be declared righteous
Beyl has fallen and Nabu has been overthrown, and their idols were carved images. The burdens are packed up on a beast and on a hungry domestic beast of burden
They stumbled and they fell as one, and they were not able to deliver their bearers, and their souls went on into captivity
Hear me, those of the house of Yaqob, and all the remainder of Israel, for they are carried in the belly and they are carried in the womb
Until old age, I am He, and unto ancient age I shall carry. I have made and I shall lift up and I shall carry and I shall deliver
To whom have you compared me and have made me equal?
To those who go astray and they cast gold out of their bags and they weigh silver in a balance, and they hire a smith, and they make a god and they worship it, also they pray to it?

And they pick it up on their shoulders, and they walk it and they lay it on its place, and it cannot rise up from its place; also they pray to it and it does not answer them, and it does not save them from their afflictions
Remember these things and consider and bring the evils to your heart
Remember the former things that are from eternity, for I AM God, and there is no other god, and there is none like me
I am showing the end things from the beginning, and from the former time those that have not been made. I said, “My counsel I establish and I do all my will”
I call a bird of prey from the East, and from a distant land a man of my counsel. I speak, I also make it happen. I fashioned, I also make
Hear me, hard of heart, those far from righteousness
My righteousness to come has come near, and my salvation shall not delay, and I shall give salvation in Zion and my glory to Israel
Come down and dwell on the dust, virgin daughter of Babel! Dwell on the land, daughter of the Chaldeans! There is no throne, because they will not continue to call you delicate and luxurious
Take a millstone, grind flour, open your veil, cut your white hair, reveal your lower legs, pass over the rivers
Your nakedness shall be revealed and your shame will be seen; I shall take redemption from you and I shall not meet a man among you
Our Savior, LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts is his Name, The Holy One of Israel
Dwell in confusion, enter into darkness, daughter of the Chaldeans, because they will not continue to call you mightiest of the kingdoms
I was angry with my people, for they polluted my inheritance, and I delivered them into your hands, and you have not performed upon them mercy, and you have made your yoke very hard upon the Elders
And you said: “Forever I shall be The Mighty One”, and you do not put these things to your heart, and you have not been mindful of the end
Now, hear these things, delicate one who dwells in quietness and says in her heart: “I AM THE LIVING GOD and there is none other. I shall not sit a widow, and I shall not know bereavement"
These two plagues will come upon you in one day: bereavement and widowhood suddenly will come upon you in the multitude of your sorceries and in the abundance of your Magicians

For you have trusted on your evil and you said: “There is none who sees me.” Your wisdom and this your knowledge has deceived you, and you said in your heart, "I AM THE LIVING GOD and there is none other"
Evil shall come upon you at dawn and you shall not know, and alarm shall fall upon you and you shall not be able to remove it, and trouble shall come upon you suddenly, and you shall not know
Arise now with your Magicians and in your many sorceries in which you labored from your youth. Perhaps you shall find fullness; perhaps you shall be strengthened
You are fatigued in the multitude of your schemes. Let them arise; let the Chaldeans who gaze into Heaven and into the stars save you, and know for yourselves by the moon what comes upon you
Behold, they have been as chips which the fire has burned, and they shall not save their soul from the hand of the flame. There are no coals for their fire, neither brightness sitting next to it
In this way they have been to you your Merchants with whom you labored from your youth, and they have gone astray, each man, beside himself, and there is none who saves you

Hear these things, those of the house of Yaqob who are called by the name of Israel, and they came forth from the family of Yehuda, who swear in the name of LORD JEHOVAH, and they commemorate the God of Israel, not in truth and not in righteousness
Because they were called from the city of holiness, and they leaned on The God of Israel. LORD JEHOVAH Almighty is his name
The first things that are from the beginning I have shown, and they went out of my mouth, also I made heard to you, and I act suddenly and they happen
I know that you are hard and your neck sinew is of iron, and your forehead is brass
I have shown you from former time, and before they would come I made you hear, lest you would say, “My idols have done it, and my carvings and my molten things have saved me!”
You have heard and you saw all these things and will you not show them? I made you hear that from now new things are kept, and you had not known
And from now they are created and not from former time; from before the day you had not heard them, lest you would say, "I know them"
You have not heard neither do you know them, and from former time your ears were not opened. I know that you surely lie and you were called evil from the womb
Because of my name I shall soften my anger, and my glory I shall keep for you and I shall not destroy you
Behold, I have purified you, and not with silver, and I have proven you in the furnace of poverty
For my sake I shall make what is undefiled, and I shall not give my honor to another
Hear me Yaqob, and Israel whom I called. I AM The First and I AM The Last
And my hand has constructed the foundations of The Earth, and my right hand has stretched out the Heavens. I call to them and they stand up as one
Be assembled all of you, and whoever is among you, hear who shows these things. LORD JEHOVAH loves him who will do his pleasure in Babel and in the land and with the seed of The Chaldeans
I have spoken, I also cried and I brought him and I made his way prosperous
Come to me and hear this, because from the origin I have not spoken in a secret place, and from the time that it was, there I am, and now LORD JEHOVAH God has sent me and his Spirit.
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH your Savior, The Holy One of Israel: “I LORD JEHOVAH your God teach you that you shall do no evil, and I show you the way that you will go in it
But, oh, that you had listened to my commands, and your peace had been like a river, and your righteousness like the waves of the sea!
And your seed was as the sand, and the offspring of your womb as its pebbles, and it would not end, and its name would not be destroyed from before me
Go out from Babel! Flee from the Chaldeans! Show this with the voice of singing and make it heard, and send it out unto the ends of The Earth, and say: ‘LORD JEHOVAH has saved Yaqob his Servant!
In the desert he walked them, and water from the flint he made flow to them! He bored through the stone and the waters flowed!’
There is no peace to the wicked, says LORD JEHOVAH”
Be silent, islands, and pay attention, peoples from a distance. LORD JEHOVAH called me, and from the womb and from the belly of my mother he remembered my name .
He made my mouth as a sharp sword and in the shadow of his hand he concealed me. He has made me as a choice arrow and in his quiver he hid me
And he said to me: “You are my Servant, Israel; in you I am glorified! •
And I have not said to the seed of Yaqob, ‘I have labored for nothing and I have given my power to futility.’ Truly my judgment is before LORD JEHOVAH and my work is before my God”

Now, thus says LORD JEHOVAH who formed me in the womb: “I shall be to him a Servant and I shall turn Yaqob to him and Israel I shall gather.” I was glorified before LORD JEHOVAH and my God was my strength

And he said: “Is it a small thing that you shall be a Servant to me, and you shall raise the tribes of Yaqob and you shall return the grafting of Israel? I have given you a light for the nations that you may be my salvation unto the ends of the Earth”

Thus says LORD JEHOVAH, The Holy One of Israel, and his Savior to him whose soul is despised, to him who is rejected from the people and from the Servants of Rulers: “Kings shall see and shall rise and Rulers shall bow down to him, because of LORD JEHOVAH who is faithful, The Holy One of Israel who has chosen you”

Thus says LORD JEHOVAH: “In a time of pleasure I have answered you and in the day of salvation I have helped you, and I have formed you, and I have given you a covenant to the people and light to the nations, that you will establish the Earth and you will inherit the inheritance of desolations
And you shall say to the prisoners: "Go out!”, and to those shut in, “Be revealed!" They shall feed on the roads and their flocks in all the streets
They will not hunger and they will not thirst, and heat or the sun does not hurt them, because their Lover will lead them, and to fountains of waters he shall bring them
I shall make all the mountains highways and the streets shall be exalted
These will come from a distance, and those from the North, and these from the Sea, and from the Sea of Sinim
Sing, Oh Heavens and dance, Oh Earth! Celebrate, oh mountains, in song, because LORD JEHOVAH has comforted his people and loves on his afflicted ones!
And Zion said :"LORD JEHOVAH has left me and LORD JEHOVAH has forgotten me!"
If a woman forgets her infant and does not love on a son of her womb, even if these forget, I shall not forget you!
Behold, on the palms of my hands I have engraved you, and your walls are constantly next to me
Your children, your destroyers and your plunderers shall go out from you quickly
Lift up your eyes around you and see all of them assembling and coming to you! I live, says LORD JEHOVAH, for you shall wear all of them as an ornament, and you shall be crowned as a bride
Because your ruins and your desolations and land of your ruin shall be narrower therefore than the dweller, and your devourers shall flee
Again, the children of your destitution shall say in your ears: “The place is constricted for us. Come to us! Let us settle down!”
And you shall say in your heart: “Who bore these to me? Behold, I am bereaved and alone, exposed and troubled! Who raised these up? Behold, if I am left alone, where are they?”

Thus says LORD JEHOVAH God: “Behold, I lift up my hands over the nations and I shall raise up a sign over the peoples, and they shall bring your sons on their hands, and they shall carry your daughters on their shoulders

And Kings shall be your foster fathers and their Princesses your wet nurses, and upon their faces on the ground they shall worship you, and the dust of your feet they shall lick. And you shall know that I AM LORD JEHOVAH, that those who wait for me are not ashamed
Is the prey of a giant going to be taken captive, or are the captives of the mighty delivered?
Because thus says LORD JEHOVAH: "The prey of a giant shall be led away captive, and the captivity of the mighty shall be saved, and judging you, I shall judge, and I shall save your children

And I shall feed your oppressors their flesh, and they shall be drunk from their blood, like new wine, and everybody shall know that I AM LORD JEHOVAH, your Savior and your Helper, The Mighty One of Yaqob

Thus says LORD JEHOVAH: “What is the writing of divorce by which I divorced your mother, or who is your creditor to whom I sold you? Behold, you have been sold by your sins, and by your evil your mother is divorced

Why have I come and there is no man, and I called and there is no one who answers? My hands have harvested the harvest and it failed, or is there no power in me to save? Behold, with my rebuke I dry up the sea and I make rivers as the wilderness, and their fish stink from lack of water and they die
And I clothe the Heavens in darkness and I make their covering sackcloth
LORD JEHOVAH God gave to me the tongue of learning, that I shall make known and I shall show the word to the troubled. I shall awaken at dawn, at dawn he shall make for me an ear to hear learning
LORD JEHOVAH God opened an ear for me and I did not turn my back, neither did I stand in contention
My body I have given to scourgings and my cheeks to beatings, and my face I have not turned from shame and from spitting
And LORD JEHOVAH God helped me; because of this, I am not ashamed; because of this, I have made my face like stone, and I have known that I am not ashamed
For he is near who is justifying me; who is condemning? Judging with me, we shall stand as one, or who is my adversary at law, let him come to me!
Behold LORD JEHOVAH God is a helper to me; who is condemning me? Behold, all of them wear out as clothing, and a moth will eat them

Who is among you who is in awe of LORD JEHOVAH? Let him listen to the voice of his Servant. He who walks in darkness and has no light, he shall hope in The Name of LORD JEHOVAH and he shall be saved in his God

Behold, all of you set me a fire and kindle me flames. Go in the brightness of your fire and in the flames that you have kindled; from my hands you shall encounter this: “You shall lie down in sorrow”
Hear me, those who are running into righteousness and are seeking LORD JEHOVAH. Gaze to the mountain from which you were cut, and to the pit from which you were hewn
Gaze to Abraham your Father and to Sara who conceived you, for he was alone and I called him and I blessed him and I increased him

Because LORD JEHOVAH builds Zion and builds all her deserted places and makes her wilderness as Eden, and her plain as the Paradise of LORD JEHOVAH. Dancing and rejoicing will be heard within her; thanksgiving and the sound of singing
Hear me, nations, and pay attention to me, peoples, because the Law from went out before me, and my judgment is light to the nations
My righteousness has come near and my salvation has gone out, and by my arms the nations will be judged. The islands shall wait for me and on my arms they shall hope

Lift up your eyes to Heaven and gaze also beneath in the earth, because Heaven shall pass away as smoke and Earth shall grow old as clothing, and its inhabitants shall be like it, and my salvation shall be to eternity and my righteousness shall not pass away
Hear me, those knowing righteousness, the people with my law in their heart: “You shall not be afraid of the reproach of man, and you shall not tremble at their insults
Because like wool and like clothing a moth will eat them, and my righteousness will be to eternity, and my salvation to a generation of generations!

Wake up! Wake up, and put on strength, oh arm of LORD JEHOVAH, like in the first days and like the generation that is from ancient times, you who have cut off greatly, and you have destroyed The Dragon
You are this one who dried up the sea and water of the great Abyss, and in the depths of waters you made a road where the redeemed will pass over, the redeemed of LORD JEHOVAH
And they shall be converted, and they shall enter Zion in glory, and for eternities there will be joy on their heads. They shall obtain sweetness and joy, and miseries and groanings shall flee away!
I AM THE LIVING GOD comforting you, says LORD JEHOVAH. Who are you that you are afraid of mortal man and of a son of man who dries up like grass?

And you have forgotten LORD JEHOVAH who made you, who stretched out Heaven, and he has formed the foundations of the Earth, and you have been afraid constantly, every day, from before the anger of the oppressor who was prepared to destroy. Where is the anger of the oppressor who was hurrying to destroy the strong?
They will not die to destruction, and one shall not lack his bread
I AM LORD JEHOVAH your God who rebukes the sea and its waves are calm. LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts is his Name!

For I have put my words in your mouth and in the shadow of my hands I have covered you, in that when I stretched out the Heavens, and I formed the foundations of the Earth, and I said to Zion: "You are my people!”
Wake up, wake up! Rise up, Jerusalem, for you have drunk from the hand of LORD JEHOVAH the cup of his passion, and you have drunk and you have drained the cup of trembling
And there is no one who comforts her, of all the children to whom she had given birth, and there is no one who has held her hand and lifted her up, of all the children whom she raised
Two things are coming to you, for which you will grieve. Upon you will come looting and ruin, and famine and the sword. Who will comfort you?
Your children are in shock and are lying down at the top of all of the streets as an offering of mourning, and they are full of the anger of LORD JEHOVAH, and the rebuke of your God
Because of this, hear these things, afflicted ones who are drunk, not from wine
Thus says your Lord: “LORD JEHOVAH and your God will judge his people. Behold, I have taken from your hands the cup of trembling and the cup of my passion. You shall not continue to take his drink

And I shall place it in the hand of your afflicters, for they said to your soul, ‘Lie down and we shall go through’, and you have made your people as the ground and like streets for those who pass through”
Wake up, wake up, oh Zion! And put on clothing of glory, Jerusalem the holy city, because he will not bring again to you the uncircumcised and the defiled!
Shake yourself off from the dust and rise up! Sit down, Jerusalem. Loose the yoke from your neck, captive daughter of Zion
Because thus says LORD JEHOVAH: “You have been bought without charge, and you shall be saved, not with silver
Because thus says LORD JEHOVAH, God to Egypt: my people went down at the first to dwell there, and the Assyrian took it by force
And now, what do I have here, says LORD JEHOVAH, that my people is taken without charge? Their Rulers wail, says LORD JEHOVAH, and they are blaspheming faithfully every day against my name
Because of this, my people shall know my name in that day, because it is I speaking, and I AM
How beautiful on the mountains are the feet of him who proclaims peace and who proclaims good, and who makes heard salvation, who says to Zion, ‘Your God reigns!’
The voice of your Watchmen. They lifted up a voice and together they sing, because eye to eye they shall see when LORD JEHOVAH returns to Zion
Dance and sing as one, desolate ones of Jerusalem, because LORD JEHOVAH comforted his people, and he has saved Jerusalem!
LORD JEHOVAH revealed his holy arm before the eyes of all the nations, and all the ends of the Earth shall see the salvation of our God!
Pass on, go out from there, and the impure thing you shall not touch. Go out from within it and be chosen bearers of the vessels of LORD JEHOVAH
Because you shall not go out in haste, and you shall not go in flight, because LORD JEHOVAH goes before you and The God of Israel assembles you
Behold, my Servant understands and is exalted and is lifted up and is highly exalted
Such that many shall be stupefied concerning him; thus his appearance was marred beyond that of a man, and his front side beyond that of the sons of men
This one purifies the many nations and Kings shall shut their mouths concerning him, because that which was not told them they saw, and what they had not heard they understood
Who has believed our account, and to whom has The Arm of LORD JEHOVAH been revealed?
He grew up as a child before him and like a root from the thirsty ground. He had no appearance or brightness, and we have seen him, and he had no appearance to him, and we denied him.
He is despised and humbled of men, a man of sorrows, and he knew sufferings. We turned away our faces from him and we despised him and thought nothing of him.
Truly he has endured our sufferings and carried our sorrows, and we considered him to be beaten and punished by God and afflicted
He is killed because of our sins, and he is afflicted because of our evil. The chastisement of our peace is upon him and by his wounds we shall be healed.
All of us have gone astray like sheep, and each of us has turned aside, and LORD JEHOVAH caused the sin of all of us to meet in himself
He came near and he was afflicted, and he did not open his mouth. He was led as a lamb for slaughter, and like a ewe lamb he was silent, and he did not open his mouth
He was led from imprisonment and from judgment, and who shall narrate his time? For he was cut off from the land of life, and some of the evil ones of my people approached him
A wicked man gave his grave, and a rich man in his death, because he did no evil and no deceit was in his mouth

And LORD JEHOVAH chose to prostrate himself and afflict himself. Sin had been placed in his soul that he would see the Seed and lengthen the days, and the pleasure of LORD JEHOVAH shall succeed by his hand
He shall see the labor of his soul and he shall be satisfied by the knowledge. He shall declare the righteous ones innocent. He is the Servant of the many, and he shall bear their sins

Because of this, I shall distribute him among the many, and he shall divide the loot with the warriors, for the sake of which he poured out his soul to death, and he was numbered with the evil ones, and he took away the sins of the many, and he met with the evil ones.

Sing, Oh barren woman who did not give birth, and exult in praise and dance, you who have not been in labor, because the children of the desolate have increased more than the children of a wife, says LORD JEHOVAH!
Enlarge the place of your tents and stretch the curtains of your tents, and you shall not spare; lengthen your ropes and set your pegs firmly
Because to the right and to the left you shall increase, and your seed shall inherit the nations and shall cause the cities that are deserted to be inhabited

You shall not be afraid because you are not ashamed, and you shall not be rebuked, because you were not put to shame, because you shall forget the shame of your youth, and the reproach of your widowhood you shall not remember again
Because your Lord did thus for you. LORD JEHOVAH of Hosts is his name, and your Savior, the Holy One of Israel, the God of all the Earth he shall be called
Because like a woman who is divorced and whose spirit is grieved, LORD JEHOVAH called you, and like the wife of a youth who is forsaken, says your God
In a little anger I left you, and in my many compassions I shall gather you
In great anger I have turned my face from you, and in my eternal compassions I have loved upon you, says LORD JEHOVAH your Savior
This is like the days of Noah to me, for I swore that the waters of Noah shall not pass again over the Earth, so I have sworn that I shall not be angry with you and I shall not rebuke you
Because the mountains shall be leveled and high places shall bow down, and my grace shall not pass away from you, and the covenant of your peace shall not pass away, says LORD JEHOVAH, the lover
Afflicted and tempest tossed one, because you are not comforted, behold I make your stones beryl, and I shall construct your foundations in stones of sapphire
And I shall build your walls with stones of jasper and your gates with stones of crystal, and your borders with choice stones
And all your children shall learn of me, and the peace of your children shall increase
And you shall be acquired in righteousness. Be far removed from slander, for you shall not be afraid, and from ruin, for it does not come near you
And all who are converted by my hands shall enter you, and you shall be a house of refuge for your inhabitants
Behold, I have created the Craftsman who blows the bellows into the fire and perfects a weapon for his works, and I have created the Destroyer to destroy

No weapon that is formed against you shall prevail, and every tongue that shall arise against you in judgment you shall condemn. This is the inheritance of the Servants of LORD JEHOVAH, and their righteousness is from before me, says LORD JEHOVAH
Oh, all who thirst, go to the waters! He who has no money, go buy and consume wine and milk without money and without price!
Why do you weigh money that is not for bread, and your labor that is not for being satisfied? Hear me to hear, and you shall eat good things, and your soul shall delight itself in fatness
Bend your ears and come to me. Hear me and your soul shall live, and I shall covenant with you a covenant of eternity, the faithful grace of David
Behold, I have given you as a witness to the nations, a Ruler and Leader to the peoples
You shall call the nations that you have not known, and nations that do not know you shall run to you, because of LORD JEHOVAH your God, and because of The Holy One of Israel who glorified you
Seek LORD JEHOVAH, and whenever you have found him, call upon him,
And whenever he comes near, the sinner shall forsake his way, and an evil man his thoughts, and he shall return to me and I shall show love upon him, and to our God, for he is abundant with forgiving
Because my thoughts are not as your thoughts, and my ways are not as your ways, says LORD JEHOVAH
Because as Heaven is higher than the Earth, just so my ways are higher than your ways, and my thoughts than your thoughts

Because as when rain descended and snow from the sky and it does not return there unless it overflows the land and gives birth to it and it makes it sprout and it gives seed to the sower and bread for food
Thus my word shall be that proceeds from my mouth, and it shall not return to me empty handed, but surely it does the thing that I please and accomplishes that for which I have sent it
Because in joy you shall go out and in peace you shall go on, and the mountains and the hills shall break out before you in song, and all the trees of the field shall clap hands!
In place of the thorn the cypress will sprout, and in place of wild thyme the myrtle shall sprout, and it shall be to LORD JEHOVAH for a name and for an eternal sign that does not end
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH: “Keep judgment and do righteousness, because my salvation is near to come, and my righteousness to be revealed
His blessing to a man who will do this, and a son of man who is empowered in it, and he keeps also the Sabbath that he will not break it, and he keeps his hands that he will not do evil
And a son of a foreigner who follows LORD JEHOVAH will not say: "Truly, LORD JEHOVAH separated me from his people”, and a Eunuch will not say, "I am a dry tree"
Because thus says LORD JEHOVAH to Eunuchs who keep my Sabbaths, and they choose the thing that I please, and they are empowered in my covenant:
I shall give to them a place in my house and in my walls, and a name that is better than sons and daughters, an eternal name I shall give them that does not fail

And to the foreign children who follow LORD JEHOVAH for his service and to love the name of LORD JEHOVAH, and they who will be Servants to him, everyone who also keeps the Sabbath that he will not break it, and they are empowered in my covenant

I shall bring them to my holy mountain and I shall make them rejoice in the house of my prayer; their burnt offerings and their sacrifices are for the pleasure of my altar, because my house is called the house of prayer for all the nations
Thus says LORD JEHOVAH God who gathers the scattered ones of Israel: “Again, and I shall gather unto him the gathered ones
Every animal of the wilderness, come eat every animal of the forest
See, all blind ones, and they do not know, all the dogs are dumb, and they cannot bark. They see and are lying down and they love to sleep

And they are dogs whose soul is greedy, and they do not know how to be satisfied. They shall be evil and they do not know understanding. All of them turned to their way, each man to this side and to that side
Come, take wine and take liquor, and it will be like today, and there shall be more abundance of good for us
Behold the righteous is destroyed and there is not a man who takes it upon his heart, and holy men are assembled without understanding, because the righteous is gathered from before evil
And peace shall come and they shall rest on their beds and they shall go straight ahead
And you come here, sons of affliction, seed of adulterers and fornicators
For what have you lusted and for what have you opened your mouth and you lengthened your tongue? Behold, you are a child of the Evil One and the seed of The Liar
Who are comforted with idols under every tree of the forest, and you slaughtered boys in the valleys under cliffs of stone
Your portion and your inheritance is with the part of the valleys, also upon them you poured out drink offerings and you sacrificed gifts. Shall I be comforted for these things?
On high and exalted mountains you have made your bed, also there you went up to sacrifice sacrifices

And behind the doors on the door posts you inscribed your memorial, because from my presence you have exposed yourself, and you have gone up and you enlarged your bed, and you are of them and you have loved their beds and the place you saw
And you praised Kings with oil, and you increased your sweet spices, and you sent your Ambassadors far away, and you were brought low unto Sheol
In the multitude of your ways you are weary and you have not said: "I shall stop!" You have wasted away in the guilt of your hands, because of this you have not prayed earnestly

By whom have you been agitated with fear, and you have been in dread that you have lied to me, and you have not remembered me, and you have not thought upon me in your heart? Behold, I am The Holy One who is from eternity, and you were not in awe of me
I shall show my righteousness and your works shall not benefit you

By your cry shall those who gather to you save you? The wind shall carry all of them away and a hurricane shall take them, and those who hope in me shall inherit the Earth, and they shall possess my holy mountain
And they will say: "Make clear, restore the road and lift up the stumbling stones from the road of my people"

Because thus says The Most High, and The Exalted One who inhabits the eternities, and holy is his name most high, and holy is his dwelling with the humble, and with the weary of spirit to give life to the spirit of the humble, and to give life to the heart of the suffering ones
Because I do not harbor ill will to eternity and I am not angry to eternity, because The Spirit from before me goes forth and the breath I have made
With the evil of her deceit I was angry, and I struck her and she turned and she was angry, and she went she grieved herself in the way of her heart
Her ways I have seen, and I have healed her, and I have comforted her, and I have paid comfort to her and to her mourners
Creating speech of the lips: "Peace, peace!" to the distant ones, and to those near, says LORD JEHOVAH, and I shall heal them
And the wicked are agitated like the sea, because they cannot rest, and its waters are turning up creeping things and mire
There is no peace to the wicked, says my God
Call with your throat and have no pity, and lift up your voice like a trumpet, and show my people their evil, and the house of Yaqob their sins

And they seek for me every day, and they seek to know my ways, like a people that did righteousness and did not forsake the judgment of its God. They ask me for judgment and righteousness and they seek to be brought near to God
“Why have we fasted and you have not seen and we have humbled our soul and you have not known?” Behold, in the day of your fast you do your pleasure and you approach all your idols
Behold, for strife and for contention you are fasting and to strike in the force of evil. You shall not fast like today and make your voice heard in high places
